name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
I have been traveling across Virginia supporting so many of our incredible candidates on the campaign trail.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68207018/422287732/1875917366?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230816-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE1OWI1NDQtOTMzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZAxMYd-r6IfIZ5uSI0ynHy-x1ZeWfMWI7pJ1VC5jT0Q=)
---
| Peter,

This November, there are elections all across Virginia- from the State Senate and House of Delegates to school boards and local government! As a firm believer in our Commonwealth’s future, I have been traveling across Virginia supporting so many of our incredible candidates on the campaign trail.

It’s awesome being out on the campaign trail, talking to voters, supporting great candidates across Virginia, and getting volunteers and voters excited about our 2023 elections!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68207020/422287734/1394220554?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230816-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE1OWI1NDQtOTMzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZAxMYd-r6IfIZ5uSI0ynHy-x1ZeWfMWI7pJ1VC5jT0Q=)
In Virginia Beach supporting Sen. Aaron Rouse for re-election! My love for Virginia and my belief that we can make progress together motivates me to deliver on lowering healthcare costs, expanding economic opportunities, and protecting the rights of everyone. name: Jennifer Wexton
subject: This is when things scale up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
It's hard to believe how fast this summer seems to have gone by.

But now, with August already half-way done, we’re approaching the point at which campaigns for this year’s elections in the Commonwealth will accelerate!

As things scale up, Virginia Democrats are working hard to strategically coordinate and run the most efficient field programs. I was so impressed with what I saw last week when I attended the opening of a new joint office for Danica Roem, Josh Thomas, and Travis Nembhard.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68207173/422292497/713551767?refcode=EM_FR_230816MM_MM_JW_FULL_5_G_N_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmFiOTFjOC05NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuXx-cdDjy-Jct33DLn-IZF7UyjgwnVUZ-sOTffKm90=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68207174/422292498/713551767?refcode=EM_FR_230816MM_MM_JW_FULL_5_G_N_P2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmFiOTFjOC05NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuXx-cdDjy-Jct33DLn-IZF7UyjgwnVUZ-sOTffKm90=)
Talking to candidates, organizers, and volunteers involved in the races that will determine control of our state legislature, I sense nothing but enthusiasm and energy as we prepare to enter the fall.

**I'm excited to keep assisting these races wherever I can.** [**Can you help boost my efforts by contributing $10 (or any amount) before my mid-August fundraising deadline tonight? We need to raise just $1,216 more to meet our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68207175/422292499/713551767?refcode=EM_FR_230816MM_MM_JW_FULL_5_G_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmFiOTFjOC05NDNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cuXx-cdDjy-Jct33DLn-IZF7UyjgwnVUZ-sOTffKm90=)

Thank you!

Jennifer

body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend,

---
Right before I announced my 2024 presidential campaign, Crooked Joe declared on national TV that he would use every tool at his disposal to stop me from being able to “take power.”

---
I want you to just think about that for a second...

---
...He didn’t declare that he would _beat_ me in an election. He didn’t simply say that he would _win_ in 2024.

---
He said that he was “making sure” that I’d be stopped from being able to “take power.”

---
Crooked Joe wasn’t referring to beating me in a campaign. He was openly revealing to the nation his sinister plans to try and _FORCIBLY_ stop me through Election Interference.

---
We are witnessing a very corrupt and inept man attempt to subvert the will of the people to crown himself as America’s first-ever tyrant.

---
Our country is being systematically destroyed by a man with the mind, ideas, and IQ of a first-grader.

---
_And right now, that vindictive first-grader is throwing a temper tantrum as he tries to JAIL his leading opponent because he knows he can’t beat me in a_ __FAIR__ _fight._

---
America is in a very dark place right now. We are sadly a NATION IN DECLINE.

---
**But I am not giving up hope on America.**

---
I promise you that brighter days still lie ahead. Together, we will not only Make America Great Again – __we will make it GREATER THAN EVER BEFORE__.
---

Our country is being systematically destroyed by a man with the mind, ideas, and IQ of a first-grader. And right now, that vindictive first-grader is throwing a temper tantrum as he tries to JAIL his leading opponent because he knows he can’t beat me in a FAIR fight. America is in a very dark place right now. We are sadly a NATION IN DECLINE. But I am not giving up hope on America. I promise you that brighter days still lie ahead. Together, we will not only Make America Great Again – we will make it GREATER THAN EVER BEFORE. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

#

Team — One year ago today, President Biden signed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ into law. This expansive legislation was passed to make progress on the climate crisis, reduce healthcare costs, make the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share, and deliver lasting relief for working families. And in one year, it’s done just that and more by jump-starting over 200 new clean energy projects, creating over 170,000 jobs, and saving millions of Medicare recipients hundreds of dollars annually on prescriptions. **This legislation has made a meaningful impact for families across the country, but now is not the time to become complacent. Nikki knows that more needs to be done for working families across Central and Southern Illinois, which is why she’s running for reelection.** But it will take a lot of resources to keep her in this fight, so we need this grassroots movement standing with our campaign every step of the way. [**Friend, will you support Nikki’s efforts to build on the _Inflation Reduction Act’s_ progress and pass even more transformative legislation by donating to her reelection campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68207425/422310216/-2053028736?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230816_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI3YTk3Yy05YjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYwUii_mJvCq8N_fVyOyeONi08eezFebNP9wQbIvFa0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68207426/422310217/829268588?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230816_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI3YTk3Yy05YjNjLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYwUii_mJvCq8N_fVyOyeONi08eezFebNP9wQbIvFa0=)

subject: It’s getting late and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We need to raise just 134 more donations before midnight.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce again and I promise I’ll keep this quick.
On Wednesday, we were tracking about 2,500 donations behind where we need to be for the quarter — **and now, we need to raise just 134 more donations before midnight to get back on track.**
I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. **But it’s getting late and not everyone is checking their email, so I need anyone reading this to help us close the gap.[Will you rush a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you think is best to my grassroots campaign before midnight?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35659?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35659?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9)

I’ll never take your support for granted, Peter — I am just so grateful for it.
Now, let’s defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat, together.
Lucas

\------Forwarded Message-----
From: Lucas Kunce
Date: Wednesday, August 14, 2023 at 1:57 p.m.
Subject: An update on my campaign
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce, and I’ve got an update for you.
On our usual check-in call this morning, my campaign manager flagged that this coming Wednesday marks the halfway point in our third fundraising quarter of 2023 — and that **we’re tracking about 2,500 donations behind** where we need to be.
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35659?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9)**
**Let me be crystal clear: this isn’t some arbitrary fundraising goal.** Staying on track this quarter means we’ll be ready to launch into the next phase of our campaign — opening offices, getting boots on the ground across the state, and regularly reaching voters with our message of fundamentally changing who has power in our country.
Over the next few days, my team and I are going to do everything we can to hit this goal and get our campaign back on track for the quarter — **including asking grassroots supporters like you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you think is best before Wednesday’s deadline.[So Peter, can I count on your support during this critical moment of our campaign?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35659?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35660?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35659?refcode=em20230816-3570&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3570%2E614464%2E6gDSw9)
---
From the moment we got into this race back in January, Josh Hawley and the GOP insiders propping up his campaign have been determined to tear me down. And with the help of grassroots supporters like you — chipping in and sharing our message when you can — we’ve made it clear: **they’re right to be scared.**
Just a few days after we launched this campaign, _National Journal_ said our race “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” in 2024.
And since then, we’ve made that a reality by breaking Missouri fundraising records and building a truly people-powered coalition to take back this Senate seat with support from the Missouri AFL-CIO, the Missouri Fire Fighters, former statewide leaders like Joe Maxwell and Susan Montee, and local elected officials and community leaders all across the state.
That’s why GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors just put more than **$1 MILLION** into a brand new Super PAC to attack me — and it’s why national Republicans are dumping money into Josh Hawley’s campaign.
They know that Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election next year — with even worse approval ratings than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida. And they can tell we’re putting together a powerful grassroots movement that’s capable of winning this race, flipping this U.S. Senate seat, and taking back power for real working people.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: In a week, I'll be In Milwaukee. I hope you'll be there too as my special guest! | | One week from today, I'll take the stage in Milwaukee. Fellow American, I want you to be in the audience. It's going to be one of the most important days for this campaign, so I am counting on conservatives like you to help give me a boost for my first political debate. | We are giving one lucky member of Team Vivek and a guest a chance to attend - IN PERSON. Better yet, I've also asked my team to cover your travel to and from Milwaukee and for your hotel! The contest ENDS tomorrow at midnight (Thursday, August 17th), Good Luck! Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. **The Democrats have taken things too far this time...**

We have observed an escalation in the Left’s increasingly aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Maintaining civil discourse on issues is regrettably fading away. The party of “Love and Tolerance” always shows their true colors.

**Biden called Republicans an**“extremism that threatens the very foundations of our republic,”**

Hillary Clinton said, **“you can’t be civil with a political party that wants to destroy what you stand for.”**

Rep. Maxine Walters declared ****“You get out and create a crowd. You push back on them. You tell them they are not welcomed anymore or anywhere.”**

Sen. Jon Tester encouraged people to “punch Trump in the face.”****

**Now... the Missouri Democrat Party advocated to burn down a Trump supporter’s home.**

Democrats wish harm and loss on a fellow American just for displaying signs and flags for a political opponent they hate. _There’s absolutely no place for it in Missouri – let alone America._

If we even hope to flip the Senate next year and stop this dangerous rhetoric in its tracks, we can't wait. clean_body: The Left has increased its aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Today, they took it a step too far... | Peter - this makes me sick. The Democrats have taken things too far this time... We have observed an escalation in the Left’s increasingly aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Maintaining civil discourse on issues is regrettably fading away. The party of “Love and Tolerance” always shows their true colors. Biden called Republicans an“extremism that threatens the very foundations of our republic,” Hillary Clinton said, “you can’t be civil with a political party that wants to destroy what you stand for.” Rep. Maxine Walters declared “You get out and create a crowd. You push back on them. You tell them they are not welcomed anymore or anywhere.” Sen. Jon Tester encouraged people to “punch Trump in the face.”** Now... the Missouri Democrat Party advocated to burn down a Trump supporter’s home. Democrats wish harm and loss on a fellow American just for displaying signs and flags for a political opponent they hate. There’s absolutely no place for it in Missouri – let alone America. If we even hope to flip the Senate next year and stop this dangerous rhetoric in its tracks, we can't wait. I refuse to believe that Democrats can campaign AND outraise us with a message that says they want to burn down a Trump supporter’s house.** The Democrat Party today is full of rabid hate for Republicans and anyone who disagrees with them. The hypocrisy isn’t lost in this message either. If this Tweet was from a Republican, there would have been a full investigation for domestic terrorism and legal liability. Next year, it’s all on the line and Democrats threatening to burn the Constitution is already scary enough. Respectfully, Sen. Now.

body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqtnv9bsu2dhug77u8r5rmo25qcoo5ogac0fefq0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9hm9p31c3h2bs)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs77lprqtpdnfudjab2dsei41tu4999880fob44g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9hm9p31c3h2bs "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself–she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs3fbvvl8n96pgsma6vhvbgtf3o4k61d04vs7bl0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9hm9p31c3h2bs)

| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She’s **stood against the Woke “Squad,”** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America.** [Now is the time to stand with Lauren before it’s too late!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd627k6n5uiirvtldl9ogr4gn4cqhtemto45nodg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9hm9p31c3h2bs)**

name: Perry Johnson
subject: Silencing Conservatives is not acceptable!
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsO1MRSDNC

I am a political outsider that started a movement that now
includes MILLIONS of Americans that share our conservative ideas
and principles...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osO1MRSDNC
Friend,

My name is Perry Johnson and I am running for President
of this great country. I am anti-FBI (political police), I am
anti-corruption (Joe and Hunter Biden), I am anti-China, and I am
anti-establishment!

Friend, I am a political outsider that started a movement
that now includes MILLIONS of Americans that share our
conservative ideas and principles. A movement of farmers,
teachers, veterans, and other hard-working Americans tired of the
political games from out-of-touch politicians who will not
prioritize us.

Friend, we continue to face many critics and the news
media refuses to put us in polls because they want to downplay
our movement and take your voice away.

I am asking you, stand with me, and tell any pollster
that calls, texts or emails that you support Perry Johsnon and
want to see me on the debate stage next week!

Friend, I am a self-funded candidate who is not in this
for the money, which is why I am not asking you for a donation. I
simply ask that you share and talk about our movement with your
friends, neighbors, colleagues, congregation members, and help
spread our message nationwide. The cornerstones of my campaign
are integrity and transparency, I am here to fight for
hardworking Americans like you!

Thank you for taking the time to read this, and thank you
for taking action to help put America back on track. Your
commitment to our amazing country and our conservative principles
is inspiring and I am truly grateful for your support. Let's keep
this the best country in the world!

-Perry Johnson
Candidate for President

P.S. Check out my reality series about what it's like to
run for President at perryjohnson.com/backstage

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Breaking: Democrats rattled by major election interference allegation
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 17, 2023

Breaking: Democrats
rattled by major election interference allegation
Conservatives have long been
suspicious of the Democrat Party's election strategy. Now, we're
finally getting answers.

And Democrats were just rattled
by a major election interference allegation.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Supreme Court hands down
major First Amendment ruling

Constitutional rights
have been under attack in recent years. None more important than
the First Amendment.
➞ Continue Reading

Judge hands Trump a
devastating loss with massive consequences

Former President
Trump is on the warpath to the White House. But his future was
just thrown up in the air.
➞ Continue Reading

Joe Biden was rocked by
this stunning news

Many candidates are
getting to work as the 2024 race quickly approaches. But
President Biden is starting to feel the pressure.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

subject: I survived the fire–but I won’t stop serving my country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Brown
body:
https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/duty-face2face-em-av-135/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230721_e000127-sb_duty-face2face_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

You see, it happened in a split second, friend — when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle in Afghanistan.

My body was instantly engulfed in flames.

The pain was unimaginable.

I thought my life was surely coming to an end, and I wondered how long it would be before I drew my last breath.

But when one of my soldiers extinguished the flames on my body, I knew God had bigger plans for me.
https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/duty-face2face-em-av-135/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230721_e000127-sb_duty-face2face_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=

I stared death in the face and survived.

Friend{, through the pain and years of recovery, I learned the most important lesson: Every single day is a blessing and giving your all for your country is a privilege and an honor.

My name is Captain Sam Brown, and I'm running for U.S. Senate because I believe with all my heart that the only reason I’m alive today is to serve my country to my last breath.

It’s been less than a month since I formally announced my candidacy and I would be truly honored if you chose to become one of my first 1,000 financial supporters TODAY. (https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/duty-face2face-em-av-135/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230721_e000127-sb_duty-face2face_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=)

Duty First,

CPT Sam Brown, US Army (Ret.)

Republican U.S. Senate Candidate

P.S. I’m running for U.S. Senate in Nevada. (https://secure.winred.com/sam-brown/duty-face2face-em-av-135/?utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=ha-email&utm_campaign=20230721_e000127-sb_duty-face2face_av&utm_content=av&recurring=true&amount=) Democrats have been barely winning every single year for nearly a decade — and winning in Nevada will be KEY to guaranteeing a Republican majority in the Senate in 2024. I can’t do this without you! [Black Hills VA supports PACT Act at Sturgis Motorcycle Rally](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2es147l8mf1o67i6ms00nlq884m1tk4ilfca80_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj2c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1gef933cuh33d1m6qqq1d5hm6r7b8rk6mj7as3geup72tjlk1q3ccblkgr32td465qqcsble9rj9djlkmrr2ttieoqfccdl6mh78cdhmjrq49fg)
Every summer, hundreds of thousands of riders from across the country gather in Sturgis, South Dakota. The annual Sturgis Motorcycle Rally offers 10 days of riding, entertainment and festivities. Fort Meade VA calls Sturgis home and joined in on this year's rally to highlight the PACT Act.

body:
I need to ask you something.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3flhc5g8geg5n6anr651j25ppmfnd63roceuh8g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1iefchn63gm6d1he9g65d1ge2pr8db5c8qj0pj362q38ojh6oqrdc9ic6or4ttnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0tr2coqe5ddl6upb6phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
I need to ask you something.

|
---
| | |
Is this Friend? It's Mike Pompeo.

I've been reaching out to patriots who have not completed their 2024 Presidential Survey- **and your name was high on my list.**

Is there a reason you haven't completed your Presidential Survey yet?

Look, there's only a little time left before the 1st debate, so I really need you to complete your 2024 Presidential Survey TODAY.

---
| | | [COMPLETE 2024 PRESIDENTIAL SURVEY](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4ivud7q1386u970bd14nbk35dd6ant1ujrvpuno_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj6c9h2bs "Generic Button")

| | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv3m97p2a7ihq56cnrhpkqm9iinsf0hk49v2en6o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj6c9h2bs)
---

As you know, in just 3 years, Joe Biden and the Democrat Party have **DESTROYED** everything America stands for. **_It 'll take a lot of work to get our country back on track._**

But House Republicans and I are not ready to give up on America just yet, and I hope you aren't either. **[Will you please do your part and complete your Presidential Survey?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj3dpjpaihs981r6tlsji3s2mk1f6efq6v0h91eo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj6c9h2bs "Will you please do your part and complete your Presidential Survey?")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE 2024 PRESIDENTIAL SURVEY](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf7c65fu78rbja08bdenufq2iraglou08tip5smo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj6c9h2bs "Generic Button")
---

Friend, we rely on America-First patriots like yourself to help us gather data to ensure our strategy is a winning one going into 2024.

Without your help, the Democrats stand a much better chance of taking back the House and forcing their extreme agenda on Americans. **[Please, take just 2 minutes to complete our Official Presidential Survey and help House Republicans win in 2024!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zda878pjfgtn2lu1h8ou4ffubnosi6758hfqo2c8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj6c9h2bs "Please, take just 2 minutes to complete our Official Presidential Survey and help House Republicans win in 2024!")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE 2024 PRESIDENTIAL SURVEY](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zokoftb33h1ik1m3q7hchdhlgt0q9h9384bhshv8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9jmeoj6c9h2bs "Generic Button")
---

I'm looking forward to reviewing your answers, Friend.

Thank you,

Mike Pompeo

## Scientists Record Song From Brain Waves
In a breakthrough, scientists have reconstructed a Pink Floyd song from the [recorded brain waves of patients](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FyrCAUgOGngQ4HDihQUNyGbm-b0kE4KlkUR4k7-_aZpM4L_P98H4_xEXLJ-_I_bOjaXMcQW75x5IYJzUCOQJObEQElRScGC6CFEpyubp6S4ah7OageQgKTUtQocDLJxklFmh1wkNwIza3UUnd8UhCTQhujMFYKojim3OrZfda8txXn8q43nl2sGy1ube24iPxHwBPwG7azdrF2X08C_qdMwHNDwIuegD_y_mRzqe_ErrovbDpD3tkr3HgxYaU0uhcEPD1dOl65lHwNmii-bCGX31_7m_8dAAD__yQHWOQ) undergoing surgery while listening to the song, "Another Brick in the Wall." The team said that while the brain-wave reconstruction is rough, the lyric "All in all, it was just a brick in the wall" is recognizable, as is the general rhythm. You can hear the odd, dreamy recreation [here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGu4yAQANDT4A4LBhKbgmIbd9l2SwuPB3t2CUTAxsrtv_Trf4On9-exPgInzsfv8CTfY1kDdn7TqmapJwlmhWH3kQjIDOT13QFM2mo1nF67zdy0m0I0hGDn2d7NzW0zzjGC2ezAHhQYNetJOTOZaVSbBdwtOUQ9O6OFVbRzL3X8Wzj3k2L6lDfVEctzSP7s_dWE-SVgEbBc1zU2ZMpIY6mHgAVL7pS7gCXUzphIwHJSqBJTaI1Rvjj_kzGVzy5byYeshCW3Xv9jp10mbp0y1Sa3GjjLK7ypDdXvr4tT4nafhFXHM3D69vSfe74CAAD__5IOaVA) or [here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uxCAQBOCnwR0WLMQ_hYs07i5tSouf5W4TDCcgtu7tI6dOPZ80o_m8bTdDkdL9w-y4tJA34xoduImJy5GD2qDzS0AEVB0ucpgBRqml6B6LthNaCNoOQeBgPMDwFqz18-C8GlF3tIAAJSY5ilmNauyF1eC8xtk5Oc1KMi3QU8ul_8qU2gNDfOUDS-_y3sXl0dqzMvXOYGWwnufZ40_JCc96AQbrQR4zg_WqYbCKicEqBwZrumB1hKlRbZUXdAVNQ_6k9M1DzC_Pa053HkrerzQXj57bYijx0xxYu7L450kxUh1GpsV9NxT_drX_b_oNAAD__-Cratc). Researchers say the ability to decode the brain's electric activity [could help people who have lost the ability to speak](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnwRsWHMjYA0MXb-na0cLnc3IthghorLx91ahj99_wff-Py3IJHDld38NBvu15Cdj4QYsapXYSzALd5nciINOR18ME4LTVqrt5pcA6hZNDQ9O6Wm02HN0QcHAruRE69qDAqFE7NRlnXK9WC7hZmhD1OBktrKKNWy79Z-bUbrTHZ35Q6TEfXfS31u5VmDcBs4D5PM--IlNqvDOGgwpjSL9UwBxKY4wkYE70XfKfq63KQhILhUbyzulL7jE_N1lzusq95ENGro0SlSrXEjjJ131uTwFzV_x2PzlGroMTVl2PwPE1rf1f6icAAP__u8lt0g), such as stroke victims, get their voice back.
## Target Sales Down in Wake of Pride Backlash
Target sales dropped 5.4% in the second quarter from last year due at least partly to [negative reaction over its Pride Month](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFztCAQgOFfox0OLH6HFhRfY3dpUzoIq5IgGHbvTP59JqnTv8U7z-t9vruYYt5e3IGW1zI7z_GJsxyEMgL0DG2wKyKgbtGq2whgVK9ku1uPiwFvBmO0lCClVt6jhsEF3d_CP99GCxK0HJSRozbadHLpwYceR-_VMGrV9BJD5FK7txIz77imr_LE2vlytMnuzCc1-n8DUwPTdV3dWj6XB8WMRD9NA9Ph6jsyNTCxqxsyCa4u04Y5YBVnjQHFgdXvLodIKBK6QIKLWOImCH3JQXw8XGWsglxCEpQex9lWG84rphTpZppeboeL6XeL_1b6DgAA___3KGyF) merchandise and promotions, CEO Brian Cornell said. Overall revenue was 4.9% lower than last year. Target was [hit by a backlash](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAUAL8GO5zHQw8pKNLYXdqUDsJTSRANcOfk7zOXOvXO7Ozsx3262xBDWt_tTqYux2RdDU-aYOBCcZQTNt4sREiyISNuGlGJTkCzmd4tWtPQ90rYWYBHAE0ClByw72fVNcEgoIRBKNBSSdXC3KHzHWnnxKClYB2QD_XI7ecRUt1oiT_Hk3Lrjr2JZqv1LEy-MRwZjtd1tS7N7gUZji81wxEGhqO4MRyrzStVfubgic_WfUVbNr49ci282EiFh8QLuSN5_v2wuVLmZHMKaS3tVvfYZOPPK8QYyk2xDtbdhviXUv8_8xsAAP__s9RkAA) this spring over items such as a transgender bathing suit and various "gender-fluid" clothing, books, and home furnishing. Cornell said he couldn't separate the [impact of the backlash](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2ypSAQBOCnwQwLB8qfgGATs7PphtYIo84uwinAY-3b3_LGN-1Our8_r-WFHDjuv_EkW7e0oKv8oUWNshsk6AUabzciIN2Q7foJYOhMp5rDQo-r65XWxpjRT854Ulu_GtV771FtDVtQoNXYDWrSgx5atRpw3tDkXDdOuhNGkeeacvs3cawHbeF_-lBuXTqbYI9a30XoXwJmAfN9322mq1IuTy9gXq_CkUoRMGeqyEG6FMt1UhYwV8w7VemuWiTGeGGQW8rksDzBSZkdxiKPFLxc0f2TMUVJpVCsjEGWN0XPcZfPBflo9ALmJlv_vjkELv0gjNpP5PC9tv6M9xUAAP__KoFy8w) from other factors affecting the sales decline, including reduced consumer spending and increased shoplifting. But, he said, "We are applying what we learned."
## Meadows Files to Move Trump Case To Fed Court
Donald Trump's former chief of staff Mark Meadows--a fellow defendant in the Georgia indictment--has petitioned to [move the case to federal court](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAQQL8Gd0QwYGMXFNe4y7VXWhgGe07YRHiSaP9-tam3ftJ70vt3X-6BCp3b33Cg51yXEJleuKhRaifBLNAlnxEBTYdeDxOA01arbvdp1MbYHnUYe6f7vCabetcH4xTkac0deVBg1Kidmowz7qZWCzFZnGLU42S0sAoTcW23_5VO3jGXr_rCdov16IrfmR-XMH8EzAJm3nGnUn6YgLnh9iyBqZ4C5lifjeUamAteAmarewvDIA8Mqb4vSWeiyAeeLBse9YVyw9o2CjLuoW14yYwJWyjyYxIwd82nx5tKoWtwwqrtCPRJd_z7pe8AAAD__wejajU), where he plans to ask a judge to dismiss the charges. In a move some think [Trump will also make](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRvWcdDYHhi6sKVrRwsfZ-cqHCKbBvXtq3Tu_kuf9H9e52uULPftI-7s61rmSFWePMOozaDRztglvzIj2469uUyIg3EGupunuFi3EKwuJueY4sLryO5ieUlMNnXiEdDCaAaY7GCHHhaHlBxPRGacrFEOOEktR_9V5F5vvOaf8uSjp7J32d9qfZzKvisMCkNrrX-ULFWovAKF4c7tVBheisIAo8Jg3hSGnWMq7dQbl2OTqCmerFdOfMSsqXwfVQMYY-yI3eHTo0nOcl4G5WDbo-Q_v_6_4zcAAP__PPpgRg), Meadows claims the charges amount to "state interference in a federal official's duties," which violates the Constitution. Meadows says he was indicted for doing his White House job. Meadows is one of 19 defendants in a sweeping 41-count indictment in Georgia state court. Prosecutors proposed a March 4 start date for the trial.

clean_body: In a breakthrough, scientists have reconstructed a Pink Floyd song from the recorded brain waves of patients undergoing surgery while listening to the song, “Another Brick in the Wall.” | | | | | | THURSday, August 17, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1957, outfielder Richie Ashburn set a painful baseball record: He hit the . The first broke her nose. The second hit her while she was on a stretcher. The two became longtime friends. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Scientists Record Song From Brain Waves In a breakthrough, scientists have reconstructed a Pink Floyd song from the undergoing surgery while listening to the song, "Another Brick in the Wall." The team said that while the brain-wave reconstruction is rough, the lyric "All in all, it was just a brick in the wall" is recognizable, as is the general rhythm. You can hear the odd, dreamy recreation or . Researchers say the ability to decode the brain's electric activity , such as stroke victims, get their voice back. Target Sales Down in Wake of Pride Backlash Target sales dropped 5.4% in the second quarter from last year due at least partly to merchandise and promotions, CEO Brian Cornell said. Overall revenue was 4.9% lower than last year. Target was this spring over items such as a transgender bathing suit and various "gender-fluid" clothing, books, and home furnishing. Cornell said he couldn't separate the from other factors affecting the sales decline, including reduced consumer spending and increased shoplifting. But, he said, "We are applying what we learned." Meadows Files to Move Trump Case To Fed Court Donald Trump's former chief of staff Mark Meadows--a fellow defendant in the Georgia indictment--has petitioned to , where he plans to ask a judge to dismiss the charges. In a move some think , Meadows claims the charges amount to "state interference in a federal official's duties," which violates the Constitution. Meadows says he was indicted for doing his White House job. Meadows is one of 19 defendants in a sweeping 41-count indictment in Georgia state court. Prosecutors proposed a March 4 start date for the trial. That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

I'm looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**

| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She's **stood against the Woke "Squad,"** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn't find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d5c8805-b7b2-4dd3-bdf8-34bf470bd67c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. [We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5daff446-1c48-47b3-8da6-88b1f18172df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong, Peter. [That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee83fed9-00d7-41e7-b404-2875abcee47c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. Chuck Grassley | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say

body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd1a975a7e540f985dae8ae1cfca196&_e=teGIcJCjF5-MKbzNl0PL52JAc_XOs1DLIm5oIKhYem8oKSKwMvoovlMI_4nll_hnaTlKorTpGoamo9iCkAkiAdKzH22KB6HkAOJMDDIQ7B6ZynDx8pb-QO7-p2Iw6C2Tcb9eF0IrcABqVrusJYbEwLeuNhkpgY-XmQsl_X7BzfV5UnjwLb1w9neQtGNeZWuxOVtv8QDS9qLvnjCTMj7sl7GimUPPSDlc5SiiuEi0GNYRD7APdwInVSHkFAjBjuPMf3Y-S8MGOvd2s5BWiFV_0zAu0BreHu4gRyHzPCnYYO4XadpJYRNWBR9maVXnMCsXIjGIwcZAckaePMpzwDMImUdFnnbkUn44PjySOZZrLGmbJ-cbe9_lkXD_PLZvVtOH2ugh_iRZjDdOPtK10JhIAg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd1a975a7e540f985dae8ae1cfca196&_e=teGIcJCjF5-MKbzNl0PL52JAc_XOs1DLIm5oIKhYem8oKSKwMvoovlMI_4nll_hnaTlKorTpGoamo9iCkAkiAdKzH22KB6HkAOJMDDIQ7B6ZynDx8pb-QO7-p2Iw6C2Tcb9eF0IrcABqVrusJYbEwLeuNhkpgY-XmQsl_X7BzfV5UnjwLb1w9neQtGNeZWuxOVtv8QDS9qLvnjCTMj7sl7GimUPPSDlc5SiiuEi0GNYRD7APdwInVSHkFAjBjuPMRP_mQg5cK2SNSc0axXzze5feFKkxRAuLMjG8vd3ce2vSEOKE0J32kVewJEt4VOYofw5yy828FTZcz-Cd4vOPT52BKeSrP_IdS7lQ9nOP7pWGt4-0E-hqVCeWqIT3pUofk2Bt5fXj_QV-imJ5OgCdSg%3D%3D)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bd1a975a7e540f985dae8ae1cfca196&_e=teGIcJCjF5-MKbzNl0PL52JAc_XOs1DLIm5oIKhYem8oKSKwMvoovlMI_4nll_hnaTlKorTpGoamo9iCkAkiAdKzH22KB6HkAOJMDDIQ7B6ZynDx8pb-QO7-p2Iw6C2Tcb9eF0IrcABqVrusJYbEwLeuNhkpgY-XmQsl_X7BzfV5UnjwLb1w9neQtGNeZWuxOVtv8QDS9qLvnjCTMj7sl7GimUPPSDlc5SiiuEi0GNYRD7APdwInVSHkFAjBjuPMVeqsdvbm7OJGaJKxfuNiTuhOhpEyiRjfysAE-_8uMS_DKj_TDhEsy1WRxfDo46I4pkNM4w53hIGZCOHsvPVa4LLWZF6ozFUb90ocZUbeuRTmRgZgsGbNcjuGVEbq0MUNgijzyBtX6cNo-60hE9f38g%3D%3D)**

name: Organizing Alert [AOTL]
subject: Want to know how to get involved with All On The Line efforts to end gerrymandering?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

As summer draws to a close, the heat of redistricting continues to sweep across our nation. Amidst special elections, Supreme Court decisions, and potential map redraws, the evolving redistricting landscape demands our attention. And at All On The Line, we're committed to keeping you well-informed and engaged every step of the way.
[**Embrace your role as a catalyst for change! Join us for the National Volunteer Call on August 21, 2023, where we'll equip you with the latest news and updates. >> 📌**](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054?refcode=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?utm_campaign=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
[](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054?refcode=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?utm_campaign=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
---
[REGISTER TODAY!](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054?refcode=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?utm_campaign=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
---
In these pivotal times, the call for collective action rings loud and clear. It's up to us to safeguard the integrity of our democracy. Your involvement is the cornerstone of this movement – your voice, your passion, and your commitment.
[**So, circle the date, clear your schedule, and join us as we navigate the currents of redistricting. Register today!**](https://www.mobilize.us/allontheline/event/271054?refcode=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite?utm_campaign=20230816_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite)
\-- All On The Line

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Cruise ships dumping waste in our oceans
body:
URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Don’t let the two newborn orca calves die of starvation
before they’re even given names! Take action now! >>
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1932945?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==]

TWO baby orcas were just born into the same Southern Resident killer whale pod as the beloved,
deceased matriarch Marina. Given that 69% of orca pregnancies end in miscarriage , we’re thrilled to welcome these newborn calves into the world!

Sadly, there is a part of us that is extremely worried, Friend. You see, the mortality rate for newborn orcas is as high as 50% — so they must survive at least a year after birth before even receiving names.

Vulnerable and weak, surviving their very first year isn’t going to be easy for
these two little creatures. Especially not with corporate overfishing and
bycatch depleting Chinook salmon populations , leaving orcas starving and malnourished.

These endangered orcas are clinging to survival, and the birth of these two new
babies is a hopeful sign of recovery. But if the helpless calves are going to
have a chance at life, we MUST replenish the Chinook salmon populations
immediately. The two newborn orcas are counting on us to be their voice to stand up to
greedy fishing corporations. Will you speak up now?
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1932946?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==]

SIGN THE PETITION
[https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1932947?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==]If the two newborn orcas had been born at a different time, maybe their future
would look a bit brighter. The Pacific Northwest waters were once abundantly
flowing with food supply for orcas — before industrial overfishing contributed
to a loss of 159 salmon populations. That’s almost HALF of the historic salmon runs!

Unfortunately for these baby whales, the Southern Resident orca population is at
its LOWEST point since the 1970’s. The threats to orcas have gotten so severe, that
scientists predict these beloved marine animals could be completely EXTINCT within the next few decades.

With the odds stacked against them, these helpless newborn orcas are going to
need all of the support that they can get. But unless the National Marine

clean_body: URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Don’t let the two newborn orca calves die of starvation before they’re even given names! Take action now! >> [==] TWO baby orcas were just born into the same Southern Resident killer whale pod as the beloved, deceased matriarch Marina. Given that 69% of orca pregnancies end in miscarriage , we’re thrilled to welcome these newborn calves into the world! Sadly, there is a part of us that is extremely worried, Friend. You see, the mortality rate for newborn orcas is as high as 50% — so they must survive at least a year after birth before even receiving names. Vulnerable and weak, surviving their very first year isn’t going to be easy for these two little creatures. Especially not with corporate overfishing and bycatch depleting Chinook salmon populations , leaving orcas starving and malnourished. These endangered orcas are clinging to survival, and the birth of these two new babies is a hopeful sign of recovery. But if the helpless calves are going to have a chance at life, we MUST replenish the Chinook salmon populations immediately. The two newborn orcas are counting on us to be their voice to stand up to greedy fishing corporations. Will you speak up now? [==] SIGN THE PETITION [ the two newborn orcas had been born at a different time, maybe their future would look a bit brighter. The Pacific Northwest waters were once abundantly flowing with food supply for orcas — before industrial overfishing contributed to a loss of 159 salmon populations. That’s almost HALF of the historic salmon runs! Unfortunately for these baby whales, the Southern Resident orca population is at its LOWEST point since the 1970’s. The threats to orcas have gotten so severe, that scientists predict these beloved marine animals could be completely EXTINCT within the next few decades. With the odds stacked against them, these helpless newborn orcas are going to need all of the support that they can get. But unless the National Marine Fisheries Services (NMFS) holds the industrial fishing industry accountable for DECIMATING orcas’ critical food source , the lives of these baby orcas could soon be cut short before they’ve even fully begun. Please, , we can’t let the two newborn orcas starve to death. Add your name to tell NMFS to STOP corporate overfishing and bycatch and protect endangered orcas >> [==] SIGN THE PETITION [ for your urgent action to protect endangered orcas! body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | August 17, 2023

Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez was exposed when this secret came out
The radical congresswoman
has had her fair share of controversies over the years. But no
one expected this.

And Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez was
exposed when this secret came out.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Breaking: Democrats rattled
by major election interference allegation

Conservatives have
long been suspicious of the Democrat Party's election strategy.
Now, we're finally getting answers.
➞ Continue Reading

Supreme Court hands down
major First Amendment ruling

Constitutional rights
have been under attack in recent years. None more important than
the First Amendment.
➞ Continue Reading

Judge hands Trump a
devastating loss with massive consequences

Former President
Trump is on the warpath to the White House. But his future was
just thrown up in the air.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrlovkeca28ih8r0f2puq0nj4s3hr5lp16869ato_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge6oj4c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhenanfnhub0kakevo38qjog2vh7rc356dadk4jo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge6oj4c9h2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1b235uckooq6ileppthp3o9ls332d2eev6etjb8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge6oj4c9h2bs)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed. But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.” The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake... ...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. name: Anna Kaplan
subject: George Santos + Donald Trump = birds of a feather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress running against
George Santos.

Like Donald Trump, my opponent calls himself an “America-first
Republican.”

Both Santos and Trump claim the 2020 election was stolen -- despite not
having any evidence. 🤔

They’re both anti-choice, pro-gun, radical right-wing lunatics.

And now, they’re both under criminal indictment and are running for office
to avoid jail time.

We can’t let them win.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19010?t=1001&akid=3501%2E346206%2E8f-ZTa ]Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help
me DEFEAT George Santos and restore honesty and integrity to the U.S.
Congress?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19010?t=1002&akid=3501%2E346206%2E8f-ZTa ][IMG]

Trump and Santos are birds of a feather. Let’s defeat them together.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230817-3501-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3501_346206_8f-ZTa&akid=3501%2E346206%2E8f-ZTa

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3501%2E346206%2E8f-ZTa

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Molinaro?=
subject: August Update from Rep. Marc Molinaro
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bb330b440b96/molinaro-meets-with-schoharie-locals-on-inflation-law-enforcement-9392143?e=a39a20e5dd)
---
| |
---
|
---
| From key funding for community projects, to a visit to all 11 counties in just 1 month, I am working tirelessly on your behalf.

Check out some key highlights below, follow me on social media to stay up-to-date, and as always, I am grateful for your support!
---
|
---
|
---
I was pleased to host Think DIFFERENTLY Field Day in Columbia County on 8/16!

The event allowed individuals of every ability and every age to participate in summer field games and engage with local service providers.

\- "[Rep. Molinaro to Host Think DIFFERENTLY Field Day in Columbia County](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=ccf32652a1&e=a39a20e5dd)"
|
---
|
---
For decades, Albany & Washington have overlooked the Southern Tier and invested elsewhere. I’m fighting to change that.

>From day one, my commitment has been to rise above the partisan politics in Washington and focus on making a real difference for Upstate NY.

\- ["Rep. Molinaro secures $27 million in federal funding for improvement projects in 19th district"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=1b3a80f03f&e=a39a20e5dd)
\- ["Oneonta, Norwich to receive millions in federal grants"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=4c0d27c8c1&e=a39a20e5dd)
\- ["Town of Ulster water tank replacement plan could get $1.44 million boost"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=04c346f533&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
|
---
I had a great conversation with Roll Call, where we talked about everything from my run for mayor at 18 years old to my Mets fandom.

\- ["How Marc Molinaro went from teenage mayor to key vote in Congress"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=6b0d3b83ea&e=a39a20e5dd)
|
---
|
---
I’m visiting every corner of NY-19 for one simple reason: to listen, learn, and lead on the issues important to our community.

I hope to see you out there!

\- ["U.S. Congressman Molinaro meets locals in August Action Plan"](https://molinarofordutchess.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7a5de207e774ea8a3851d76c&id=c9b6e636dd&e=a39a20e5dd)
|

### MAUI STRONG FUND

As an alum of Hawai'i Pacific University, I am heartbroken to hear about the destruction in Maui. The ongoing wildfires have devastated Maui over the past few days, leaving thousands without homes. To help those impacted, the Hawai'i Community Foundation established the Maui Strong Fund to channel support directly to those in need. Please consider giving to this fund to help those affected by this tragedy.
---
| |
### FAMILY SERVICE OF ROANOKE VALLEY FUNDRAISER

The Mission of Family Service of Roanoke Valley is to support individuals and families as they journey toward lives of emotional wellness, healthy relationships, and a future filled with hope. As they raise money for this fiscal year, their theme is mental health is everything. I am excited to be supporting them this summer by raising money to help them continue to serve our region.

### [Josh Thomas for HD-21](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013CyYEpzowzrErXE9Vb5qa1KmhoeiKSw24X-aIgf5snygWLemXl6_YH_HMjzqkOv59QRuSZj1UIHCKAMNNwBsalanWOOuf0NhklrmTvl6vd6eTbuJ2HodZTQfD5V25TLYttWkJL6JfyQ=&c=krgQ3yokLmQEnM3SJMKOk8wPZ1YzH20uBJFtkoS85gFAiZgaa0JaEA==&ch=aczChWU-K_UgpjJk3MoOwSNHGKYG6vQHlL6EMVEkKIOk1XVpohYPWQ==)

After five years of serving his country on active duty, Josh traded his combat boots for books and the pursuit of justice. As an attorney, Josh set his sights on uplifting communities, ensuring affordable housing for all, and helping entrepreneurs and small businesses across Virginia thrive.
When the COVID-19 pandemic plunged the world into chaos again, Josh refused to stand idly by. He answered the call to serve yet again, joining Virginia's Medical Reserve Corps to help combat the health and economic impacts of the disease.
Josh continues to fight for us every day by advocating for the rights of Veterans, the LGBTQ+ community, and helping to secure asylum for those fleeing from Afghanistan. Josh refuses to back down, relentlessly working to bring about positive change.

---

Free Parking and admission.

### Grandparents' Day - Aug. 19
---
The Virginia Museum of Transportation and AARP are thrilled to present a delightful Grandparent's Day Celebration on August 19th from 10 am to 4 pm at the museum.
Grandparents, when accompanied by their grandchildren, will enjoy complimentary entry to the museum!
Bring the family together for a delightful celebration while creating cherished memories. Let's make this Grandparents' Day an unforgettable experience!

### Dog Days of Summer - Aug. 19
---
Lancerlot Sports Complex welcomes back, for the fourth year, "The Oakey's (Pet Funeral Home & Crematory) Dog Days of Summer" event which will take place on Saturday, August 19 from 1 - 4 pm.
This will be a free community event open to the public, especially all those with dogs, or those who are thinking about adopting a dog.
Over 20 animal vendors will be on-site providing free services, offering door prizes and more!

### [YOU WRITE THE BILL WORKSHOP - SEPT. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013CyYEpzowzrErXE9Vb5qa1KmhoeiKSw24X-aIgf5snygWLemXl6_YIQOJZE3mmXoJEXWUsLQQL8jSBen-9kYcOcsEyC1XpyUuLgWzaWdcBJjmOcupLsMPUKmUiynt8B0njdgv72iXshr9IVIiHk_p35tQof2dzT4mNdBLB0Y5HV2d0wKsWK5RiiAY6my6606NQVZ3MMVoBN1UP7hsOqiLAyyPEPFzst9yHxGEjfp9Cmsx7oOLe-mTS4KsiC2fS3r8nQaVCBdxko=&c=krgQ3yokLmQEnM3SJMKOk8wPZ1YzH20uBJFtkoS85gFAiZgaa0JaEA==&ch=aczChWU-K_UgpjJk3MoOwSNHGKYG6vQHlL6EMVEkKIOk1XVpohYPWQ==)14

Ever thought about something that could be made better with appropriate legislation? Want more transparency in our government? Do you want to be heard?

Join us Thursday September 14th, 5:30 pm, at the Melrose Branch Library Community Room, for our annual "You Write the Bill Workshop". You'll be able to learn about how a bill becomes law here in the Commonwealth, as well as work with others that share your passion to draft bills.

All are welcome! Please share with anyone you think may be interested.

The Melrose Branch Library is located at 2502 Melrose Ave NW Suite D, Roanoke VA 24017.
