clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | | | ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH | | | | == | == | MAUI STRONG FUND As an alum of Hawai'i Pacific University, I am heartbroken to hear about the destruction in Maui. The ongoing wildfires have devastated Maui over the past few days, leaving thousands without homes. To help those impacted, the Hawai'i Community Foundation established the Maui Strong Fund to channel support directly to those in need. Please consider giving to this fund to help those affected by this tragedy. | | FAMILY SERVICE OF ROANOKE VALLEY FUNDRAISER The Mission of Family Service of Roanoke Valley is to support individuals and families as they journey toward lives of emotional wellness, healthy relationships, and a future filled with hope. As they raise money for this fiscal year, their theme is mental health is everything. I am excited to be supporting them this summer by raising money to help them continue to serve our region. | == | == | | | CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT | | | | == | == | == After five years of serving his country on active duty, Josh traded his combat boots for books and the pursuit of justice. As an attorney, Josh set his sights on uplifting communities, ensuring affordable housing for all, and helping entrepreneurs and small businesses across Virginia thrive. When the COVID-19 pandemic plunged the world into chaos again, Josh refused to stand idly by. He answered the call to serve yet again, joining Virginia's Medical Reserve Corps to help combat the health and economic impacts of the disease. Josh continues to fight for us every day by advocating for the rights of Veterans, the LGBTQ+ community, and helping to secure asylum for those fleeing from Afghanistan. Josh refuses to back down, relentlessly working to bring about positive change. | | | REGIONAL CANDIDATE EVENTS | | | | | == Canvass for Sam & Trish! Join us Saturday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on August 19th at Lakewood Park, 12:30pm. Located at 1402 Brandon Ave SW Roanoke, VA 24015. | | | == Canvass for Lily Franklin! On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event! Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com or call 540-353-3645. South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018 | | | | | | == ---|--- == TOMORROW! Please join Vice Mayor Joe Cobb & James Matthews at their home (address to be provided upon RSVP) tomorrow, August 18th, at 5:30 pm for a reception in support of The Impact Center and Lily Franklin with Sam Rasoul! Please contact Zach Schenkman at (773) 852-5157 or info@sam4va.com with any questions or to RSVP More information: == | | | IN THE COMMUNITY | | | == RCPS 2023-2024 New Schedule School is almost here for our Star City students! Roanoke City Public Schools has implemented a new schedule for the 2023-2024 school year, so be sure to check your student's new start and dismissal times. | == | == Roanoke Festival of India 2023 Festival of India returned to Roanoke this past weekend! It was a great celebration of culture, with delicious food and live performances. I had a blast being a part of this annual celebration! | == | == Botetourt Honey Festival - Aug. 19 Bee Inspired and come Celebrate National Honey Bee Day at the Botetourt Honey Festival! There will be loads of local honey for sale and free bee advice! Learn how to sign up to become a beekeeper! Enjoy all the wonderful vendors of the Botetourt Farmers Market plus special honey, craft and food vendors! Free Parking and admission. | == | == Grandparents' Day - Aug. 19 The Virginia Museum of Transportation and AARP are thrilled to present a delightful Grandparent's Day Celebration on August 19th from 10 am to 4 pm at the museum. Grandparents, when accompanied by their grandchildren, will enjoy complimentary entry to the museum! Bring the family together for a delightful celebration while creating cherished memories. Let's make this Grandparents' Day an unforgettable experience! | == | == Dog Days of Summer - Aug. 19 Lancerlot Sports Complex welcomes back, for the fourth year, "The Oakey's (Pet Funeral Home & Crematory) Dog Days of Summer" event which will take place on Saturday, August 19 from 1 - 4 pm. This will be a free community event open to the public, especially all those with dogs, or those who are thinking about adopting a dog. Over 20 animal vendors will be on-site providing free services, offering door prizes and more! | == | == RRHA Walk & Talk - Aug. 22 Meet the Roanoke Redevelopment and Housing Authority at the EnVision Center on August 22nd from 3:30 - 4:30 pm for a Walk & Talk Event. Meet Lansdowne community members, enjoy a walk with other community partners, engage with residents and hear direct feedback from them, and build relationships within the community. 2607 Salem Turnpike, Roanoke, VA 24017. | == | | | | | | == ---|--- Ever thought about something that could be made better with appropriate legislation? Want more transparency in our government? Do you want to be heard? Join us Thursday September 14th, 5:30 pm, at the Melrose Branch Library Community Room, for our annual "You Write the Bill Workshop". You'll be able to learn about how a bill becomes law here in the Commonwealth, as well as work with others that share your passion to draft bills. All are welcome! Please share with anyone you think may be interested. The Melrose Branch Library is located at 2502 Melrose Ave NW Suite D, Roanoke VA 24017. | | | | | == | Join the Roanoke City Democrats! Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month at a new location, Virginia Heights Community Church, 2014 Memorial Ave SW, beginning at 7 pm. Sign up for meeting reminders and other information==. Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm. | | | Join Roanoke Young Dems! Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies. Contact: mailto:YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com to get involved! | == | | | | == | | Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime. My very best, | | | Del. Sam Rasoul | | | == == == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate | | | | | | | Sam Rasoul for Delegate | P.O. Box 13842, Roanoke, VA 24037 | | Sent by mailto:info@sam4va.com powered by

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9523m563a1s59645rknheveoq58uksugk9229g8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkuj2thgmjqjr9fik9f49in6ge0lm270bhi5jgi0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56eoj2eb6oiplv4nan5llm06o2j0a6a65951le8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zauvr27qasclldfcll7587e8m4pau32qt3mm2gg8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0f22tpp26516cijflu7ggmlmbscd873r27gejg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg8kn75oto3mj6g80n4fc15bklvgt85ehmq1ucno_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zka9f0fc9v1i8fohpnen08ml6b9jojv7j1dfp59g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3nj8t5vct0f5d24u3m31pl1luut7i94ai2gbdgg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsdl4ffk91nlmmfm5mn7tv41jgiil9210736rgm0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zepfnkfkuv90fk0vg89itrmk03jsm3u635eib6f0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf352jsjikn0gj1403ksnvp5ogho83fvl5rajm88_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztv26ak2h3p424lpokmekt833na9uqgdgo7vb008_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj2mn51du89umgd76mbfktscjsqv4c1penng49lg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z26famjlrsh0g5llm1n926iqnng856gp0brofuco_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkjjjrqb5ck5fd69gtdlg8qk5sg0rntrhe9c06ig_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

GOP Presidential

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8tr9au5tf5g9qkimmkjdc3vn09s6237c6hgrm80_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country – but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**...You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily – _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgnvb544ion13arg4oj9mu4o2h1m8g6tedg0007o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man – _**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsrbmkuc5lqvoqpjjs4f7lv57k5aubcemgptmtgg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ge1o31cph2bs)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68211252/422323621/1982386019?refcode=urd-em-230817-split_tester&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWViY2Y4MDctZmIzYy1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=B2ZOrDU3Hwve7BzfaRmFm6M7PDJ2zyw7JTzCcJ08gm8=) Hey Peter, I’m back on the farm this month with Sharla, where we’ll be pulling 16-hour days in the fields now that the peas are ready for harvest. **I love being a farmer.** I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. It’s tough—but it reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families. It also means that since I’ll be working on the farm all month, **I have a lot less time to fundraise than our opponents.** And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar. But the truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. **Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. We really do need early money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask:** **[With farming taking up most of my time this month, we can’t afford to come up short in fundraising. Could you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and United Rural Democrats to help us make up the difference? I’m counting on this grassroots team (that’s you!) in August for the resources we need to fight body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Hi, it’s Jen…I wanted to give you a quick update on an incredibly important issue: human trafficking. I recently joined House Speaker Kevin McCarthy for a showing of the movie “Sound of Freedom.” This important film brings attention to the horrifying reality of human trafficking. The film shows just how important it is that we end human trafficking, and that certainly starts with securing the border!!! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=57fd55e712f003e73294487b0f3105fa838fce9e2638310d592fa684288ee17328c9eef83957458e366424049eb06e6bb1d39fa8dc26738c10e292a19141c0e6 I’ve spent time at the southern border, and it is so frustrating to hear the horrific stories of human trafficking and the struggles law enforcement, border patrol, and property owners are currently facing. We cannot sit back and watch as human traffickers continue to use our porous southern border to commit their horrific crimes and destroy lives in the process. So I’m asking you to join me in demanding that Joe Biden and Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas, take action RIGHT NOW to secure our border and hold human traffickers accountable! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=57fd55e712f003e73294487b0f3105fa838fce9e2638310d592fa684288ee17328c9eef83957458e366424049eb06e6bb1d39fa8dc26738c10e292a19141c0e6 SECURE THE BORDER I’m proud to have supported legislation in the House that would secure our border and give our border patrol officials the tools they need to arrest and stop human traffickers. Sadly, our bill has been blocked in the Democrat-controlled Senate…so https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=57fd55e712f003e73294487b0f3105fa838fce9e2638310d592fa684288ee17328c9eef83957458e366424049eb06e6bb1d39fa8dc26738c10e292a19141c0e6 I need your help to send a clear message by signing our petition today! Thank you for taking a stand against human trafficking, Peter…hopefully we can come together - across party lines - and end this horrific practice once and for all. -Jen To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=57fd55e712f003e7ba426608ffe2bcbf0cd2504f04c0bea53eb109366295c9497524006e369501a2a06abe87fbea01325eba571ef8d69f364c7f3deee77a9836 here . name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: Congressman Nathaniel Moran Re-Election Campaign Launch
body:
I would like to invite you to join me as I announce my campaign for re-election. | | |
---
| |
## Peter,

Don't forget to join me as I announce my re-election campaign! I will be stopping in Tyler, Longview, Henderson, Mount Pleasant, Texarkana, Marshall, Center, Carthage, and Jefferson. Please join me at the location closest to you. **I can't think of a better way to announce my campaign than being surrounded by the people I am dedicated to representing.** Your continued support has been the driving force behind my time in Congress, and I am eager to continue fighting for the values and principles of our District. I look forward to seeing you there!
---
|
## Thursday August 17
* [**10 a.m. Tyler Square**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=961d8b0463&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 W. Ferguson St. Tyler, TX 75702
* [**1 p.m. Gregg County Courthouse**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=1db2938162&e=bbce4dd6ad)
101 E. Methvin St. Longview, TX 75601
* [**4 p.m. Henderson Area Chamber of Commerce**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=b51a079e4a&e=bbce4dd6ad)
201 N. Main St. Henderson, TX 75652

## Monday, August 21
* [**10 a.m. Titus County Courthouse**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=2d1240a359&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 W. 1st St. Mount Pleasant, TX 75455
* [**1 p.m. Texarkana Square**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=1063a793a2&e=bbce4dd6ad)
500 N. State Line Ave. Texarkana, TX 75501
* [**4 p.m. Synergy Park**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=efbe935dcc&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 N. Bolivar St. Marshall, TX 75671

## Tuesday, August 22
* [**10 a.m. Shelby County Historic Courthouse**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=b3b49b8c67&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 Historic Courthouse Square Center, TX 75935
* [**1 p.m. Panola County Chamber of Commerce**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=603c90fa13&e=bbce4dd6ad)
300 W. Panola St. Carthage, TX 75633
* [**4 p.m. The Jeffersonian Institute**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=a1c534e183&e=bbce4dd6ad)
120 E. Austin St. #100 Jefferson, TX 75657

| Gratefully,

Congressman, First District of Texas

name: Colin Allred
subject: We only have a few hours to raise $50,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, this is the last time I'm reaching out before my critical end-of-month deadline, so I'm just going to tell it like it is:
— Ted Cruz won his last election by only 2.6% .
— Thanks to his GOP mega donors, he has $4,798,914 in the bank.
— Right now, we're falling $50,000 short of our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline and only have a few hours to close the gap.
Ted Cruz's millionaires and special interests are scared because they know we can win this thing. They're throwing everything they've got behind him. I'm counting on you to ensure I can compete with Cruz's millionaire donors:
So, with just a few hours left until our midnight deadline, can you split a donation of any amount you're able to with my campaign and Serve America so that we have the resources to send Ted Cruz packing for good? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you for joining my fight to fire Ted Cruz,
– Colin

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcbncvirl4ph4jeu6tf7rtqlnuvaevj44a7hm3qo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or6cjh2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

---
Democrats' dark money dollars are _pouring in_ to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd46mheme4pb9k4v4hnnt70p0hdjiq97sa7mttro_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or6cjh2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**

Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy

_I write to you with a heavy heart._

The Left is outraising and outspending us. Biden's cronies are raking in huge sums of cash and spending it on some of the most contentious issues facing Americans to ensure that middle class, red-blooded Americans drown.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.

**[Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3pqjcb2j737gb6ilunq3rgderfj60rvhuchiflo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or6cjh2bs "Can you rush $8, $15, or $25 by midnight to help us stand up for America and stop the Left in their tracks?")**

body:
#

Peter - we have three critical pieces of information to share with you.
1\. CNN has named Arizona’s Senate seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2024. Whether it goes to Ruben, to Mark Lamb, to Kari Lake, or even to Kyrsten Sinema is up to us and the work we do these next several months.
2\. A poll was released earlier this month that showed Ruben TIED with Mark Lamb — a MAGA sheriff who praised the insurrection on January 6th and defends the traitors who stormed the Capitol.
3\. So now, we really need your help! Our goal in August is to get 50,000 donations. 50,000 donations to help power this campaign and send Ruben to victory in 2024.
And it’s so important we hit this goal, because with control of the Senate down to just one seat and Arizona the deciding state, it’s going to take millions of dollars to win.
**We fell behind earlier this month, but there’s still time to dig deep and crush our goal. So today, with our next deadline approaching, we have to ask:**

name: Jim Marchant
subject: Deep State Theatrics Exposed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate
body:
Join the Fight Against Political Shenanigans!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OZNt4VJ9X7LTqhRtA4XQw_GNpZWbPcTr8higs_p8lNXhLD9Qxr7Cry3UZd8Qz-WVOdwYDmLNfD5Wt6aF3TboQzLc0yysZ0llhRBRE4w0spaLGNLhoHz6Fri_Zv-b7gXnAUaDzkTpI4OethrhY0TYgw==&c=vfiVEBEOwp4Qbn-Y6nFMomj3DGso0jiqbEG1B7kWG3kx9Kl6o0a-NA==&ch=QfzW-P17GtTDaJtwo4Oh_U_NTWU9cSUCFAfnjS8bZjHB-tTZaKpWQA==)
---
| Peter,
---
Can you believe it? Donald Trump has racked up another indictment, in addition to three previous ones in New York, Washington DC, and Florida. With the Georgia RICO conspiracy indictment, President Trump has now been charged with ninety-one felonies of various types. Ninety-one! Think about that. Where is our country heading? What type of Justice can we expect from the blatant weaponization of our justice system?
Peter, we're not buying into the Deep State's grand production of the century - a RICO conspiracy case that reads like a bad spy novel.
These so-called political elites are like clingy exes who can't take a hint. And get this, the legal proceedings are about as transparent as a grimy glass wall. A leak here, a fictitious charge there - it's like a game of legal Whack-A-Mole! The Fulton County Court website leaked a "fictitious" charging document. Oops! But don't worry, it's just a minor detail. Nothing to see here, folks, just a little hiccup in the Deep State's plan.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OZNt4VJ9X7LTqhRtA4XQw_GNpZWbPcTr8higs_p8lNXhLD9Qxr7Cr6F8msFTKsDLUwi2HU4-23_q60jTv5MDFNPbXNTBJoL62zh9f3L17LJ3J_z8aX34GZGG4Gha3_LVatt65vrHAk7oAFJQQW3SaW58BICoLPegqu-X-UKzC4_O7ZrQl9DYiT5VC5bzLY8yVgr-PjB95T-7FEjsgNHxhA==&c=vfiVEBEOwp4Qbn-Y6nFMomj3DGso0jiqbEG1B7kWG3kx9Kl6o0a-NA==&ch=QfzW-P17GtTDaJtwo4Oh_U_NTWU9cSUCFAfnjS8bZjHB-tTZaKpWQA==)
---
Speaking of plans, Fulton County Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis is taking full advantage of the persecution of Donald Trump and the MAGA movement by fundraising and campaigning, all while supposedly conducting an investigation. But don't worry, it's all above board - if you ignore the bias, grandstanding, and shady behavior, that is.
Oh, and let's not forget the grand jury - you know, the one that even the Fulton County Judge described as "one-sided". When it comes to Donald Trump, due process and the rule law take a vacation. It's almost like justice is peeking through a blindfold, but hey, who needs fairness and equality when we can have political theater and conviction before trial instead?
So, Fellow Patriots, let's rally together in our movement to save the nation and support our FEARLESS MAGA Leader. Let's tell the Deep State we're not buying tickets to their circus. It's time to stand up for our Constitutional Republic, proven leaders who serve We The People instead of themselves, the Equal Application of the Law, and putting our nation First!
[Chip in today to support my mission to put America First in the U.S. Senate by fighting tirelessly to bring down the false temple of this two-tiered system of justice!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OZNt4VJ9X7LTqhRtA4XQw_GNpZWbPcTr8higs_p8lNXhLD9Qxr7Cr6F8msFTKsDLUwi2HU4-23_q60jTv5MDFNPbXNTBJoL62zh9f3L17LJ3J_z8aX34GZGG4Gha3_LVatt65vrHAk7oAFJQQW3SaW58BICoLPegqu-X-UKzC4_O7ZrQl9DYiT5VC5bzLY8yVgr-PjB95T-7FEjsgNHxhA==&c=vfiVEBEOwp4Qbn-Y6nFMomj3DGso0jiqbEG1B7kWG3kx9Kl6o0a-NA==&ch=QfzW-P17GtTDaJtwo4Oh_U_NTWU9cSUCFAfnjS8bZjHB-tTZaKpWQA==)

clean_body: Join the Fight Against Political Shenanigans! | | | | == | Peter, Can you believe it? Donald Trump has racked up another indictment, in addition to three previous ones in New York, Washington DC, and Florida. With the Georgia RICO conspiracy indictment, President Trump has now been charged with ninety-one felonies of various types. Ninety-one! Think about that. Where is our country heading? What type of Justice can we expect from the blatant weaponization of our justice system? Peter, we're not buying into the Deep State's grand production of the century - a RICO conspiracy case that reads like a bad spy novel. These so-called political elites are like clingy exes who can't take a hint. And get this, the legal proceedings are about as transparent as a grimy glass wall. A leak here, a fictitious charge there - it's like a game of legal Whack-A-Mole! The Fulton County Court website leaked a "fictitious" charging document. Oops! But don't worry, it's just a minor detail. Nothing to see here, folks, just a little hiccup in the Deep State's plan. == Speaking of plans, Fulton County Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis is taking full advantage of the persecution of Donald Trump and the MAGA movement by fundraising and campaigning, all while supposedly conducting an investigation. But don't worry, it's all above board - if you ignore the bias, grandstanding, and shady behavior, that is. Oh, and let's not forget the grand jury - you know, the one that even the Fulton County Judge described as "one-sided". When it comes to Donald Trump, due process and the rule law take a vacation. It's almost like justice is peeking through a blindfold, but hey, who needs fairness and equality when we can have political theater and conviction before trial instead? So, Fellow Patriots, let's rally together in our movement to save the nation and support our FEARLESS MAGA Leader. Let's tell the Deep State we're not buying tickets to their circus. More than 400 communities have been ravaged by mass shootings, attacks against reproductive rights have been rampant around the country, a _record_ number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced and enacted across the nation, and the climate crisis has continued to sprawl further out of control.
Our wounded nation needs progress – _now_.

Peter, thanks to the support of people like you, I – a girl from Brooklyn who had no real power or privilege growing up – was able to become New York's _first_ Black attorney general. **And I have not taken that for granted.**

From the moment I first took office, I have used the platform that you have given me to fight tirelessly to institute lasting change. But with far-right lawmakers across the nation continuing to attack our most fundamental rights, my work has only gotten harder.
That's why I'm counting on this team now more than ever before. I know we can fight back – but only if we each do our part. **That's why I'm counting on at least 1,000 fearless fighters to donate to my campaign before midnight on Saturday.**

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjqmc5nihhtc1165b03alsn4dsqe5vl3pi439rmo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ocpvlpkc6mu4ajd5o852cnmu7fq3hjonqjugho_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg7bvioksm82jju2krt62sl7pv8qcf61vbckgld0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7uqa3osokstuuj48n73b24s4cbthg19ks1ohg3o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjnc6kdl9dtpkg1vdi10bsqbjvhlej5o4ih0q4uo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdmh6i68se8f2vb0t4kgfdl5m3iir6u55vma9is8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7voh0vv36l1p6bmmklk91ie1kq8phrlv73ocdq0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3so55p7fvnq25tqfbo4dflqu6mg2qt65h1stsn8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zukosn1aoagp3uqbr7gp7p4oha9g3ujm6k1q1r2g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z42sgis1r8l94m0777hl4429tlc8neulatnroqbo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8r4cdoseij4p3amjqn72a6niruc7i2pseellv3g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zctt1f22ocm22gbmrffko8au0uimkos7arad4t08_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbccam8ac86oh3mqkeuep6vfhhvdhl1jqaj243f0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm67ukirt61tgeeshrc5i9vlvq61b79acca3bfcg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1gmut9mt35k9gid2oglte6enm67vgj7npk6i8o8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ie8or1cth2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

American Action News

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: He served President Trump honorably, now he's being persecuted
body:
I'm stunned there isn’t more outrage from the conservative professional class in DC. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10386055?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

My friend and Center for Renewing America colleague, **Jeffrey Clark, was indicted alongside President Trump** and 17 others in Georgia as part of a 2020 election case.

_Jeff was serving President Trump honorably_ and doing his job in 2020, and because of that he’s now facing charges from a radical prosecutor who aspires to higher office and is using this witch hunt to climb the political ladder.

Friends, that’s why I'm personally asking for your help.

**[A donation of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can afford](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e8e37dd690&e=17913c7d6d) **would go a very long way in helping the Center stand by Jeff against these phony charges and political witch hunt.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=173e857e87&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| **[Yes I'm asking for your support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=edf3c558b5&e=17913c7d6d)** , but this is _not_ _another fundraising email_.

Frankly, I'm stunned there isn’t more outrage from the conservative professional class in DC. They have no idea what an existential threat this is to our country. They are blinded by their Trump Derangement Syndrome and comfortable lives. This type of cowardice institutionalism is exactly why we need new conservative institutions, like The Center and others unafraid to take the fight to the enemy.

_Mark my words_ : we will no longer have a country when men like Jeff have their name dragged through the mud, home raided by the DOJ, and now face criminal charges all because they fought for the integrity of our elections.

You can read our full statement on the sham charges brought against Jeff [here](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a4afa28ae9&e=17913c7d6d).

In the meantime, [**I do hope you will support and stand by Jeffrey Clark**](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3370199a36&e=17913c7d6d). It’s a long road ahead, but Jeff isn’t backing down, so neither can we.
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President, Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=9210dfcc64&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0a3b1be9d8&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=899e34504e&e=17913c7d6d)

300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=fab3677c0b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=fab3677c0b).

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs3pco2f7oh33p3mlrf9jpokfp2p12m5tbok15v0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zos1k7fgc4m8o5hfqd4u1ses32mdu52intkldtv8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4faj7lps5g72pg1ntl2pjmapnbfjktv9aakh7sg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z86kf61qrrdquespee5eup6oiu6oqn28018r3tt0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8f2f13cnmltgh16mltdij9pf6f8si0djc8n6ino_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2animgiv6dfv4rqhk5d0kirkdt3tkvp6bhf86hg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo6lfj1f4puf5l5qrgi993kp251qd3rqmic0pst8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlsfv3k68rn90mbrcbgigpv6i43vh94bqp3qurlo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zakrbp3qbe07qa69bqunaadbpafo8fhvdphlc1co_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvact1krbnmtrr1fs4hfh52uol7nhabotj8mmhs0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi18k714jphfp277sjquhfapoq36euiabsminugg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvigsu3j7h79fa0uf23as39b2r3vrmc2fd49hs9g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7i9cjke12ipe5aj061hcudvg1lpmun1d004jgpo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu8s9toe6pck3p7doqd5ijq0k70l2k1tqfudhd1o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z74382qtjdrm202i9rga9vr23qesvj4kbu6d9evo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9iecob2c5h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

American Briefing

name: Coach
subject: 🚨 Free Speech ALERT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
I won’t stand for it. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/18570f55b01de917/4258aeb962798de8c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Our free speech rights are under attack like never before – and the federal government is complicit. **White House staffers and other government employees have colluded with woke Big Tech companies to censure conservative voices online – a blatant attack on the First Amendment. ** That’s why I’m teaming up with my Republican colleagues, including Sen. Rand Paul and Rep. Jim Jordan, to introduce the Free Speech Protection Act which will forbid federal employees from using their roles to attack your free speech rights. **[I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read this article to learn more about how I’m fighting for your constitutional freedoms.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/18570f55b01de917/289c87c7c479b8e7c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
---
[**READ THE ARTICLE HERE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/18570f55b01de917/2913c1c78f25cc68c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
_I will never back down_ from the Biden White House or any federal bureaucrat who attempts to infringe on your freedom of speech. ** ** – Coach

_**Connecticut’s Limousine Liberals want to Ban gas cars and your personal choice. This is an attack on the poor, the middle class, and all working citizens who can barely pay today’s outrageous energy bills let alone afford $70,000 cars.**_
_**SPEAK OUT and BE HEARD**_
Join Senator Rob Sampson who is leading this fight and sign up for the Zoom or Written Testimony below

**Public Hearing Information:** Date: August 22, 2023
Time: 9:00 am
Hearing Link: https://ctdeep.zoom.us/j/81807291329
All persons interested in providing comments at the hearing must register at: **https://ctdeep.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZUld-6qpzopGN1HeEa0hX8pIHIl_2O3jWCm**
Written comments. Written comments on the proposal can still be provided. Comments should be submitted no later than 5 pm on August 23, 2023 via the eRegulations System (PR 2023-023) or by electronic mail to the Mobile Sources Group at **deep.mobilesources@ct.gov.**
| [Register to Testify ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=22cdfb94b9&e=8763c56857)
---
|
---

###
2WINCT is partnered with Freedom Project USA to build a coalition of conservatives across Connecticut. We are committed to Constitutional principles that will reflect in our mission of recruiting and developing strong, conservative candidates; identifying and fighting for key issues that impinge on our freedoms; and to create branding and messaging programs that illustrate our values as citizens of Connecticut.
Founded in 2019, Freedom Project USA’s mission is to defend liberty and free market principles. We advocate, involve, and educate lawmakers, job creators, and the American public about free market principles, personal responsibility, and economic freedom to allow everyone equal opportunity to pursue success.
###

subject: Have a second to answer a quick question?

body:
Team, every day Congress makes critical decisions that impact our lives, our future, and the direction of the country. But one decision Congress has no business making is your personal health care decisions, including whether or not to be pregnant.

Mondaire is committed to ensuring every person has access to the care they need— _including_ abortion—without interference from Congress or extreme Republicans with their own political agendas.
| **[We have one question for you: Do you agree that abortion is a personal health care decision that should remain between a woman and her But one decision Congress has no business making is your personal health care decisions, including whether or not to be pregnant. Mondaire is committed to ensuring every person has access to the care they need— including abortion—without interference from Congress or extreme Republicans with their own political agendas. | | | ---|--- Under Kevin McCarthy’s disastrous leadership, the GOP is hellbent on restricting our fundamental rights, including the right to bodily autonomy and our right to make our own reproductive choices. Mondaire is running to expand our fundamental rights and put the needs of everyday people front and center, but in order to do that he needs your input. Thanks so much for sharing, Team Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

Team,
Monday's article from TIME gutted me. And so have the dozens of other stories of people who've suffered because anti-choice Republicans have cut off their access to abortion care.
**Now, there's another anti-choice Republican in the primary for PA-01.**
In fact, he's so anti-choice he declared on the radio that, "rape and incest is not a good excuse" for someone to get an abortion. It's a disgusting, callous belief that is exactly how you end up with 13 year olds being forced to give birth.
**Here's where I stand on abortion and your right to choose:**
* I believe that access to abortion is essential to protecting the rights of women to freely participate in society.
* I believe you know best when it comes to your healthcare – not me or any politician.
* Everyone loves someone who has had an abortion. Nearly 1 in 4 women will have an abortion.
* It is not enough to restore Roe. We need to make sure everyone in this country, regardless of zip code or economic status, can access the full range of healthcare that they need – not just reproductive care, but _all_ care.

**I am the only pro-choice candidate in this race, and you can trust me to protect your right to choose just like I protected my unit on the battlefield from my Apache helicopter.**
[**I just need your help to build a campaign that can get me to Congress, where I can make the biggest difference. Will you pitch in your first donation of $5?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68224565/422356024/-1733172345?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230816_fr_houck_cand_mf_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJhNWQ3ZC0wNjNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BHCR0JNx2YHzS3BaxHT6gPw2sXHtkZ2mZP7mHk_y890=)

clean_body: But the new Republican in the primary believes abortion should be completely banned, including for survivors of rape or incest. | = | | = She Wasn't Able to Get an Abortion. Now She's a Mom. Soon She'll Start 7th Grade. I'm the only pro-choice candidate in this race, and I need your help to win. = = Team, Monday's article from TIME gutted me. And so have the dozens of other stories of people who've suffered because anti-choice Republicans have cut off their access to abortion care. Now, there's another anti-choice Republican in the primary for PA-01. In fact, he's so anti-choice he declared on the radio that, "rape and incest is not a good excuse" for someone to get an abortion. It's a disgusting, callous belief that is exactly how you end up with 13 year olds being forced to give birth. Here's where I stand on abortion and your right to choose: I believe that access to abortion is essential to protecting the rights of women to freely participate in society. I believe you know best when it comes to your healthcare – not me or any politician. Everyone loves someone who has had an abortion. Nearly 1 in 4 women will have an abortion. It is not enough to restore Roe. We need to make sure everyone in this country, regardless of zip code or economic status, can access the full range of healthcare that they need – not just reproductive care, but all care. I am the only pro-choice candidate in this race, and you can trust me to protect your right to choose just like I protected my unit on the battlefield from my Apache helicopter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for being in this fight, Ashley Candidate for Pennsylvania's First Congressional District | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: Trump Train News
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing.

| **Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp5hbp35vvto9i2phevsvjefff9rcvgrsrnamggg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ieaoj4chh2bs) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange'reverse ATMs.'](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztofgp93okcfn4i8et9r5q1710m0oo9plrln77i8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ieaoj4chh2bs)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2p9rh47a2m4jtd2hahmts4qgel9hqh8df8r2ht8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c9ieaoj4chh2bs)**

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Another sensationalized post on social media from the NRA...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Contrary to what the NRA says, there can be a balance between the Second Amendment and commonsense laws to prevent gun violence.
#

See this?
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230817-1-30&t=1&akid=6368%2E3935704%2Eh7l81k)
Once again, the NRA is using harmful rhetoric on social media to instill fear in their supporters, inspiring them to take up arms against our nation and fellow citizens.
Contrary to what the NRA says, there **_can**_ be a balance between the Second Amendment and commonsense laws to prevent gun violence.
Gun safety is about ensuring that guns do not end up in the wrong hands. It’s about preventing a child from accidentally firing their parent’s gun. It’s about ensuring that a person with an intention to do harm to others can’t access an assault weapon.
The gun lobby has shown time and time again that they care more about their profits than public safety. To them, selling more guns is more important than keeping our communities safe from preventable gun violence.
It’s up to all of us to band together and fight back against the NRA. We can’t let their messages of fear drown out our movement of hope.
[**So please, will you make a contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us stand up to the NRA and their harmful rhetoric?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230817-1-30&t=2&akid=6368%2E3935704%2Eh7l81k)

name: VoteVets
subject: Rick Scott
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
A message to the GOP: We’re coming for you.
#
Derek,
We just released a new ad hitting Florida Senator Rick Scott for allowing Tommy Tuberville’s blockade on senior military promotions to continue. Watch it here:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-aug23-awol.oyPCjA&refcode=em230817-1-15&t=1&akid=15631%2E3013755%2E60VlGa)
It’s running for two weeks in Florida, part of our full court press to hold the GOP accountable for Tuberville’s actions.
This is the first ad we’ve run that hits another Republican Senator on this issue.
It’s a message to the entire GOP: We hold you responsible, too.
You might think you’re safe in your home state, letting Tuberville catch all the incoming over his blockade. But we know you’re just as responsible as he is. And soon, your constituents are going to know about it, too.
We’re ready to go after every Republican Senator — but that’s gonna take a lot of money. So if you can afford to support us, please:
**[Make your first $3 contribution to VoteVets and help us hold the GOP accountable. $3 will help us run this ad. $3 will help us widen our field of targets. And $3 will help us get these promotions moving.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-aug23-awol.oyPCjA&refcode=em230817-1-15&t=2&akid=15631%2E3013755%2E60VlGa)**

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: NPP welcomes Andrew Payne to the team; will lead Bucks/Montgomery county region
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
Welcome Andrew!
Graphic congratulating Rick Hicks and welcoming D'Angelo Virgo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/366954143_595251546143389_6290491614361997220_n.jpg]
NPP CEO Kadida Kenner is excited to announce the addition of Andrew Payne to the New Pennsylvania Project organizing team!
Andrew Payne is the new Regional Organizing Director for the Bucks/Montgomery region.
Andrew’s passion for advocating for those less fortunate comes from growing up in the rural south. This led Andrew to get into community organizing as a way to give back to communities that have given so much to him. He brings 8 years of community organizing ranging from voter registration work, campaign fundraising, and get out the vote efforts for various campaigns and organizations ranging from small city council races to the Biden campaign.
Meet our entire team: https://www.newpaproject.org/npp-team/ [https://www.newpaproject.org/npp-team/]
Upcoming Event
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/NPP%20eBlast%20v2.png]
The New Pennsylvania Project, in partnership with The Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights, as well as POWER Interfaith, will be hosting a FREE TO ATTEND community conversation on the current state of our federal judiciary on Wednesday, August 23rd from 6:00PM-8:00PM in Philadelphia.
This event will feature elected officials and will be MC'd by WHYY's Cherri Gregg.
Event Details
*
When:
Wednesday,
August
23rd
from
6:00PM-8:00PM
*
Where:
United
Lutheran
Seminary
(7301
Germantown
Ave,
Phila.,
PA
19119)
*
Light
refreshments
will
be
served
*
Free
and
open
to
the
public
To RSVP for this event, click here [https://forms.gle/7zdxYJV2zzF9VdnA7] .
Pictures from the Ground
We had an amazing time in Pittsburgh recently in Market Square at the 50 Years of Hip-Hop Celebration event. It was great to connect with the Steel City, enjoy some great music, and register some future voters! Also a shoutout to Mayor Ed Gainey and former state rep. Jake Wheatley (pictured middle) for their support!
Twitter screenshot promoting NPP's Social Media Giving Day fundraiser [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Instagram%20Post%20Square%20%282160%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29_4.png]
News You Can Use
Election 2023: A Look At The PA Supreme Court Contest [https://www.politicspa.com/election-2023-a-look-at-the-pa-supreme-court-contest/124451/]
(PoliticsPA)
Democrat Dan McCaffery and Republican Carolyn Carluccio will vie for the spot, vacated by the passing of former Chief Justice Max Baer. The winner of the contest will not change the majority makeup of the seven-member court, as Democrats currently hold four of the six seats.
A Pennsylvania study suggests links between fracking and asthma, lymphoma in children [https://apnews.com/article/fracking-pennsylvania-health-environment-research-79dd7cfb9b3799e628b0c3667f30dcc4]
(Associated Press)
Children who lived closer to natural gas wells in heavily drilled western Pennsylvania were more likely to develop a relatively rare form of cancer, and nearby residents of all ages had an increased chance of severe asthma reactions, researchers said in reports released Tuesday evening. The taxpayer-funded research by the University of Pittsburgh adds to a body of evidence suggesting links between the gas industry and certain health problems.
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.
*
Regional
Organizing
Director
(Allegheny)
*
Community
Engagement
Associate
*
Part-Time:
Education
&
Engagement
Associate
(
via
c3
organization
New
PA
Project
Education
Fund
[https://newpaprojecteducationfund.org/index.php/eea/]
)
To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
PA ELECTION DATES:
Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]

Friend,
Two years ago, the world watched in horror as the Taliban stormed Afghanistan’s capital city of Kabul, following the withdrawal of American forces from the region.
Billions of dollars in weapons and equipment would soon be in the hands of terrorists.
Our Afghan allies were abandoned, left to fend for themselves, behind enemy lines.
**An entire region of the world had been destabilized.**
Biden’s disastrously planned and hastily executed withdrawal would go down as one of the biggest blunders in American history.
And it was completely avoidable, Friend.
[**Join me in sending a message to the White House – Biden’s botched withdrawal from Afghanistan WILL NOT be forgotten.**](https://u34881959.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Myp6d5sqCDL1-2F-2FdAOHe9PGoZr9pAaWrPznezd1-2FvdEn7YQ5SniiJc108vhmX-2BBPt9vbqHugjq16Kpm0yjmlDB6oFKNSFVeVuP18FCvNwfxcbfyzNo583QQd0I6zlcx0Twv0VqOUG09vMcQtnq2LdJ-2FJpHa6vwT-2BPOFQeQCxrrQdG5I04GogfhslyX62LjgRrWYOSCb7ugjeH-2F3xRluTE1g-3D-3Dy7NM_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc-2B6ov26ppsozpfesCsd2KAVkj02n-2FWbI6AJd1ee6qqhi4OyOKhzmRQsYvY3Xyf-2BivZ9QxBFhUL3xhRFis-2FEyySqKPwtwzmUJMja6YZYxn8gm314jdsK7oFLSHSgfUTH-2BECF-2B7HFl0L3S9eKSeChSmsvdPzOzVKp7J9eMpjqM-2B8-2BPp5afpfOXuzuTOVmQ9VJEi08r95dCc-2FUA-2BlPouN9h5mjf1boIxRw7IWrzdqTuT3l3Ol75DmHiKT-2FRKOCXLht7GadN9R8hYa-2Fn41rSXdTn2lT0NmaTJH-2B2oGIBCSNasik7GRGOUNDytg0R7rEfvjORAUrQ0HlDDbcZOXSAEH84aM1GFgtj0VrHs4If95-2Bvh942550qYEyFt-2FT6CoDxN9qGXtEsjtB7KHgGA9mtYqB8Wd4ea2X-2FLYWQ-2BNMICqLorfy-2F39slZ7be19ySjcc4PyigJyG2zHTuIOzPyB5dwUjklp3BU-2Fu7Pje5XJUyUFH5gMsHeu8F5HlxYGsl8pcj1FtYoIlz-2BbKMkMXy-2BIZ9bY6sgtEM5FX0UOH6S5VkisyS-2B2Q1PtcPEqZ10m7TCIAnaSVgj61-2FXuG8xr6HJkpAHif3dcwvN8kbNuN8KFNhW28psRAW8fHejJgcgJyL17Dn-2FIEDVTO6CHB4PVnPsM8Bj6mb1GgmywjnmDFr41xkyPd2cdi-2F0WyV4c15Srvv-2B-2Bha39JJjyRyMqi-2Fet-2Bl4oqAxKygwmUULh90qu55vTyWUEx1swLu2fwP7AHqbesSxmtDGjQ3eIZC9Uf7LlV2Kd0ko4HXn3BaADbzYPFCspZ1ofdU7ALROU-2F6AZ-2BMv4-2BrDjYa4gF1gpTxQlOVt7pxR0TrJo7E7ve4sQXBRweQz3JRQI3lcfBbOg3j6T-2BQgbIMrAw-2B55OWCg-3D-3D)

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Remembering the fall of Kabul Friend, Two years ago, the world watched in horror as the Taliban stormed Afghanistan’s capital city of Kabul, following the withdrawal of American forces from the region. Billions of dollars in weapons and equipment would soon be in the hands of terrorists. Our Afghan allies were abandoned, left to fend for themselves, behind enemy lines. An entire region of the world had been destabilized. Biden’s disastrously planned and hastily executed withdrawal would go down as one of the biggest blunders in American history. And it was completely avoidable, Friend. | Thanks for your support, | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. name: Team DPVA
subject: our supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Something that we try to never take for granted at the DPVA is how incredible our supporters are. When we need help, you all show up. Whether it’s volunteering and knocking on doors, or something as simple as donating to one of our fundraising emails. Instead of focusing on making sure our children have every resource available, the GOP is shrieking about which bathroom a trans kid can use. Instead of making sure that every student has access to the best of the best in the classroom, the GOP is trying to ban books and rewrite the painful parts of American history.

|
---
Derek, Something that we try to never take for granted at the DPVA is how incredible our supporters are. When we need help, you all show up. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Not on my watch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Every day, Americans are faced with real issues that demand action.

But instead of proposing ideas that will actually help working people, Republicans have been advancing their out-of-touch, far-right agenda. Here are just a few of their recent big ideas:

* Passing tax breaks for giant corporations, proposed just weeks after they tried to cut vital programs that _millions_ of Americans rely on.
* Restricting the right to vote nationwide with the harshest anti-voting rights bill in decades.
* Making it illegal to get mifepristone -- a medication used for one of the most common methods of abortion -- in the mail, anywhere in the country.

I’ve got four words for them: **Not on my watch.**

I’m pushing back against MAGA Republicans to protect our basic freedoms and put our government on the side of working people, not just the rich and powerful. But we need a Democratic Senate to stop their extremist agenda and keep pushing our fight forward -- and that’s why I’m asking for your help.

**[If you can, will you split $5 or any amount between my campaign and the DSCC to defend the Senate and make our government work for working people?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230817-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230817-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=11656%2E9716520%2E8joIYd)**

Every day, I’m inspired by Americans fighting to demand change and a better future for their families and communities.

Nurses, teachers, baristas, and retail workers are striking for better working conditions. Organizers are working at the state level to protect abortion access. Millions of young people worldwide are demanding action on climate change to save our planet.

That’s the kind of energy we need right now -- and especially in our battle to defend the Senate. We can’t make the kind of big, structural reforms we need unless we have a grassroots movement fighting side-by-side with Democratic leaders. That’s why I’m asking for your help -- _today._

**[Will you split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC today to help reach our midnight fundraising goal? Your support will help defend our Democratic majority, power our re-election campaign, and show that supporters in Pennsylvania and across the country believe in the plans we’re fighting for.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230817-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230817-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=11656%2E9716520%2E8joIYd)**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230817-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem3-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230817-ElizabethWarren-WarrenTandem3-Pros-sl1&akid=11656%2E9716520%2E8joIYd)

## Ayotte Demands Dem Rival’s Answer on Sanctuary Cities
---
| | By: Matthew Medsger[August 17, 2023](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f3Oe3CQSQ/c?w=UjiFZIsUmhkYTSWehGSo9I4FDF2vECO4IsUrKYFA9yE.)
---
| | Despite the fact the New Hampshire primary must be held before either of them starts running for governor in earnest, it’s clear from her messaging that former U.S. Senator Kelly Ayotte has zeroed in on Manchester Mayor Joyce Craig as her most likely 2024 rival. On Wednesday, Ayotte issued a statement demanding to know Craig’s stance on so-called sanctuary cities while pointing south toward the Bay State, where Gov. Maura Healey recently [declared a state of emergency](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f3Oe3CQSQ/c?w=IrJyhUW2OEhaAM2NIXwmIPyb5Ck3YkrkV46ijy7oPPQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYm9zdG9uaGVyYWxkLmNvbS8yMDIzLzA4LzA4L2dvdi1oZWFsZXktdG8tYW5ub3VuY2UtYWN0aW9uLW9uLW1hc3NhY2h1c2V0dHMtZW1lcmdlbmN5LXNoZWx0ZXItc3lzdGVtLyIsInIiOiJmYzcwYzFjOS0xY2M3LTQ4M2EtOWYwNi1iYjY0ODdmZjEyM2IiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ) existed due to an influx of migrants. “Like her Massachusetts Mentor Maura Healey, Joyce Craig has supported radical immigration policies like Sanctuary Cities,” Ayotte said. “Our neighbors are being forced to pay millions for services for illegal immigrants and they are even being asked to house illegals in their private homes. New Hampshire residents deserve to know: Does Joyce Craig still support these disastrous sanctuary policies after the damage caused in Massachusetts?” Ayotte’s campaign went on to cite testimony which Craig delivered to the New Hampshire House in May, explaining her opposition to a proposed state law banning cities and towns from adopting a “sanctuary city policy,” and reference Healey’s July endorsement of the Mayor. Ayotte also mentioned Craig in several social media posts Wednesday. Manchester Mayor Joyce Craig is running for Governor in New Hampshire. Craig is polling ahead of rival Democrats but behind Republican former U.S. Sen. Kelly Ayotte. Ayotte’s targeting of Craig comes following a recent survey by [Emerson College](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/f3Oe3CQSQ/c?w=ujP5SmvqZokBuQ6MnyRa8Q4EJRJ_LEVkz46qWRg6fb8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9lbWVyc29uY29sbGVnZXBvbGxpbmcuY29tL25ldy1oYW1wc2hpcmUtMjAyNC1kZXNhbnRpcy1mYWRlcy10cnVtcC1tYWludGFpbnMtbGVhZC1pbi1wcmltYXJ5LyIsInIiOiJmYzcwYzFjOS0xY2M3LTQ4M2EtOWYwNi1iYjY0ODdmZjEyM2IiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyYjA4ZTcwMy1hNjI3LTQ2ZjMtYmU4YS01ZDU2NTQ0MjYyMDIifQ) showing the first woman elected as the Queen City’s mayor just nine points behind Ayotte in a hypothetical matchup, with 17% of polled Granite State registered voters undecided. Craig still has to face New Hampshire Executive Councilor Cinde Warmington in their party’s primary. Emerson’s poll showed 30% of left leaning voters behind Craig, twice Warmington’s 15%, though half of surveyed Democrats said they aren’t sure yet. Ayotte leads former New Hampshire Senate President Chuck Morse 45% to 9%, with former Hillsborough County Treasurer Robert Burns at 3% and 35% unsure.
---

But when I went over our numbers from last month, I noticed something: **we don't have as many[monthly recurring donors](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68229017/422371439/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.17_b1_ctvta_all&amount=10&recurring=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM5Njk5NzgtMGQzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o2C_NeP1DImfL3uEN-MlWH4qWF3n6DNSkg9goRhWpWY=) as we should at this point in the campaign.** Recurring donations are critical because they allow us to plan ahead and make a budget for our campaign **–** so having less than we should isn't good news.

**That might have you wondering how much of a difference a recurring donation can make, so I ran the numbers for you:**
* $3 a month through Election Day totals $45, which could help us print literature for our volunteers when they are knocking on doors!
* $10 a month totals $150 by Election Day, which is enough to do things like run digital ads to get our message out.
