clean_body: = Team – As Andrei's finance director, I’m always reviewing our fundraising numbers to ensure we have the resources needed to win this election. But when I went over our numbers from last month, I noticed something: we don't have as many= as we should at this point in the campaign. Recurring donations are critical because they allow us to plan ahead and make a budget for our campaign – so having less than we should isn't good news. Andrei doesn't take donations from corporate PACs, so our campaign relies on our grassroots recurring donors to sustain our campaign for the long haul. When you start a recurring contribution, you're helping us prepare for the tough campaign we have ahead. That might have you wondering how much of a difference a recurring donation can make, so I ran the numbers for you: $3 a month through Election Day totals $45, which could help us print literature for our volunteers when they are knocking on doors! $10 a month totals $150 by Election Day, which is enough to do things like run digital ads to get our message out. If you donate using the buttons below, your monthly recurring donation will end by Election Day 2024 >>> | **= = =** Your support is critical in our fight to flip AZ-01 blue, and making a recurring contribution today will make a huge impact on Andrei’s grassroots campaign. – Caragan Finance Director Andrei for Arizona P.S. After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. Chuck Grassley | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** August 17, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)
**Round 8 Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid to Debate**
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released the eighth ad in a ten-part video series highlighting why Donald Trump is afraid to commit to the first Republican National Committee (RNC) debate on August 23rd.
Round Eight takes Trump to task for his checkered business career and series of bankruptcies. Fiscal responsibility has not been a strong suit for Trump - he added $6 trillion to the federal debt and his businesses filed for bankruptcy [multiple times](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=6515496f73&e=d0a9afa930). During this campaign, Trump has faced allegations of [swindling](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=b28075c5cf&e=d0a9afa930) donors by using their hard earned money to cover his mounting legal fees.
The underlying message behind the digital campaign is clear: Donald Trump is afraid to debate because he knows that Governor Christie will bring the fight directly to him. Unlike the other candidates in the race, Governor Christie is not afraid to prosecute his failures and disqualifying behavior.
**Round 8: Bankrupt**

body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fc2dcb07787d/breaking-fbi-put-spy-inside-disabled-marines-legal-defense-team-11855842?e=8edd2b8f7d)

**JOE, HUNTER AND JAMES BIDEN CONVICTED OF FELONY CRIMES BEFORE CITIZENS COURT**
Sentencing to Occur Tuesday, August 29, 2023 At 12:00 P.M. Eastern | 9:00 A.M. Pacific **(Press conference at 12:00 P.M. Eastern on Thursday, August 17, 2023 on Freedom Watch, Inc’s YouTube Channel)******
(Boise, Idaho, August 17, 2023) Today, the Citizens Prosecutor, Larry Klayman, the General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc., announced that a Citizens Judge, Michael Pendleton, has handed down the first felony convictions of Joe, Hunter and James Biden, with regard to various criminal charges that were returned by a Citizens Grand Jury on October 14, 2021. The felony charges and convictions of Joe Biden concern negligent homicide over his actions in Afghanistan that resulted in the deaths of 13 American servicemen and Afghan allies including their young children, his accepting of bribes, and the commission of other enumerated felonies with regard to a money laundering scheme to enrich Joe Biden and his family carried about by Hunter and James Biden. Hunter and James Biden were also convicted as part of this racketeering scheme.
Prior to the trial which led to their convictions, Joe, Hunter and James Biden were notified of their right to appear, plead guilty, not guilty or nolo contendere, as well as appear at trial to defend themselves, through counsel or pro se. Apparently, having no respect for the legal authority and rights of the America people, neither they nor their legal counsel appeared at any time, and thus they were tried in absentia. At the sentencing of the Bidens, scheduled for August 29, 2023, they will again be accorded a final opportunity to appear and defend themselves, but given their apparent contempt, arrogance and lawlessness toward the people of the United States, this is not likely.
The power and authority of the American people to enforce not just man’s law, but the law of nature and nature’s God, as enumerated in our Declaration of Independence, is sacrosanct. Indeed, a primary reason to declare independence on July 4, 1776, was triggered by King George III and the British monarchy, when they took away from the colonies our criminal justice system, which was sent back to his Court of St. James in London.
In the landmark Supreme Court case of Williams vs. United States, 504 U.S. 36 (1992), Justice Antonin Scalia, writing for the majority, ruled that the grand jury and thus the criminal process belongs to the American people and not exclusively to the three branches of government. Thus, this right exists side by side with establishment grand juries administered by the U.S. Justice Department.
Given the two tiered, selective prosecution, discriminatory, dishonest and totally corrupt current state of the U. S. Justice Department and its Federal Bureau of Investigation under the “leadership” of Attorney General Merrick Garland and FBI Director Christopher Wray, which under Joe Biden has been weaponized as a virtual “Gestapo” against all those who oppose him, the Democrats and the left, including but hardly limited to the peaceful January 6, 2021 protesters, it was incumbent of the American people themselves, particularly given the lack of courage, if not compromised cowardliness Republicans and other government authorities, to hold the “Biden Crime Family” to account under the rule of law.
Larry Klayman, the Citizens Prosecutor, had this to say upon the issuance of the Bidens’ convictions which resulted from their trial in Boise, Idaho during the first week of July, 2022 and which continued thereafter. Go to [www.freedomwatchusa.org](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=86d508f2e2&e=8edd2b8f7d) for video excerpts of the trial:
“No one but the American people themselves will hold the “Biden Crime Family” to account for their crimes. The executive branch, in particular, of our current government, is corrupt and Republicans simply put on dog and pony shows on Capitol Hill, as “Rome burns,” with President Trump being wrongly indicted four times by rabid leftist Democrat prosecutors, but the Bidens allowed to roam free. This will not stand, and Joe, Hunter and James Biden will be sentenced for their crimes against the people of the United States and then it will be incumbent for them to surrender themselves or, if as expected they do not, it will be necessary for established law enforcement or the military to take them into custody for them to serve time in prison.”

**The Bidens’ sentencing will occur and be available to view at**[**www.freedomwatchusa.org**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=b52faa8d26&e=8edd2b8f7d)**on Zoom and YouTube at 12:00 P.M. Eastern | 10:00 A.M. Pacific Tuesday, August 29, 2023.**
**THE**[**CONVICTION RULING**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=3264166ba7&e=8edd2b8f7d)**OF THE CITIZENS JUDGE CAN BE FOUND AT**[**WWW.FREEDOMWATCHUSA.ORG**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=7648e81bdc&e=8edd2b8f7d)**.** **You may also contact Asher Anderson at**[**asher.andersonfw@gmail.com**](mailto:asher.andersonfw@gmail.com)**for more information.**
| | | _Copyright (C) 2023 Freedom Watch, Inc.. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Freedom Watch, Inc.7050 W Palmetto Park Rd # 15-264Boca Raton, FL 33433-3426
[Add us to your address book](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=b84e72bd5e)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aa11a998a4141febd3553fb6c2e5445&_e=jfCNmDeZ-psCQsoE3NBdcUyuEB-nyAK7z0hOSfGepWNwrjKfJOuW7DVgWKaF-R1TxVRtqAhZ3wtAOUPlPmfz-37ASDUb-9UoDGVv9cmbzrE6pouhf4QSRrAcHCrvFwoerVnI2_yoyMiEl_DIOX0PzKgbi_hIlB3rAnPVija9aHiQ6DlW4ftteZNlO9zcmG6tj-Dhy5aGkMmk-iwx0q9Ol2zM8ONEuNQRmLJxiwl9pUvj_i4E8_0pg-Be3AoGWFam9tK668jDo8t4REoNMznxHpwI47CxTFuzBOkRbkHoBDm4i26xI9ZeQnJCbbDD-KWZp56ntljy-RXGh86-04sg45nBneeoLqxPIt-tN_7R3I4GuVc7ZF00-ajpQwcNqNXq6-COiY1XPYL1kpfL9ZfGxA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.

clean_body: | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America. I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will NEVER hear me say... ... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country. As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen. Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed. But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees." The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition? When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into. I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down. But the Deep State made one massive mistake ... ...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take me down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well. | Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before. Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have trumped the special interest globalist donors. So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION. We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts. We will win back the White House. We will save America from tyranny. And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 (If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!) But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. clean_body: And Raffensperger is purging nearly 200,000 voter registrations! | | | Ahead of the 2024 presidential election, Brad Raffensperger is moving to remove nearly TWO HUNDRED THOUSAND voters from the voter rolls. Not only that, but it was reported that GOP activists in Georgia brought baseless vigilante challenges to the eligibility of nearly 100,000 voters, and MAGA activists are continuing to challenge voters every single day. Joe Biden won Georgia by less than 12,000 votes, 0.23% of the votes cast – this voter purge could affect the results of the 2024 election! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Every cent that you give today will help us protect Georgians’ right to vote, help us reach voters potentially affected by Raffensperger’s purge, and make sure voters know when, where, and how to cast their ballots. subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e7d8337ac5014d51abf6dfc5b930dc9d&_e=jIy2an9lPTjpcv716vMP3PVfVPgdkecvruekx3xZDqpf7RW89zcLGDXUIhb4vZufJL8kahmNb0EPUfr8gAo_WREvu_J9NOKXOMdfFZS2FUYa-NTCW6yrPkcMtGj61rDBrWbLossP85ZzRaKNoXnWvc7IzCyjqllAwokR6xYrrdbtILkKxvNYql2Kl6fySJhkI2C9YGzOJa1iLUN5zkQgFzDTYp16wojumYbTyJKSs-qCENVu6BZBzOClc_CcARTCaUdYro7INDpuaLARTlbpiQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e7d8337ac5014d51abf6dfc5b930dc9d&_e=jIy2an9lPTjpcv716vMP3PVfVPgdkecvruekx3xZDqpf7RW89zcLGDXUIhb4vZufJL8kahmNb0EPUfr8gAo_WREvu_J9NOKXOMdfFZS2FUYa-NTCW6yrPkcMtGj61rDB-8GP8-cS3Wi1EUJgaofi3wJU_AG6YuJGjUCoQGyv11TK7aLRdOB3wG5SI1kg9XGv2HCFzBMtVmG7bmQ7y4IQbmKDzebuRnIYmlxcqy5qAJ4UjBbpMgMJXyuu9QiXtLUvfAzgogL0XNaqPvosNfvBsA%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e7d8337ac5014d51abf6dfc5b930dc9d&_e=jIy2an9lPTjpcv716vMP3PVfVPgdkecvruekx3xZDqpf7RW89zcLGDXUIhb4vZufJL8kahmNb0EPUfr8gAo_WREvu_J9NOKXOMdfFZS2FUYa-NTCW6yrPkcMtGj61rDB8_cx-vn2hRQoTGRHMlgKB3ssHVZMPW0f6P6q_jqTWl-37MvTcbwoTEbcs3WBjusyikqnWjF80L5TpcBNFGTaCNWsf8V2pacfHkNFYEcN2LjTpX5ehs7Fs5iQ10wOjRHuWKPh6o0ZnDwa0fwwbpEsDA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e7d8337ac5014d51abf6dfc5b930dc9d&_e=jIy2an9lPTjpcv716vMP3PVfVPgdkecvruekx3xZDqpf7RW89zcLGDXUIhb4vZufJL8kahmNb0EPUfr8gAo_WREvu_J9NOKXOMdfFZS2FUYa-NTCW6yrPkcMtGj61rDBsKY0Hdn1aYHwHWw4t25BzMLPPJty_nDIZzMDdheMzU_Jez5pn41bnV4Pl4Pu_RQLMb3hLNLTtsN6vrN-CreYl_olbFs66c807y2TWIhAeh1lk6FM_nMyJ-DU45FNlj6ut5qR7LtS1pqex2gMKL0UGA%3D%3D)

| | It's almost that time of year again, my friend... _**The back-to-school season is here!**_ Brad and Jackie have been busy helping their kids get ready for the upcoming school year. As a parent, Brad knows how important the quality of our education system is to families across Minnesota and America. To him, education isn't about politics. It's about empowering students, parents, and teachers to help our children achieve their goals. With the school year right around the corner, [will you take our **BACK TO SCHOOL SURVEY**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=7c9f008bd5564bd9a790b04c66ac467e&_e=RAanZirzdSqMi58iA58FueH6P6IgV0jwMZZAswEJzgiGJpL1kIFGrzNYn-Oa6CPO4jAk6n00t6nDQqXznvWj65qmkzMQJYx4-Qq1zlR0DR2lZEEPJKWrAet1-Ixa1pqsqnG5Kkv6Yg2P-nRHxgTFDK4ARJyWuPfjptTTHyHbityx1cBYrTQZGf6if6uDmgffVxMAiYDtxMlXN0ff96CFSsJel96nda59RVF7EGaiptAklXjYNGM5g5Q5FijhmZ0m) and share with Brad your top priorities for the 2023-2024 school year?

Right now, I’m our best bet at beating Tim Kaine, the 30 year politician.

The establishment knows that - and now, they’re doing everything they can to bring us down.

_But with one of the strongest grassroots teams in the game, we can make sure they don_ ’ _t get far._

**I** ’**m not going to lie, we need to get all hands on deck early to prepare for the barrage of attacks that I know are coming.**

They want to paint me as an extremist just because I’m a proud conservative Christian who isn’t afraid to love this country.

Let me be clear: I’ve fought in some of the most dangerous corners of the world as a Navy Captain. I wasn’t afraid of going toe to toe with terrorists all around the world.

We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom made suits.

If we’re going to preserve our freedoms, we can’t be intimidated. We must be fearless.

**[It’s time to fight for the American greatness that lies within us. clean_body: | | | Peter, As one of our top supporters, I need you to know what’s coming on this campaign. Right now, I’m our best bet at beating Tim Kaine, the 30 year politician. The establishment knows that - and now, they’re doing everything they can to bring us down. But with one of the strongest grassroots teams in the game, we can make sure they don ’ t get far. I ’m not going to lie, we need to get all hands on deck early to prepare for the barrage of attacks that I know are coming. The Democrats are going to call us every single name in the book, Peter. They want to paint me as an extremist just because I’m a proud conservative Christian who isn’t afraid to love this country. Let me be clear: I’ve fought in some of the most dangerous corners of the world as a Navy Captain. I wasn’t afraid of going toe to toe with terrorists all around the world. I ’m CERTAINLY not afraid of the career politicians. Control of the U.S. Senate could come down to us, Peter. There’s too much on the line to back down, and I need you by my side. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | We need REAL fighters. Not politicians, not bureaucrats, and not keyboard warriors acting tough in custom made suits. If we’re going to preserve our freedoms, we can’t be intimidated. We must be fearless. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Jim Cantrell and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | PLEASE NOTE THAT DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS LAUNCHED A NEWSLETTER THAT IS AVAILABLE FOR FREE. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AT [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2_LXxTzCqIY2IDFab_d8bgWalym-uV5MdPDOchkkBpNaNuT_7S0wodrRYKq1C-9Plc-P1KBgVW2Uhd-LQfKvJMIKxfXQunZpJE6hr_pBHnFNGAXD4gXmpocQyRW-rDCu2clvNXB-JPYJiDpfVYG5O-5mIQ-ro9L&c=3OdUPTxSZ2qIIh9kXdZQJf1e5kcUKq-cbMHhdAOW3cssePGl7pEkLw==&ch=t9X1iwT-DYuFE6roasX--KIi5qczvNXmI7sVZzMb3HjD-fIIMSVkSg==). SUBSCRIBERS WILL HAVE ACCESS TO EVERY INTERVIEW DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS CONDUCTED OVER THE PAST 3 YEARS, EVERY ARTICLE HE'S WRITTEN OVER THE PAST 12 YEARS, AND A BUNCH OF OTHER INTERESTING CONTENT. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AND HELP US SPREAD THE WORD BY TELLING OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT.
---
# Jim Cantrell, Founder of Phantom Space
# and Co-Founder of SpaceX
---
In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Jim Cantrell, Founder of Phantom Space and a Co-Founder, along with Elon Musk, of SpaceX as well as the author of [BREAKING ALL THE RULES: THE INSIDE STORY OF THE NEW SPACE RACE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2_LXxTzCqIY2IDFab_d8bgWalym-uV5MdPDOchkkBpNaNuT_7S0wlKZKFA6TdXGIcLlL7y_aJU-eWDs2Z4FbLhqqlsgMcQ1V09P4tEjHe6wTRdCjVhPqKYznz5tDBcihdPMMIGM7TNsZAVMKggU5Q==&c=3OdUPTxSZ2qIIh9kXdZQJf1e5kcUKq-cbMHhdAOW3cssePGl7pEkLw==&ch=t9X1iwT-DYuFE6roasX--KIi5qczvNXmI7sVZzMb3HjD-fIIMSVkSg==). Jim shares the story of his fascinating career from working as an auto mechanic to becoming one of the leading entrepreneurs in the private space industry. Along the way, Jim has tried to secure former Soviet ICBMs and worked to protect his businesses from Chinese espionage. His advice for navigating uncertainty: don't shy from making a tough decision and always follow your passion.
Tune in to the conversation via the links below! A video of the interview is also available at [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2_LXxTzCqIY2IDFab_d8bgWalym-uV5MdPDOchkkBpNaNuT_7S0wodrRYKq1C-9Plc-P1KBgVW2Uhd-LQfKvJMIKxfXQunZpJE6hr_pBHnFNGAXD4gXmpocQyRW-rDCu2clvNXB-JPYJiDpfVYG5O-5mIQ-ro9L&c=3OdUPTxSZ2qIIh9kXdZQJf1e5kcUKq-cbMHhdAOW3cssePGl7pEkLw==&ch=t9X1iwT-DYuFE6roasX--KIi5qczvNXmI7sVZzMb3HjD-fIIMSVkSg==)
---
---
|
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2_LXxTzCqIY2IDFab_d8bgWalym-uV5MdPDOchkkBpNaNuT_7S0wgLD00V_aaDJTPUluNptWaljN0zUdmTycUW7NNfwqrxM9zyuxt5yOX1nEizTmTfpxFmhj0m7Pq7AXzwRIqowDR1dz-hCmWz-gQ==&c=3OdUPTxSZ2qIIh9kXdZQJf1e5kcUKq-cbMHhdAOW3cssePGl7pEkLw==&ch=t9X1iwT-DYuFE6roasX--KIi5qczvNXmI7sVZzMb3HjD-fIIMSVkSg==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To stay in touch with Dr. Mansharaman and to subscribe (for free) to his weekly newsletter, please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2_LXxTzCqIY2IDFab_d8bgWalym-uV5MdPDOchkkBpNaNuT_7S0wjlDCQ82nlhgQrNSDhtgnuN8rZ54g-__D4YF4wk-EPk1LhDHdD6EXHUx9kyf86hL5udCMGH5E5sFYZlux1Tjwr4sCi7jV_a5oPCLusaASGeE&c=3OdUPTxSZ2qIIh9kXdZQJf1e5kcUKq-cbMHhdAOW3cssePGl7pEkLw==&ch=t9X1iwT-DYuFE6roasX--KIi5qczvNXmI7sVZzMb3HjD-fIIMSVkSg==)

SUBSCRIBERS WILL HAVE ACCESS TO EVERY INTERVIEW DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS CONDUCTED OVER THE PAST 3 YEARS, EVERY ARTICLE HE'S WRITTEN OVER THE PAST 12 YEARS, AND A BUNCH OF OTHER INTERESTING CONTENT. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AND HELP US SPREAD THE WORD BY TELLING OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT. Jim Cantrell, Founder of Phantom Space and Co-Founder of SpaceX In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Jim Cantrell, Founder of Phantom Space and a Co-Founder, along with Elon Musk, of SpaceX as well as the author of ==. Jim shares the story of his fascinating career from working as an auto mechanic to becoming one of the leading entrepreneurs in the private space industry. Along the way, Jim has tried to secure former Soviet ICBMs and worked to protect his businesses from Chinese espionage. His advice for navigating uncertainty: don't shy from making a tough decision and always follow your passion. Tune in to the conversation via the links below! A video of the interview is also available at == | PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND! For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times! You'll find my conversations with Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. name: James Carville
subject: I’m worried folks don’t realize this about PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, let me tell ya:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)
I’ll get right to it, Peter:
**I think overlooking Pennsylvania in our battle to hold Democrats’ Senate majority is about as smart as a lead parachute.** Let me say more...
Listen, if you think Pennsylvania is a safe blue state, I envy ya! Personally, I sure can’t forget that Donald Trump won the Commonwealth on Election Night in 2016.
Now it’s true that we’ve had some big victories since then. But look closer under the hood, and you’ll see challenges like:
* Down-ballot Dems losing winnable races
* Razor-thin margins in rural counties
* A fight to turnout voters in hubs like Philadelphia

As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, including in the Keystone State, let me assure you: _Pennsylvania is as competitive a battleground as it ever was._
[**I’m urgently asking folks today: Will you chip in $5 or more to Bob Casey? We CANNOT take Pennsylvania’s Senate seat for granted!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230817-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230817-1&refcode2=461_552475_IV8uQC&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230817-1?refcode=em20230817-1&refcode2=461_552475_IV8uQC&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)**
Seriously — I’m worried folks don’t realize just how bad we need to gin up major grassroots resources to fight back tooth and nail in Pennsylvania.
Not only is this one of the most competitive races of 2024, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are recruiting a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can start spending HUGE sums of his own money the minute he jumps into the race.
(And don’t forget the GOP super PACs who will have this guy’s back and fund plenty of nasty attack ads against Bob...)
The fact is, Peter, if we don’t rally around Bob Casey early in this race, we’re toast. And truthfully I think we need to see a LOT more grassroots donations than we have to date.
[**So I’ll ask one more time: Will you ensure we don’t take Pennsylvania for granted and chip in $5 or any amount to defend Bob Casey and our blue Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230817-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230817-1&refcode2=461_552475_IV8uQC&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230817-1?refcode=em20230817-1&refcode2=461_552475_IV8uQC&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)**
Thanks for hearing me out,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230817-1?refcode=em20230817-1&refcode2=461_552475_IV8uQC&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)
James Carville

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=461%2E552475%2EIV8uQC)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

# **
Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying Realities!**
The purchasing power of the US dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the government's promises of financial stability crumble before your own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and[ **take immediate action to protect your wealth**.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjkFPhDAQhX9NuUHoAC09cFgleNDozcSTGdvCjmmXblvc7L83bDYevL73vpkPfXA0XwcmHxjAkUxiAKw5MIDzx8XH7ds_P5Vv7y_lWbz6bi_hkQHka7B_y_uRynokt6dyLMyAAmdrCjtwoQD6vpGqOA6y6-avWQjdzagUKNVJJVQ7C8Nr0xlZ0AA1NHXPJRe14LzSbd23KDiHxoKdO9bWt0cV8gvGuK6-0qsv3HDMOaSb0cRgcqFC5-xCeNJ2WZ3ZVwwmQwtldKVZncNYpmzRpTJE-kF93dFm2rL_TOsWtWXNePA2ksaJYsoMxN55a2jzrBlHnc090-gD0nL6R_QlF0UcTLiQc5SEZG293Oz16n8DAAD__8t9d8o) The solution lies in the timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception and **[take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjkFPhDAQhX9NuUHoAC09cFgleNDozcSTGdvCjmmXblvc7L83bDYevL73vpkPfXA0XwcmHxjAkUxiAKw5MIDzx8XH7ds_P5Vv7y_lWbz6bi_hkQHka7B_y_uRynokt6dyLMyAAmdrCjtwoQD6vpGqOA6y6-avWQjdzagUKNVJJVQ7C8Nr0xlZ0AA1NHXPJRe14LzSbd23KDiHxoKdO9bWt0cV8gvGuK6-0qsv3HDMOaSb0cRgcqFC5-xCeNJ2WZ3ZVwwmQwtldKVZncNYpmzRpTJE-kF93dFm2rL_TOsWtWXNePA2ksaJYsoMxN55a2jzrBlHnc090-gD0nL6R_QlF0UcTLiQc5SEZG293Oz16n8DAAD__8t9d8o)**

**The signs of the dollar's decline are impossible to ignore**. Inflation is soaring and the cost of everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term financial security. **It doesn 't stop there.** Amidst all the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order 14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's sinister attempt to **[end privacy as you know it by tracking and controlling your every financial move](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjkFPhDAQhX9NuUHoAC09cFgleNDozcSTGdvCjmmXblvc7L83bDYevL73vpkPfXA0XwcmHxjAkUxiAKw5MIDzx8XH7ds_P5Vv7y_lWbz6bi_hkQHka7B_y_uRynokt6dyLMyAAmdrCjtwoQD6vpGqOA6y6-avWQjdzagUKNVJJVQ7C8Nr0xlZ0AA1NHXPJRe14LzSbd23KDiHxoKdO9bWt0cV8gvGuK6-0qsv3HDMOaSb0cRgcqFC5-xCeNJ2WZ3ZVwwmQwtldKVZncNYpmzRpTJE-kF93dFm2rL_TOsWtWXNePA2ksaJYsoMxN55a2jzrBlHnc090-gD0nL6R_QlF0UcTLiQc5SEZG293Oz16n8DAAD__8t9d8o)**[.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjkFPhDAQhX9NuUHoAC09cFgleNDozcSTGdvCjmmXblvc7L83bDYevL73vpkPfXA0XwcmHxjAkUxiAKw5MIDzx8XH7ds_P5Vv7y_lWbz6bi_hkQHka7B_y_uRynokt6dyLMyAAmdrCjtwoQD6vpGqOA6y6-avWQjdzagUKNVJJVQ7C8Nr0xlZ0AA1NHXPJRe14LzSbd23KDiHxoKdO9bWt0cV8gvGuK6-0qsv3HDMOaSb0cRgcqFC5-xCeNJ2WZ3ZVwwmQwtldKVZncNYpmzRpTJE-kF93dFm2rL_TOsWtWXNePA2ksaJYsoMxN55a2jzrBlHnc090-gD0nL6R_QlF0UcTLiQc5SEZG293Oz16n8DAAD__8t9d8o)

**Imagine a world** where every aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded, scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital Dollar, **[as outlined in the Executive Order](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjkFPhDAQhX9NuUHoAC09cFgleNDozcSTGdvCjmmXblvc7L83bDYevL73vpkPfXA0XwcmHxjAkUxiAKw5MIDzx8XH7ds_P5Vv7y_lWbz6bi_hkQHka7B_y_uRynokt6dyLMyAAmdrCjtwoQD6vpGqOA6y6-avWQjdzagUKNVJJVQ7C8Nr0xlZ0AA1NHXPJRe14LzSbd23KDiHxoKdO9bWt0cV8gvGuK6-0qsv3HDMOaSb0cRgcqFC5-xCeNJ2WZ3ZVwwmQwtldKVZncNYpmzRpTJE-kF93dFm2rL_TOsWtWXNePA2ksaJYsoMxN55a2jzrBlHnc090-gD0nL6R_QlF0UcTLiQc5SEZG293Oz16n8DAAD__8t9d8o),** is portrayed under a sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds via our phones that are ironically under constant full surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence of your privacy. **It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to ignore.
**
**Your personal choices will no longer be yours to make.** The consequences are profound. The government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very essence of **[your personal freedom is at stake.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjkFPhDAQhX9NuUHoAC09cFgleNDozcSTGdvCjmmXblvc7L83bDYevL73vpkPfXA0XwcmHxjAkUxiAKw5MIDzx8XH7ds_P5Vv7y_lWbz6bi_hkQHka7B_y_uRynokt6dyLMyAAmdrCjtwoQD6vpGqOA6y6-avWQjdzagUKNVJJVQ7C8Nr0xlZ0AA1NHXPJRe14LzSbd23KDiHxoKdO9bWt0cV8gvGuK6-0qsv3HDMOaSb0cRgcqFC5-xCeNJ2WZ3ZVwwmQwtldKVZncNYpmzRpTJE-kF93dFm2rL_TOsWtWXNePA2ksaJYsoMxN55a2jzrBlHnc090-gD0nL6R_QlF0UcTLiQc5SEZG293Oz16n8DAAD__8t9d8o)** **[Act now with urgency](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxcjkFPhDAQhX9NuUHoAC09cFgleNDozcSTGdvCjmmXblvc7L83bDYevL73vpkPfXA0XwcmHxjAkUxiAKw5MIDzx8XH7ds_P5Vv7y_lWbz6bi_hkQHka7B_y_uRynokt6dyLMyAAmdrCjtwoQD6vpGqOA6y6-avWQjdzagUKNVJJVQ7C8Nr0xlZ0AA1NHXPJRe14LzSbd23KDiHxoKdO9bWt0cV8gvGuK6-0qsv3HDMOaSb0cRgcqFC5-xCeNJ2WZ3ZVwwmQwtldKVZncNYpmzRpTJE-kF93dFm2rL_TOsWtWXNePA2ksaJYsoMxN55a2jzrBlHnc090-gD0nL6R_QlF0UcTLiQc5SEZG293Oz16n8DAAD__8t9d8o)** to embark on a journey toward financial liberation where you not only Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.

| Today's stream features two special guests who are great examples of people that are invested in helping others: Nurse Erin Pein from In Home IVs Living Water. And then, Maria Crisler, a Clinical Scientist and Microbiology Specialist. Erin Pein shares her unique experience that resulted in the creation of a new business. She was a nurse at Stafford School District, and when she spoke out against the mask mandates in 2021, Erin was fired as a result. She now has her own business called In Home IVs Living Water, where she gives IVs to boost the immune system as well as other healthy injections. Maria Crisler goes over how, in this ever-expanding digital landscape, it is almost impossible to avoid electromagnetic waves that are constantly emitted by our phones, radios, Wi-Fi and other devices. CENTROPIX is a holistic wellness solution that can shield you from these waves so you can take control of your energy, your balance, your quality of life, and your future. [Learn more and save your spot here.](https://xtz223.keap-link002.com/v2/click/1b67e949012575b1106e1c6a19ad6c88/eJyNkc1uwjAQhN_FB06ExM6fEymqEEIognKo2nNk7AVciO06TluKePeaUHFqpZ5Wmv08o1mfkQPFlKsFKtGn-yIkRmNkgUsjQbmZVo7xYUvSBMd4jI5SHRZW9waV518f34GrjOOUjpE7GfDI89N0tqzXi2ZVr5eeNMz6jP_5REV295k_TusVulz-NIZWuvm79-5Q6WwP10ZC-lbuxR49v3fOdGUYdsB7CxOmQGg34boNd1y9eq4hSZgl25RmJA9oVuAgiRgNqMAi2BACjOKEioQ_9K5tOt1bDtXNZXRVWp_Wt9WbbbgWMEictYbJnapIRGK-Z9J-6JapzoeBcVKrkVRbjw_3bg5wqniGUwFpQbJom8Z-5mQjWI7zTRFRFqe-JzMGlPj5pCWcbm0v36S4mak=) Riley Gaines is a former University of Kentucky swimmer who stepped into the spotlight last year when she first spoke out against men competing in women’s sports. Gaines became a 12-time NCAA All-American swimmer and a five-time SEC champion. But last year, the integrity of her sport — and female sports as a whole — was called into question when University of Pennsylvania swimmer Lia Thomas, who had competed on the school’s men’s team his freshman, sophomore and junior years, began shattering records in the women’s category.
Riley can recall wondering why no one was standing up for her or for any women in the room when a man was awarded the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championships. This moment became her call to action: she felt compelled to defend and protect America’s daughters against the woke left and their gender-denying ideology. Riley has actively pursued her mission by speaking at events and making media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s sports and uphold vital truths. I spoke to Riley in our Common Ground podcast. Listen to her story HERE. Everything that Riley Gaines stands for is common sense. Click here to learn more about the 6th Annual Chairwoman's Reception that Riley will be headlining as the keynote speaker. Let's come together on September 19th to make a statement, to inspire change, and to take the reins of America's future. We look forward to standing with you. Until next time, Bill & The Common Sense Action Team

# [We Had A Town Hall With President Trump](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=136128635&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MTI4NjM1LCJpYXQiOjE2OTIyODg4ODUsImV4cCI6MTY5NDg4MDg4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.67X-FIJ3pzyKTOJRiP8rlkdrSYzJ-I3L_2cQR4-yjxc)
### He took questions from over 130 Freedom Caucus lawmakers
| | [Andy Roth](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b4a1ad1c-6f83-4035-861e-c50c65442129?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Aug 17| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b4a1ad1c-6f83-4035-861e-c50c65442129?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack..1dkOLLBZLUk4xaY_mtrj0HRLbt10jK6USakoGkBZf6Y?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=136128635&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MTI4NjM1LCJpYXQiOjE2OTIyODg4ODUsImV4cCI6MTY5NDg4MDg4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.67X-FIJ3pzyKTOJRiP8rlkdrSYzJ-I3L_2cQR4-yjxc)
---
Friends,
As you probably know, President Donald Trump was indicted for the fourth time on Tuesday evening by a radical leftist District Attorney in Georgia. What you probably didn't know is that he spend the afternoon before that news broke taking questions from our Freedom Caucuses.
That's right. We held an hour long Zoom call with President Trump in which he spoke to and took questions from 130+ lawmakers in our network from all 11 states. We gave each state a question and they grilled him on topics such as Operation Warp Speed, energy, the border, his associations with Lindsey Graham, and the plan to chase ballots in 2024. He called it "a privilege to address the State Freedom Caucus Network... a very important group of people."
[The National Pulse](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/634ced2a-7d70-4ae9-9329-f9f6473a897c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) wrote up a story with more details from our conversation with the president.
It was an honor to have him speak to the State Freedom Caucus lawmakers in our network and our members share the President's desire to take on the Deep State and restore our country's greatness. This is also the second town hall we have held with a presidential candidate after we [hosted](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/998c7a0c-cae3-49f6-a72c-dc0da2e29930?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Gov. Ron DeSantis back in June.
Republicans running for our nation's highest office understand that our members are critical to the success of the conservative movement in America, as well as a future GOP administration.
In addition, we had a very successful [Twitter Space](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c81ae6a6-3589-4385-87a0-898e34e7b095?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) yesterday afternoon on the American Library Association (ALA) with Riley Gaines, Tom Jones from American Accountability Foundation, as well as PAFC Chairwoman Rep. Dawn Keefer, WYFC Chairman Rep. John Bear, and SCFC member Rep. April Cromer. Nearly 600 people tuned in to hear us discuss our fight to stop the vast indoctrination regime the ALA is forcing on all of our children, which has only just begun.
We also recorded the hour long conversation with President Trump but in order to be able to view it, you must become a premium subscriber to the State Freedom Caucus Network on Substack. Your subscription will get you exclusive content, such as our podcast episodes and behind the scenes access to what Freedom Caucuses are doing around America.
All the proceeds go straight to our work taking on the radical left and RINO establishment all around America. Click below to become a premium subscriber and get access to our hour long conversation with President Trump.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.vYT7s_vjJBianB-JH-8ed-VM10sJxBXs0ZBSfxDjHag?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=136128635)

name: The Prickly Pear
subject: Fifth Circuit Says Lifetime Firearms Ban for Marijuana Users is Unconstitutional
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/8bfe6bf98abc9ad1/35693/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693)
---

| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/8bfe6bf98abc9ad1/becff474c1ebd714c3d6b838967d376c/35693)
---
|
---
**FEATURED ARTICLE**
---
[**Fifth Circuit Says Lifetime Firearms Ban for Marijuana Users is Unconstitutional**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/8bfe6bf98abc9ad1/4425c863f6e4bd32c3d6b838967d376c/35693 "Fifth Circuit Says Lifetime Firearms Ban for Marijuana Users is Unconstitutional")
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/8bfe6bf98abc9ad1/f3a6a719c241d117c3d6b838967d376c/35693)
---
In a recent landmark decision, the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals ruled that imposing a lifetime gun ban on marijuana users is unconstitutional. The case of US v. Daniels centered around Patrick Daniels, a Mississippi man who had been arrested and sentenced to prison for possessing firearms as an unlawful user of marijuana. The three-judge panel unanimously concluded [...] **[Read more...](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/8bfe6bf98abc9ad1/c512974b72bfe2eec3d6b838967d376c/35693 "Read more...")**

subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say

body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92aa96650636422eae51bbcacf44dfb0&_e=sEn9qlT109ggOJdTWisak5IIzZ6b1v9XsyAWVQAATUvy2u64PIRMVFWlFd9ck5wI6fREgU_709VEriN_BahP6hEQ8bYi14Raxm9LXawjmhZJB2-XGUWukfyG5AsGFgv21MDHUUt5pGSqlndP5kTZFsfc-cigYlOVOj3Axg3IfCr6whEIAg65mxpQ5cqEgc-Yn-3QSTvLivJvlyma2BNEfXLLwgoXjbTjkKZW1N8U5n4Y90GPwryODPp9F8XYFt6kX0BPYgbpFSfaSphYrCU7WmU4Rr7X3Y1Rd1u6C27m8K8P4_OqYDLHc0bB_r8bnks9uggdbHSrcpfVUDYskAYlJSO2PsjfCrxJmVUcwRFS7qKW4T_oMo6LJgo8xfwyHmvY9vCXa4K5SKmN1Fv2h3QgXw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there's one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would've existed.
But they didn't give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: "_I 'd rather die on my feet than live on my knees."_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn't realize that they wouldn't just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92aa96650636422eae51bbcacf44dfb0&_e=sEn9qlT109ggOJdTWisak5IIzZ6b1v9XsyAWVQAATUvy2u64PIRMVFWlFd9ck5wI6fREgU_709VEriN_BahP6hEQ8bYi14Raxm9LXawjmhZJB2-XGUWukfyG5AsGFgv21MDHUUt5pGSqlndP5kTZFsfc-cigYlOVOj3Axg3IfCr6whEIAg65mxpQ5cqEgc-Yn-3QSTvLivJvlyma2BNEfXLLwgoXjbTjkKZW1N8U5n4Y90GPwryODPp9F8XYFt6kRpqegkAmkDwuTpBEvRGsV41iwJ5xcrsY9n2x9PAhGzYwssDgodOs9ASvC6H-tUTDhY14_1zkA3Z-M7lLTA6eazjoUpTbpqB_O0b-d4aqcr0ZVvj-lKPoNMDHVJ582065_nLaaQL81zOrw--afIx3JQ%3D%3D)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92aa96650636422eae51bbcacf44dfb0&_e=sEn9qlT109ggOJdTWisak5IIzZ6b1v9XsyAWVQAATUvy2u64PIRMVFWlFd9ck5wI6fREgU_709VEriN_BahP6hEQ8bYi14Raxm9LXawjmhZJB2-XGUWukfyG5AsGFgv21MDHUUt5pGSqlndP5kTZFsfc-cigYlOVOj3Axg3IfCr6whEIAg65mxpQ5cqEgc-Yn-3QSTvLivJvlyma2BNEfXLLwgoXjbTjkKZW1N8U5n4Y90GPwryODPp9F8XYFt6kNT5N1KuYv85RvPEpDLzLcScQDfv1c1N2u2_2liKUZZYgLA7UD37kYWSjhYk524T7pQJYgfWetVIT0IRk71OLn8OQoFfMrbyAqYl4vQKxJD55PmbitW9RQKT06J00krxk1CHLWbisd9jiPoJhds9qtg%3D%3D)**

body:
HER Time PAC [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP46/1/102543/images/HerTimePrimary.png]
Hey Peter,

We fell just a bit short of our 500 contribution mid-quarter fundraising goal last night — but we extended our deadline by just 24 hours!

We’ve got another shot at raising what we need to fight back against the overwhelming attacks on abortion, support pro-choice candidates, and take back the House, but now we REALLY cannot afford to come up short.

I’m asking you personally if you’d be able to chip in any amount today to support our movement. I know we’ve asked a lot this week, but there’s too much on the line right now to not hit this goal.

Here’s a personal link for you to use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-aug2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-aug2023]

Thanks in advance!

— Katie

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It’s notable that Katie is the only candidate who does this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’re in this fight to get big money out of politics, root corruption out of Washington, and make our government work for everyone
Derek, it's Elizabeth Warren. When Katie Porter and I were studying consumer law, way before either of us got into politics, we kept coming back to one central question:
Why has the road to economic security gotten so steep and so rocky for hardworking people in America?
Well, here was the answer: Washington was only working well for those with money and power — for those who could hire armies of lobbyists and lawyers. Corruption, pure and simple.
So we’ve been fighting back. Fighting to put our government on the side of working people. Fighting to make sure government officials are making decisions with only one factor in mind: the public interest. Not their own pocketbooks. Not their special interest donors.
That fight brought us to elected office. That fight drives us to build campaigns from the grassroots level on up. And now that Katie is running to be California’s next U.S. senator (go Katie!), it’s notable that she’s the only candidate in the race who doesn’t take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Wall Street banks.
[**Neither do I. We both fundraise the same way: with grassroots support. So, Derek, can you please split a $5 contribution to support our campaigns today? Katie’s in a competitive primary, and we’re relying on grassroots support to keep up our fight for working families in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230817-1?refcode=EMAK17_1_EWA_20230817_V1_F&refcode2=28334_3422442_d-MvXN&akid=28334%2E3422442%2Ed-MvXN)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230817-1?refcode=EMAK17_1_EWA_20230817_V1_F&refcode2=28334_3422442_d-MvXN&akid=28334%2E3422442%2Ed-MvXN)
Katie and I have recently been working together in Washington to reign in Big Banks — introducing a bill to reinstate guardrails against collapses like the ones we saw earlier this year.
We’re in this fight to get big money out of politics, root corruption out of Washington, and make our government work for everyone — not just the ultra-wealthy and well-connected. And there’s so much more we can get done together.
I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for working people — and I get goosebumps thinking about what it’d be like to do this work alongside Katie in the Senate.
[**Can you split a donation of $5 or any amount between Katie Porter’s campaign and our re-election? The polls are tight in Katie’s race, so every donation, of any amount, truly makes a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230817-1?refcode=EMAK17_1_EWA_20230817_V1_F&refcode2=28334_3422442_d-MvXN&akid=28334%2E3422442%2Ed-MvXN)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230817-1?refcode=EMAK17_1_EWA_20230817_V1_F&refcode2=28334_3422442_d-MvXN&akid=28334%2E3422442%2Ed-MvXN)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230817-1?refcode=EMAK17_1_EWA_20230817_V1_F&t=1&refcode2=28334_3422442_d-MvXN&akid=28334%2E3422442%2Ed-MvXN)**

name: Cole Dougherty
subject: Message from Mad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
In Washington, Mad is a fierce defender of both our Constitution and our values, and she doesn’t back down from doing what is right – even in the face of GOP opposition. **** In Washington, Mad is a fierce defender of both the Constitution and our values, and she doesn’t back down from doing what is right – even in the face of GOP opposition.

_But if we don’t act now to defend the Philadelphia suburbs, Mad could be in trouble – along with our hopes of retaking the House majority._

Republicans are out-raising Democrats in the House, and we need to get serious about bridging the gap while there’s still time.

**We need 28 more supporters to step forward and make a donation to keep us on track.[Help Madeleine prepare for the coming attacks from Republicans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68236646/422398516/227784799?amount=25&refcode=08172023_md_midmonth_fr_2&refcode2=a3c9f79b-1a3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M5Zjc5Yi0xYTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jrxzqbF1aDG8qV2QEhhuaeyGaFlZZYMpFgvDOf6SqWQ=)**

Thanks for your consideration,

Cole
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. clean_body: In Washington, Mad is a fierce defender of both our Constitution and our values, and she doesn’t back down from doing what is right – even in the face of GOP opposition. ** In Washington, Mad is a fierce defender of both the Constitution and our values, and she doesn’t back down from doing what is right – even in the face of GOP opposition. But if we don’t act now to defend the Philadelphia suburbs, Mad could be in trouble – along with our hopes of retaking the House majority. Republicans are out-raising Democrats in the House, and we need to get serious about bridging the gap while there’s still time. We need 28 more supporters to step forward and make a donation to keep us on track.= Thanks for your consideration, Cole Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. clean_body: We can’t afford to lose track | | | Peter, we’re halfway through the month, and it is absolutely crucial that we hit our mid-month goal of $7,248 in order to stay on track with our fundraising. Election Day for the Primary is less than 7 months away, but it will come fast. We can’t afford to wait until the last minute to work. Early money is what allows us to get Michelle's message and vision of the American Dream for all in front of South Texans across TX-15. Every dollar goes to making sure that we have the tools and staff to put this plan into action and get a leader into office that will fight for us in Washington. This isn't just about a primary in 7 months—it's about defeating extremism in South Texas, taking back the house, and fighting for working families across the district. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Do you really, actually want a secure election?
body:
| | |
---
---
We believe it is the right and duty of American citizens to be involved in the process of election administration, particularly if you want to ensure that our elections are secure. [**National Poll Worker Recruitment Day**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) is next week on Wednesday, August 23rd. The left is really good at recruiting people to work the polls. While conservatives are getting much better about filling those positions, we are still playing catch up. **_Honest poll workers make or break election security._** Various states have different laws about if they are paid positions and how much, minimum age requirements, and so on. But the crux of it is the same in every state: without patriots like you sacrificing your time, the majority of the people watching the election are radical, biased, left-wing activists. We are talking about activists who don’t care about honesty, integrity, or transparency. They will do anything to win, and the only way to stop them is by making sure America-loving patriots are in the room as well. If you want to help, or you’re just curious and possibly interested, [**please fill out the form on this page**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and we will reach out to you to answer your questions and help you get signed up. Additionally, please help recruit your friends and family to fill these roles as well! It’s worth repeating: our country will never have secure elections without patriots like you stepping up to fill poll worker roles. Your country needs you – [**sign up today!**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.--krHDUe9mvKIA) In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin PS: You can sign up now and do not need to wait until August 23rd, and you can sign up after August 23rd as well. Making it a “day” is just a way the Election Assistance Commission brings attention to the need for poll workers.
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Exciting Update About LARA TRUMP Coming To Tulsa...
body:
Have Dinner w/Lara Trump In Tulsa In less than a month Lara Trump will be joining me at Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK for IGNITE 2023! IGNITE is an a
| | |
---
## Have Dinner w/Lara Trump In Tulsa
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.352.1.aef3b04bff0807890e4d6d96b68b24ed)
---
In less than a month **Lara Trump** will be joining me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.353.1.c12ec936467adde3acd18ab49a00058f) in Tulsa, OK for [IGNITE 2023](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.354.1.f4ccdad45e280a9e43fa61fd9dab6865)!
[IGNITE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.355.1.d82a17a7202c8a6e3b2a7c076fa0ddd9) is an annual conference at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.356.1.5b3985c2ae2dc1185a42f18bc4c8291b) with _powerful worship_ , _dynamic speakers_ and a _community of believers on fire for God_.
**Dates** : September 10-13
**Speakers** :
-Lara Trump
-Dr. Randy Caldwell
-Bishop Darrell Hines
-David Ring
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.357.1.c93bea43fd9a94a1fe7b065b7c972018) New Campus in Tulsa: 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
**Cost** : FREE
**Seating** : LIMITED
**RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/ignite23](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.358.1.2efcb00a1c80fb6f0cb4a386c22a7eae)
After the service at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.359.1.ebac8b70c4d526f99b8d714aebb1a075) on Sunday, September 10, there is a dinner event with Lara Trump that you can be apart of.
Get your ticket to have dinner with Lara Trump: [www.sheridan.church/ignite23](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.360.1.903a77262f54f962ed979e19e0538433)
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.361.1.5210ad4febb943a5a910974319a72dca)
---
| | [ Dinner w/Lara Trump ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.362.1.ac6478bb8e9fb194728a21d940f3be57)
---
---
## Sheridan.Church Tulsa Is MOVING!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.363.1.df6a3c60fc9afa39b4de2f5d60ad86c2)
---
The last three years have been more than interesting...
In the midst of all the craziness, we have seen **tremendous growth** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.364.1.e8be3362948094fa3e76154e09e33431). We have currently maxed out our facility in Tulsa with two services every Sunday.
Last year, we were blessed to acquire 14 acres in South Tulsa but that did not solve our immediate need.
I am excited to share with you that [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.365.1.4759645a43efba06bd4aeb2a77776ee7) closed on the purchase of the historic **Caravan Nightclub** in Tulsa, OK.
Features of the new facility:
**-Auditorium will seat 700+**
**-Separate Kids & Youth Wing**
**-Over 400 parking spaces**
We are aiming to have our FIRST service there on Sunday, September 3 at 10am.
In order to do this we are needing to raise $130,000 to complete Phase 1 of the buildout to make the space functional.
I would like for you to pray and consider partnering with us to see this **incredible story of a former tavern becoming a tabernacle in Tulsa**.
You can watch this short video to see what the Caravan Nightclub looks like right now:[https://youtu.be/aq9FDBtTcvA](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.366.1.b4d37b40a1a2fcf58a49c3d2335d2119)
You can partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.367.1.349659334166e3a88cae9eba55331070) by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.368.1.25c04e6b731fdcf669e913c3ba431dd9)
I am very grateful for your support!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.369.1.e427cc847656b7d45547c7d16682882b), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.370.1.45c307fbf8c65321dcb06ec3ff06fc9f), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.371.1.af89bd0906ac5aea4d70d72017f23cbe), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.372.1.74d98efcff86fd15fb0c241fb48256c1), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.373.1.499a58a88c396f71da2e4132e324be7c), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.374.1.b614dacf29b2a0e84f35887653b4f58d)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.375.1.97cd186a4ecb60d590e94d103e093e57)
| | [ Help Turn A Club To A Church In Tulsa ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=831244.376.1.182ff9de6b9e82fc11bbc083a8bad8f5)

body:

Friend, **There is only a finite period of time to get things done as President. Two terms. Eight years. I plan to use every second working for the American people if I'm elected your next President.** Every morning when I wake up and see my three children, Madison, Mason, and Mamie, I'm reminded of what's at stake in this election. It's not our generation that we're fighting for, it's theirs. It shouldn't be a struggle to afford groceries, gas, or to buy a house, but under Joe Biden's leadership, it is.
* The price of a gallon of gas has risen 30 cents over the past month.

* The average sales price of a home rose more than 36% from the end of 2020 to the end of 2022.

* Interest rates rose once again just days ago, bringing them to their highest level in 22 years.

---
| | [HELP ME GET OUR COUNTRY BACK ON TRACK](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=4cb885f2dee943cc98553e4bcabe44f2&_e=kdcPR0cjNpy0mEH8JiAYcySBEc_149NSF33FFWmGVHUDzRVEyXmjeS93BS1oRo8yDbxrIOSK3ID3wiCmUcuRoCGJaIR_Dx2DSRrJ2C6Na7CsMwkz33MTrhApodUjsjVSK0yqq9dgTY8waBG7Z5aSYWWB47nXSWcmPUPjBzzfbkPPnf7h9idkW1gZsNm0lPJuOWIw8zVmbz7oGBjriQECTjCz0-JoF4aJ2j18XG1mbTjYjz7iiLjFKMq9mRI4saMGjF4VeiqMpXHhtrmYp4_-4Yi-hfaHwOQQNYcDDhMpqYsRgIvkePqPt-5lq6kj-_sd1wg5dbMrc8V7U1D-NlC-t9B4JzRdOJF7o_pXauoACmAac9eqRy6Nc-8L8MP8T5pcQ0hUMr6QrQiApdUvfgKqOeP_z_WSEZi39l0U6eFVwuLjmkuHjLfW9_HXRJN60UFn)
---
Here's my plan, Friend. We will lean in, and we will go on offense. The media won't be able to keep up with us and neither will the Left. We're going to repeal and reverse **_every one_** of Biden's disastrous economic policies that are making your life more difficult and making your groceries cost more.

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

name: Delegate Jazz Lewis
subject: Friends UPDATES - MD House Majority Whip Jazz Lewis Sent You His Newsletter!
body:
Find out what is coming next & what Delegate Lewis (LD- 24) has been up to!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|

Delegate Jazz Lewis Newsletter
Back To School Season & What Is Coming Next
News & updates From Delegate Jazz Lewis 8/17
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
Back To School Highlights What has Majority Whip Jazz Lewis been up to this summer?
---
| |
---
National Nights Out
---
| |
---|---
|
This month, Team Lewis visited National Nights Out hosted by Glenarden, Capitol Heights, and Fairwood. Delegate Lewis loved speaking with residents of District 24 about the communities and local initiatives that make our district so special.
| |
---
Glenarden Back to School & Transitional Youth Extravaganza
---
| |
---|---
|
Recently, Delegate Lewis joined the start of many 2023 back-to-school events, including the annual Glenarden Back to School & Transitional Youth Extravaganza hosted by the City of Glenarden. Giving out school supplies is always a joy and visiting each table to learn about the new opportunities available to our residents.
| |
---
Town Hall with Vice Chair Blegay, Team 24, State's Attorney Braveboy's Office
---
| |
---|---
|
In July, Delegate Lewis joined Prince George's County Council Vice Chair Blegay, the District 24 Delegation, and representatives from State's Attorney Braveboy's Office to talk about the issues most pertinent to residents in the northern part of the district including school maintenance and addressing youth crime.
| |
---
Greater Prince George's Business Roundtable
---
| |
---|---
|
Last month, Delegate Lewis joined the Prince George's County Business Roundtable to discuss our local economy and how it will be impacted by legislation passed in the 2023 legislative session.
| |
---
Farmer's Market Briefing with the Towne of Capitol Heights
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week, Delegate Lewis attended a meeting with the Town of Capitol Heights and the Capitol Market team to hear about their ideas for bringing healthy food as well as fresh produce to Capitol Heights through their signature pop-up farmer's market.
| |
---
| |
---
---
| |
---
Special Announcement
---
Delegate Lewis is hosting a virtual Town Hall this Friday, August 18th, from 5:30 pm - 7 pm via Zoom to discuss funding for a new P3 school in Fairwood. [The event memo is linked here,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_TVfTTYp7q9qBwfBFqmcU973ms7tkB38iT6z7iePAyJve9JXwO0k4yHKeRMXPJcRpBvu6l_6p09uo48T_Phwhsa8dvTCgdXknbaQ6UVMlXDweftI-d4NOIw3FBQy3wNQ-ymDWYpfUF3uS3eQbpmB1C1NsYbhSW4inG5kg56OhDB2tBGvqFSbH0okjoZNJyejXWbcr1AEk61Sob_bmiwbsf5vpN5-7OLWJwGjPEaFTLDbkq20YZySsIqKSEwTtlAgxMKTPDMP6EOnvgc3S8L9DuLCc2MJGIu9C_dik_UfMwurL7M1rsPCDg==&c=GtPaYultRnevRR9ASe2WaECf4lAgbzJq24IWeC2NBI-VsFMI1CM8PQ==&ch=5tyjxHTqEh5vStd5LmLi2G1-n_rexx0U4Z9XQua5c_imTfR8sL39LQ==) which includes the Zoom information.
