Looking forward to Summer What's coming next for Delegate Lewis and District 24?
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Fairwood P3 School Townhall
---
On Friday, August 18th, from 29th, from 5:30 pm - 7 pm, Delegate Lewis and the District 24 Delegation will join representatives from PGCPS and the Prince George's County School Board to discuss the newly secured funding for establishing a new P3 school in Fairwood. The event will take place at via Zoom and a memo with the event information is [linked here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_TVfTTYp7q9qBwfBFqmcU973ms7tkB38iT6z7iePAyJve9JXwO0k4yHKeRMXPJcRpBvu6l_6p09uo48T_Phwhsa8dvTCgdXknbaQ6UVMlXDweftI-d4NOIw3FBQy3wNQ-ymDWYpfUF3uS3eQbpmB1C1NsYbhSW4inG5kg56OhDB2tBGvqFSbH0okjoZNJyejXWbcr1AEk61Sob_bmiwbsf5vpN5-7OLWJwGjPEaFTLDbkq20YZySsIqKSEwTtlAgxMKTPDMP6EOnvgc3S8L9DuLCc2MJGIu9C_dik_UfMwurL7M1rsPCDg==&c=GtPaYultRnevRR9ASe2WaECf4lAgbzJq24IWeC2NBI-VsFMI1CM8PQ==&ch=5tyjxHTqEh5vStd5LmLi2G1-n_rexx0U4Z9XQua5c_imTfR8sL39LQ==).
---
| | |
---
| Prince George's County Government Minority Construction Industry Day
---
The Prince George's County Office of Central Services is planning a county-wide event called "Minority Construction Industry Day". This event will target all minority architectural firms, construction general contractors, and subcontractors located in Prince George's County. The event will profile upcoming construction projects for County agencies to include the Department of Corrections; Prince George's Community College; Police Department; Department of Social Services; Memorial Library System; Office of Central Services; M-NCPPC. The anticipated budget for these construction projects is over $150 Million. [Click here to register for the event.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_TVfTTYp7q9qBwfBFqmcU973ms7tkB38iT6z7iePAyJve9JXwO0k4yHKeRMXPJcRvbiRjUUrL8cQ0VwMaIPz-yTnjp1kRjjUVMNIEGBTnBm4VSQLNGYXVaVn1On8qVd2Fr9gr3BosIbEzoDryvxL60bO9byZStTxnz8JLgK8B6Y_ytaBxCbLKD9_GtOQZvL5qJTn2rH4OApqpzEr2UNRze-rlh9e1ZYolsc1KrqGcAWYEjoASca4FU77Sailo6uBIHj1aREVSQ1lZmJMgmrxZw==&c=GtPaYultRnevRR9ASe2WaECf4lAgbzJq24IWeC2NBI-VsFMI1CM8PQ==&ch=5tyjxHTqEh5vStd5LmLi2G1-n_rexx0U4Z9XQua5c_imTfR8sL39LQ==)
---
| | |
---
| Back To School Supplies & Vaccination Clinic \- City of Glenarden
---
On Saturday, August 26th, the City of Glenarden is partnering with Family and Medical Counseling Services, inc. to provide vaccinations and school supplies to District 24 residents. The event will take place at the Glenarden Municipal Center (8600 Glenarden Pkwy, Glenarden, MD 20706) and vaccinations will take place from 9 am to 12 pm.
---
| | |
---
| 28th Annual Hoops for Peace Community Violence Intervention Youth Summit
---
The 28th Annual Hoops for Peace Community Violence Intervention Youth Summit will occur at the Lake Arbor Community Center (10100 Lake Arbor Way, Bowie, MD 20721) on Saturday, August 26, 2023, from 9 am to 5 pm. This unique and empowering event will feature guest speakers, community leaders, community organizations, vendors, and more! Let's continue to work on violence prevention by changing lives and saving the lives of youth.
---
| | |
---
| Fairwood Music Festival
---
| On Sunday, August 27th, from 1 pm to 6 pm at Fairwood Community Park (12390 Fairwood Pkwy, Bowie, MD 20720), bring a lawn chair or blanket and enjoy a full day of free music the Fairwood Music Festival. Performances will include the Bowie State University Chorale; the Prince George's County Choral Society; the band Black History; the 8 Ohms Band; Marcus Johnson - Contemporary jazz keyboardist/pianist and composer.
---
| | |
---
| Gun Policy Reform and Violence Prevention Panel Discussion at Morgan State University
---
| Outside the district, Delegate Lewis is still making youth engagement a priority. On Thursday, September 28th, from 7:30 pm to 9:00pm, Delegate Lewis will participate in a Gun Violence Prevention panel at the Morgan State University. The panel will take place at the auditorium located in the University Student Center. Zeta Sigma Chapter of Phi Beta Sigma Fraternity Inc. and Gamma Chapter of Phi Beta Sigma, Inc. are partnering with the Morgan State University Counseling Center for the Discussion. Panelists will facilitate a discussion about gun violence within the black community. The discussion will highlight community concerns about this epidemic. Students, graduates, and community leaders in attendance will gain insight about how to implement change through their leadership roles.
---

---
| |
---

clean_body: Find out what is coming next & what Delegate Lewis (LD- 24) has been up to! | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | Delegate Jazz Lewis Newsletter Back To School Season & What Is Coming Next News & updates From Delegate Jazz Lewis 8/17 | | | | | | Back To School Highlights What has Majority Whip Jazz Lewis been up to this summer? | | National Nights Out | | ---|--- | This month, Team Lewis visited National Nights Out hosted by Glenarden, Capitol Heights, and Fairwood. Delegate Lewis loved speaking with residents of District 24 about the communities and local initiatives that make our district so special. | | Glenarden Back to School & Transitional Youth Extravaganza | | ---|--- | Recently, Delegate Lewis joined the start of many 2023 back-to-school events, including the annual Glenarden Back to School & Transitional Youth Extravaganza hosted by the City of Glenarden. Giving out school supplies is always a joy and visiting each table to learn about the new opportunities available to our residents. | | Town Hall with Vice Chair Blegay, Team 24, State's Attorney Braveboy's Office | | ---|--- | In July, Delegate Lewis joined Prince George's County Council Vice Chair Blegay, the District 24 Delegation, and representatives from State's Attorney Braveboy's Office to talk about the issues most pertinent to residents in the northern part of the district including school maintenance and addressing youth crime. | | Greater Prince George's Business Roundtable | | ---|--- | Last month, Delegate Lewis joined the Prince George's County Business Roundtable to discuss our local economy and how it will be impacted by legislation passed in the 2023 legislative session. | | Farmer's Market Briefing with the Towne of Capitol Heights | | ---|--- | Last week, Delegate Lewis attended a meeting with the Town of Capitol Heights and the Capitol Market team to hear about their ideas for bringing healthy food as well as fresh produce to Capitol Heights through their signature pop-up farmer's market. | | | | | | Special Announcement Delegate Lewis is hosting a virtual Town Hall this Friday, August 18th, from 5:30 pm - 7 pm via Zoom to discuss funding for a new P3 school in Fairwood. == which includes the Zoom information. | | Tools for you If you have casework for the office of Delegate Jazz Lewis. Please fill out the form below. | | == One of Delegate Lewis's top priorities is to make our government work for Marylanders. Our casework team is ready to assist constituents with problems relating to the state or county government. We will make every effort to answer in a timely manner. | | Join our Newsletter == for our email sign up form to share with friends or community members who want to hear the latest news from Delegate Jazz Lewis. | | | | | Looking forward to Summer What's coming next for Delegate Lewis and District 24? | | | | | Fairwood P3 School Townhall On Friday, August 18th, from 29th, from 5:30 pm - 7 pm, Delegate Lewis and the District 24 Delegation will join representatives from PGCPS and the Prince George's County School Board to discuss the newly secured funding for establishing a new P3 school in Fairwood. The event will take place at via Zoom and a memo with the event information is ==. | | | | Prince George's County Government Minority Construction Industry Day The Prince George's County Office of Central Services is planning a county-wide event called "Minority Construction Industry Day". This event will target all minority architectural firms, construction general contractors, and subcontractors located in Prince George's County. The event will profile upcoming construction projects for County agencies to include the Department of Corrections; Prince George's Community College; Police Department; Department of Social Services; Memorial Library System; Office of Central Services; M-NCPPC. The anticipated budget for these construction projects is over $150 Million. == | | | | Back To School Supplies & Vaccination Clinic \- City of Glenarden On Saturday, August 26th, the City of Glenarden is partnering with Family and Medical Counseling Services, inc. to provide vaccinations and school supplies to District 24 residents. The event will take place at the Glenarden Municipal Center (8600 Glenarden Pkwy, Glenarden, MD 20706) and vaccinations will take place from 9 am to 12 pm. | | | | 28th Annual Hoops for Peace Community Violence Intervention Youth Summit The 28th Annual Hoops for Peace Community Violence Intervention Youth Summit will occur at the Lake Arbor Community Center (10100 Lake Arbor Way, Bowie, MD 20721) on Saturday, August 26, 2023, from 9 am to 5 pm. This unique and empowering event will feature guest speakers, community leaders, community organizations, vendors, and more! Let's continue to work on violence prevention by changing lives and saving the lives of youth. | | | | Fairwood Music Festival | On Sunday, August 27th, from 1 pm to 6 pm at Fairwood Community Park (12390 Fairwood Pkwy, Bowie, MD 20720), bring a lawn chair or blanket and enjoy a full day of free music the Fairwood Music Festival. Performances will include the Bowie State University Chorale; the Prince George's County Choral Society; the band Black History; the 8 Ohms Band; Marcus Johnson - Contemporary jazz keyboardist/pianist and composer. | | | | Gun Policy Reform and Violence Prevention Panel Discussion at Morgan State University | Outside the district, Delegate Lewis is still making youth engagement a priority. On Thursday, September 28th, from 7:30 pm to 9:00pm, Delegate Lewis will participate in a Gun Violence Prevention panel at the Morgan State University. The panel will take place at the auditorium located in the University Student Center. Zeta Sigma Chapter of Phi Beta Sigma Fraternity Inc. and Gamma Chapter of Phi Beta Sigma, Inc. are partnering with the Morgan State University Counseling Center for the Discussion. Panelists will facilitate a discussion about gun violence within the black community. The discussion will highlight community concerns about this epidemic. Students, graduates, and community leaders in attendance will gain insight about how to implement change through their leadership roles. | | | | | Visit Delegate Lewis on Social Media to Stay Updated | | == == == | | | Maryland General Assembly | 350 House Office Building, 6 Bladen Street, Annapolis, MD 21401 | | Sent by mailto:jazz.lewis.district@house.state.md.us powered by

name: COURIER
subject: COURIER Newsroom in Georgia?
body:
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1409%2E120351%2EfyC8qG)
Peter —
In 2020, Georgia proved itself to be a key battleground state. In 2024, we expect it to be just as competitive — which is why we’re asking you today: ⬇️
Should COURIER open a newsroom in Georgia? Yes! No **[Take the poll ➡️](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/ga-newsroom-poll/?source=em-20230817&t=2&akid=1409%2E120351%2EfyC8qG)**
---
This week, Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis handed down Donald Trump’s _fourth_ indictment for his alleged actions in attempting to overturn the 2020 election.
Immediately after the charges were announced, we saw Fox News and the right-wing media ecosphere push a steady stream of misinformation designed to undermine the case against the former president.
**That’s where we come in.** We know that the best way to combat this dangerous misinformation is with trustworthy, fact-based, and accessible reporting that **directly counters** the false narratives and outright lies that Fox and other right-wing media outlets are peddling.
The stakes are high, Peter. In 2020, President Biden won the state by only 11,780 votes while Senators Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock won their races by just 1.2 and 2 percent respectively.
Our network of newsrooms in nine key battleground states are committed to neutralizing misinformation in the spaces where it typically thrives by delivering quality, fact-based journalism to the communities that need it the most.
But opening a newsroom isn’t easy. It takes time and resources to hire journalists and build a network of readers. And that’s why we’re asking you: [**Should we bring COURIER'S honest, fact-based journalism to the Peach State?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/ga-newsroom-poll/?refcode=&amount=5&akid=1409%2E120351%2EfyC8qG)
**[Take the poll ➡️](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/survey/ga-newsroom-poll/?source=em-20230817&t=3&akid=1409%2E120351%2EfyC8qG)**
Thank you for taking action,
The COURIER team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1409&t=4&refcode2=1409_120351_fyC8qG&akid=1409%2E120351%2EfyC8qG)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1409%2E120351%2EfyC8qG)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: One thing you will NEVER hear me say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=78ocPybF4WIdvNprEvQRlw&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
We are watching the ruling regime try to IMPRISON its opposition. Nothing like this has ever before happened in America.
I will continue to speak out against the disturbing downfall of our once great country - but there’s one thing you will _**NEVER**_ hear me say...
**... You will never hear me feel sorry for myself. You will never hear me lose hope in our country.**
_As dark as these days may be, our national history is filled with peaceful patriots who REFUSED to give up even during the toughest times imaginable._
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen.
Imagine if in 1775, the Founders decided that their mission was impossible and so they dropped to their knees and surrendered their noble quest for freedom. America never would’ve existed.
But they didn’t give up. Because they embodied that age-old adage: “ _I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”_
The truth is: nothing great in life ever comes easily - _and what could be greater than reclaiming our American Independence from a corrupt, self-serving regime that attempts to imprison its opposition?_
**When I chose to run against the ruling class as a complete political outsider, I knew what I was getting myself into.**
I knew that the Deep State would use the full weight of the federal government to try and take me down.
_But the Deep State made one massive mistake ..._
...They didn’t realize that they wouldn’t just have to take _me_ down, but the millions and millions of hardworking Americans who refuse to surrender our country as well.
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=78ocPybF4WIdvNprEvQRlw&sysid=1)
---
Thanks to YOU, our movement is stronger than ever before.
Together, we have defied every narrative, we have outsmarted the so-called experts, and we have _trumped_ the special interest globalist donors.
So, let me once again say to all our haters and enemies who want to put me BEHIND BARS for the rest of my life as an innocent man -_**I WILL NEVER SURRENDER OUR MISSION.**_
We will prevail against these vicious witch hunts.
We will win back the White House.
We will save America from tyranny.
And we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇺🇸
(If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people in the White House, then stop reading here. I hope you are now thoroughly inspired to go about your day and NEVER GIVE UP our mission to save America!)
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664945%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hWuEdCDXhw4XXQCsXGnOtg&sysid=1)**

subject: The desperate lies have started. . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid For and Approved by Scotty Moore, Republican, for State Representative, District 35
body:
If they will lie about this, what else will they lie about? | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/76a03711c57c/specialelection-9256676?e=5e611ce1ba)
---

: If you have recently received an email or text message from Erika Booth and her supporters, you have been lied to.
Her latest attack states that I support Critical Race Theory (CRT). This could not be further from the truth.
As a young student, I went to work for Campus Crusade for Christ, now known as Cru. Bill Bright founded this ministry for two reasons: to bring people to Jesus Christ and to fight communism in American universities.
My wife and I have travelled the world working to bring people to Jesus Christ - I will never run from that.
Erika Booth is now trying to win a political campaign by attacking my work bringing people to Jesus and stopping Communism in American universities. I think it is shameful. She should denounce this negative attack immediately.
The truth is I oppose Critical Race Theory (CRT). We must constantly be vigilant within our schools, our churches, and our governments to ensure that this indoctrination never occurs.
If Erika Booth and her supporters are willing to lie about my work to bring people to Jesus Christ - what else will they lie about to win your vote? Please research the facts and support us in this campaign. Follow us on our social media platforms, and chip in whatever contribution you can to help us get our message to the voters.
-SM

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; http://nextgenpac
body:
This is the biggest thing we’ve ever been a part of.
| Hey — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.

But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

**That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. **[We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and NextGen PAC today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68239311/422404247/-1006834806?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_NGP_20230817_FR_HoggSplit_0_3MO_NextGenPAC_NA_NA_HoggSplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUwZTk0ZC0xZjNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOUG3nENM2X2qrj0SGrb51AMNaaGapM4csTVgLQUZNQ=)** I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.

Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

**Let’s prove them wrong.** **[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with NextGen PAC today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68239312/422404258/-1006834806?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_NGP_20230817_FR_HoggSplit_0_3MO_NextGenPAC_NA_NA_HoggSplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUwZTk0ZC0xZjNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOUG3nENM2X2qrj0SGrb51AMNaaGapM4csTVgLQUZNQ=)** Let’s do this,

David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

Folks, the moment Donald Trump's handpicked Supreme Court Justices overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , MAGA Republicans wasted no time pushing a wave of extreme abortion bans and restrictions.

Since then, 21 states have enacted measures to ban or restrict abortion.

**If that wasn't enough, our MAGA opponent, Anthony D’Esposito, and House Republicans voted to block abortion protections nationwide—and even pushed extreme legislation that could _imprison doctors._**

The only way we can save abortion rights is if we work together to flip the House blue and elect more pro-choice Democrats who will codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. **It all starts with New York’s Kevin Thomas.**

Kevin spent his time in the State Senate fighting to protect reproductive freedom, and he proudly voted to codify _Roe_ into law here in New York. He’ll do it again in Washington. But we want to know if you’re all in to help him protect reproductive rights at the national level, friend.

**So tell us ASAP: Should Congress codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law?**
****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68239835/422405964/2127116325?refcode=ea.96eba781-1f3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.96eba781-1f3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmViYTc4MS0xZjNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gsbpqQyeFn7zIdrKCOi80rSLFQqYBzb-7hgVygHJEA8=&emci=b10dc139-793c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=96eba781-1f3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)****

clean_body: We need to know where you stand. | 🔴 LIVE POLL 🔴 | Should Congress codify Roe v. Wade into federal law? | ** Folks, the moment Donald Trump's handpicked Supreme Court Justices overturned Roe v. Wade , MAGA Republicans wasted no time pushing a wave of extreme abortion bans and restrictions. Since then, 21 states have enacted measures to ban or restrict abortion. If that wasn't enough, our MAGA opponent, Anthony D’Esposito, and House Republicans voted to block abortion protections nationwide—and even pushed extreme legislation that could imprison doctors. The only way we can save abortion rights is if we work together to flip the House blue and elect more pro-choice Democrats who will codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. It all starts with New York’s Kevin Thomas. Kevin spent his time in the State Senate fighting to protect reproductive freedom, and he proudly voted to codify Roe into law here in New York. He’ll do it again in Washington. But we want to know if you’re all in to help him protect reproductive rights at the national level, friend. So tell us ASAP: Should Congress codify Roe v. Wade into federal law? We appreciate your input, Team Thomas | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. He has devoted his career to protecting vulnerable New Yorkers, both in the courtroom and the State Senate. Peter,

$28 MILLION!!

That’s the combined total Democrats spent to keep West Virginia in Democrat hands the last time Joe Manchin was up for re-election in 2018!

**Despite President Trump carrying the state by over 40% POINTS in 2016,** the wave of Democrat money in 2018 was enough to deceive voters into voting for the Democrats, handing Chuck Schumer his Majority.

And Democrats are prepared to run the same strategy in 2024 because they know it works! _**Schumer’s already sitting on an $81 million war chest.**_

The amount of money Schumer and out-of-state Democrats are willing to spend makes West Virginia a TOSS-UP Senate race. [**We can’t repeat the same mistakes and allow Schumer to outraise us in this fight, that’s why I’m asking you to pitch in $10, $45, $50, or whatever you can right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3701c613a3414d0db9e7e58959e530fe&_e=j6ffmMp2VGSjJzQUtvoGph97yKxmi5R0_knEtNeTnSYraMg4yVxQQ-FWMZ2Bb03uC1qaXEmle0wUHU61vqojCVi0jy10iz3qkBpTRNMJN0VQLzbGHzVz0F9bKGDzyhw3mu-lI6-PAd_sS3DPiLuj8nlPMTG3Vv_K4dNh_WhpY6w9GWnfnxJPxtexqjak0qZrX7ivyfwNGvO6yA7lZtja-ICwqsvuwJY0WF6S_cYIx63Q2kYBdBdlQvCjUifZ-JY3mi4edTgp7oMOsTABx2bSOLnJvmlz01_s_q35LWmAlflUScWCUON2hRt0e6nZ9uHGbNXuctfDpDvyr_I3mkkZWjhoBUcLACMFe3FrYkZ2h1pvrgWgsaz2tZVJcXaBAPo7KBdUyP93FREHZ7jd1YUTGw%3D%3D)

Just because Trump won West Virginia in a landslide, does not mean we have this race in the bag. Schumer and every Democrat in the country know if they can outraise us and throw enough money into this race, they can buy this seat outright.

The good news is that we know the Senate Democrats’ game plan and our America First message is resonating with West Virginia voters. [**All we need is your support to match the Democrats dollar-for-dollar in this race to win back West Virginia and end Schumer’s catastrophic majority.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3701c613a3414d0db9e7e58959e530fe&_e=j6ffmMp2VGSjJzQUtvoGph97yKxmi5R0_knEtNeTnSYraMg4yVxQQ-FWMZ2Bb03uC1qaXEmle0wUHU61vqojCVi0jy10iz3qkBpTRNMJN0VQLzbGHzVz0F9bKGDzyhw3mu-lI6-PAd_sS3DPiLuj8nlPMTG3Vv_K4dNh_WhpY6w9GWnfnxJPxtexqjak0qZrX7ivyfwNGvO6yA7lZtja-ICwqsvuwJY0WF6S_cYIx63Q2kYBdBdlQvCjUifZ-JY3Q-Vr0u20rZm0ur4kkv2O7f_J9zBRlsswUF8KlUhOuDhS1Qaln16pCHFQNiXzwf26aAzOzMpjTPolFhEHMOFd4B1RDoUH9oma2ucFb6bjY2U7Fj-OAoUYHdsMwOk3j0v7rxaEYFZIysZVoc_CZ90C9Q%3D%3D)

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: James Carville
subject: Peter, I’ll give it to you straight!
body:
I needed to reach out directly:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2267bed-ea2f-43da-b4be-ad04c95a6a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21d76386-3d25-4543-98e8-abbb61e06cf5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’ve got a BIG problem in Nevada, Peter. Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate just launched his campaign to defeat Sen. Jacky Rosen – and according to analysts at FiveThirtyEight, this race is likely to decide Senate control. The GOP is going ALL IN on Jacky as a top target for defeat. I just got word that she needs to raise $10,000 by midnight to keep her reelection campaign on track to fight back against the GOP’s attacks – but she’s nowhere near close. [So I’ve got to ask you, Peter: Will you rush $10 or more right now – split between Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action – to make sure Jacky wins Nevada’s battleground race and defends our Demo](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba5154fa-e879-4141-9316-fbaf45be70f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c2f957d-1787-4473-b70e-c3842ad7ae24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Look, I’ll give it to you straight: Democrats barely won Nevada’s Senate race last year. After McConnell and his cronies flooded the race with over $55 million, his extremist candidate came within 7,928 votes of flipping that seat red – which is less than a single percentage point. Now, Jacky’s race is shaping up to be neck and neck, too. With The Washington Post calling her one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot this election AND a recent poll showing her already TWO POINTS DOWN, it’s going to be a tough race to win. Unless folks like you come through with the grassroots support Jacky needs to pull ahead, Democrats will likely lose Nevada AND the Senate. Facts are facts. [That’s why I’m urgently asking you to rush a split donation of $10 or more right now to make sure Jacky can keep both Nevada and the Senate blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83a7ec6b-5dfa-4858-8bc4-169739f0eacb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33afa158-65d9-475a-90c0-bcc34cf64a14/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4dd04010-f538-4ce9-b4b5-62b958729e2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te510b792-599f-4edb-a234-b6c6254b95e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad03d91a-a0f3-4700-bfaa-323d685df41c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | Thank you for stepping up. Let’s win this. James Carville
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_fr_90do_rosen_carville23081714?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc385499b-48d5-4f90-955c-44847aa35098/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=21afe43f-153c-4ddc-9b2e-b547b281c746&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=21afe43f-153c-4ddc-9b2e-b547b281c746&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: New Episode Alert: Exploring Art, Politics, and Media Bias 🎙️
body:
Peter No Doubt About It Podcast Episode 28 is live | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=dbe4ba379c&e=567664f14c)
Hey there podcast enthusiasts,

We're fired up to announce the [**latest episode of the No Doubt About It podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b9edb82358&e=567664f14c), hosted by Mark and Krysty Ronchetti, is now live and ready for your listening pleasure.
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cd3edbb0eb&e=567664f14c)
---
# WATCH EPISODE 28:
In this episode, we dive headfirst into some topics that will surely spark your interest. To kick things off, we explore the intriguing debate around supporting artists versus their platforms.
Krysty shares her firsthand experience from the Taylor Swift concert, igniting a conversation that delves into personal faith, individual choices, and their impact on our perceptions of entertainment.
| [WATCH EPISODE 28](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d3dc219ff2&e=567664f14c)
---
But that's not all - buckle up for a serious turn as we welcome a special guest, Mike Garofalo from Victory News. We shift our focus to the current economic landscape and the lacking leadership on the presidential front.

Join us as we dissect the eye-opening New York Times poll, revealing that **only a mere two percent of respondents believe the economy is in excellent shape.** Our analysis takes us through the policies contributing to rising inflation and interest rates, while drawing comparisons between the performances of Biden and Trump.
| [WATCH EPISODE 28](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0695839297&e=567664f14c)
---
And of course, we can't forget about the upcoming elections, prospective Republican candidates, and the intriguing role media bias plays in the world of politics.
Our conversation includes insights from Mike Garofalo on the Georgia case and the 65 Project, a group stirring the pot for attorneys representing Donald Trump.
| [WATCH EPISODE 28](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=77e133c120&e=567664f14c)
---
To catch this thought-provoking episode, simply tune in on your favorite podcast platform. Don't forget to hit that "like," "listen," and "subscribe" button to stay updated on all our future discussions. You can also catch video highlights and extended content on our YouTube channel - make sure to subscribe there too!
➡[**WATCH and SUBSCRIBE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=92bba921d2&e=567664f14c)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | **ENJOYING NO DOUBT ABOUT IT?**
---
If you've been enjoying our podcast and would like to show your support, please consider visiting our website at [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b0fa91d666&e=567664f14c).

Your financial support helps us continue delivering quality content and insightful conversations.
Thank you for being a part of our podcast community. Let's journey through these compelling topics together!
Krysty & Mark
|

8100 Wyoming Blvd NESTE M4, #171Albuquerque, NM 87113

You can [update your preferences](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=5638afc9c3) or [unsubscribe](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=5638afc9c3)

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Ron DeSantis' Super PAC released a memo with plans to come after me at the debate. We need your help to build our rapid response. | | Fellow American - I just got word that "Robot Ron" DeSantis and his Super PAC plan to come after me during next week's Presidential Debate. Fellow American, DeSantis is going to come out swinging. | | | ---|---|--- | | Fellow American, take a look at the memo the DeSantis Super PAC released today for yourself. The "hammer" is coming down, so we must be ready. I've been approaching debate prep in an unconventional manner, but we must be ready to respond to the attacks on debate night. I wouldn't ask if this wasn't important, Fellow American. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: A New Direction
subject: Christine Drazan Launches A New Direction
disclaimer_text: paid for and sent by: A New Direction
body:
Policies that will improve lives
---
| | | | | | |
---
Friend,

We are thrilled to announce the launch of an initiative that is set to reshape the landscape of our community - A New Direction by Christine Drazan. This organization embodies a vision of transformation, empowerment, and progress that aims to drive positive change.
---
|
---
| | | | | [](http://click.email.anewdirection-or.com/?qs=ca3e6a7f64479573392434bb589791e2bb61314f9baac0d37052e10d019a8030fc0e394d9827b2fd0844be99e58e762a60b3ae7053df6c16)
---
| A New Direction isn't just a name; it's a promise. As our state faces ongoing challenges and untapped opportunities, Christine Drazan recognized the ongoing need for innovative solutions and a new perspective.

With a deep-rooted commitment to fostering growth and collaboration, A New Direction aims to chart a course toward a brighter future for all.
---
| | | | [](http://click.email.anewdirection-or.com/?qs=ca3e6a7f64479573a4f7106bbcbf6afc044df0d8a86394ee3bfa59c8f928cf0bdcc433a3ef18296faf44d923e16cd9d34b4d70ca76bc12e8)
---
| A New Direction is dedicated to connecting Oregonians with each other to advance policies and ideas that make Oregon a safer, more affordable place to live and raise a family, strengthen checks and balances, improve transparency, empower Oregonians and support the next generation.
---
| | | | [](http://click.email.anewdirection-or.com/?qs=ca3e6a7f6447957352d0f144e79b347391794e15285f85dd7a41d0c67062729860c51aeaae5b035c6556ec52ad8e76ce01314dfde90f870b)
---
| | For too long, Oregon politicians have been left without accountability. A New Direction will be a megaphone for the people and policies that will help turn Oregon around.
---
| | | | [](http://click.email.anewdirection-or.com/?qs=ca3e6a7f644795732a107922b21009cbcc44e8f3529d73098b6d374551eea70502576c2413e4177cd068d680d382e37f83eefc28898c39fd)
---
| A New Direction proves Christine Drazan's commitment to change. This desire to keep trying to make a difference in our state has led to countless conversations with Oregonians who have faced real challenges under decades of One-Party Rule.

This organization is a way to amplify these voices against the status quo.
---
| | | | [](http://click.email.anewdirection-or.com/?qs=ca3e6a7f644795732eec0d8b2f3242efa202c070ce8ef5b270cec948c60e746c136172cfdac4ad42d7890e3df8df69901bf2f6fdf8a3e91a)
---
| We invite you to join us in this exciting endeavor as we embark on a journey of positive change. Your support and involvement will play a pivotal role in shaping the success of A New Direction.

Stay tuned for updates, events, and opportunities to get involved.
---
| | | | | | [](http://click.email.anewdirection-or.com/?qs=ca3e6a7f64479573f61f44dad8d8d01ff023ecbee3dc0f6fd1b8ef9734ec91fbb0261dbf974ba47a68bc46d0b5f06052c363795a62185dd5)
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Here’s How We Keep Elections Honest!
body:
Judicial Watch has successfully settled election lawsuits with Pennsylvania, Colorado, Indiana, Illinois, New York City, North Carolina, Kentucky, Florida, West Virginia and Missouri that have resulted in approximately 4.4 million names of ineligible voters being removed from voter rolls

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch has successfully settled election lawsuits with **Pennsylvania,** **Colorado,****Indiana,** **Illinois,** **New** **York** **City,** **North** **Carolina,** **Kentucky,** **Florida,** **West** **Virginia** **and****Missouri** that have resulted in approximately 4.4 million names of ineligible voters being removed from voter rolls, _an enormous achievement in preventing potential voter fraud_.
And our attorneys are now reviewing official election data to determine if other states are failing to follow federal election law. I _f it is determined that they are, we will take action_ _by first warning them of the violation and then, if necessary, sue them under the_ _applicable provisions of the**National Voter Registration Act.**_
**[That’s why I urge you to make a special contribution to Judicial Watch today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

The support of patriotic Americans, like you, makes all our work fighting for honest elections possible... _and I anticipate more investigations and lawsuits coming up soon_!

_As you know, at Judicial Watch we passionately believe that our elections should be_ _conducted honestly and by the letter of the law_.

**_That 's why we work so hard to ensure that state voter registration lists are accurately maintained in order to minimize voter fraud.
_**

We fight to make sure states follow federal election law, and make a reasonable effort to clean their voter lists between elections, because "dirty lists" increase opportunities for voter fraud!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

This is work the U.S. Department of Justice should be doing...but there has been no action from the politically-driven **Biden Justice Department,** which is run by appointees who are hostile to list maintenance and other election integrity efforts.

The fact is that the U.S. courts have become the "battleground of last resort" for the future of our elections.

_[backed by contributions from citizens across the nation](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580), **Judicial Watch** has emerged as the most effective_ _organization in the U.S. leading the legal fight for election integrity._

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

But leftist media and politicians, led by the Biden administration, are conducting a deeply cynical campaign to convince the American people that **Judicial Watch** -initiated investigations of potential voter registration/voter fraud connections are "bogus," "trivial" and "without legal merit."

_These efforts were on full display in the 2020 and 2022 elections_ , and continue to be part of the Left's attacks on state efforts to protect election safeguards as we approach 2024.

**_In fact, today concerned citizens who even discuss or refer to voter fraud are demonized as "racists" engaging in "voter suppression."
_**

These attacks won't slow down Judicial Watch...but with our caseload at a record high, and more election integrity investigations and lawsuits in the offing, **[we need your renewed support of our work!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Your tax-deductible contribution today is vital to enabling **Judicial Watch** continue to be the most successful and effective independent government watchdog in the country.

And even though the corrupt **Biden Justice Department** will neither investigate nor enforce all provisions of the **National Voter Registration Act..._Judicial Watch will_**!

And whether or not the media educates the American people about the threats to the integrity of our electoral system...** _Judicial Watch will_**!

**_Your vote and the lawful votes of fellow American citizens must not be canceled by illegal votes and other corruptions of our voting rights.
_**

I hope you will decide to give your support to Judicial Watch today, and help us fight for you and the rule of law!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64653&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

|
---
|
---
Judicial Watch, Inc.
425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024

Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
| |

name: Mark Walker
subject: I’ve been trying to reach you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Walker4NC
body:
30 years ago, I came to North Carolina with my wife Kelly and the prayer for better days. I was blessed to serve my community as a pastor. | [Unsubscribe](https://click.walker4nc.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_s=6a74070876f24c599220d370ada631d2&_t=yviLRM1x0Zb-vENYwho0Wxfp7Pl7oCol30xQpkYq-ezOx0_VOXfmXcM4cph-PdS28Ry3tELO14lsWA_H2imcuLOmkdM29OiJuZGSMmKK7QU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](https://click.walker4nc.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_s=6a74070876f24c599220d370ada631d2&_t=yviLRM1x0Zb-vENYwho0Wxfp7Pl7oCol30xQpkYq-ezOx0_VOXfmXcM4cph-PdS28Ry3tELO14lsWA_H2imcuLOmkdM29OiJuZGSMmKK7QU%3D)

[](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=6a74070876f24c599220d370ada631d2&_e=wPnlp4uuyJlR1aWaky0FVbuuOJTmtPBuGz7O-wokza_ghZCDpLA-NzsXBA5moMxSYwq5KQx42mlAMFr9XwACeKEwzn-KPLIZySBLzqdhvwEn1ZcR6NIMHLjzYisjDnBNj2TZWbD7Qno3Hf_xSoqr7zBdAcPBKLUKsiflsIeCWh7-7ac8iI4rWYlfp2qdPKwEr2I6CmbRtYcNo06CQkqjxr7JIgNqE0WJVZRU98exDJiYOEy3HXQdrMKtW2Pxb2X2eD5jyTHD2cxoMO9_ixB7n3y6SDnuu5GCtrqQ1kwVfqCM2tmYgzEn_kxsGW37Vkf0TW-QakIvWViCiCwx1GvdbJnNUQUhKzd3-lSphcdLDw2Ugf0lLlSz9eQbsMbchrPMQZS8PpJnf4gGtO1AFfDM0A%3D%3D)
---

Peter - I need you to hear my story.

30 years ago, I came to North Carolina with my wife Kelly and the prayer for better days.

I was blessed to serve my community as a pastor.

Then God called me to serve as a congressman for the great state of North Carolina.

Now, I see the pain and suffering that the disastrous government policies are having on our community, and I can’t sit on the sidelines anymore.

[**I’m running for Governor of North Carolina because America deserves better than the current leaders who are selling out our children’s futures.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=6a74070876f24c599220d370ada631d2&_e=wPnlp4uuyJlR1aWaky0FVbuuOJTmtPBuGz7O-wokza_ghZCDpLA-NzsXBA5moMxSYwq5KQx42mlAMFr9XwACeKEwzn-KPLIZySBLzqdhvwEn1ZcR6NIMHLjzYisjDnBNj2TZWbD7Qno3Hf_xSoqr7zBdAcPBKLUKsiflsIeCWh7-7ac8iI4rWYlfp2qdPKwEr2I6CmbRtYcNo06CQkqjxr7JIgNqE0WJVZRU98exDJiYOEy3HXQdrMKtW2Pxb2X2uJj9_LlemCxECOAk-dowT6aDwEAC5JRewE69DSHEWVIb4eJvcdx_Wb4-iaphFqoyXjW764eKNJIGMLZoNyJH9EvJV-IzpYKHh-QVlL2yt96YxIVM7C97QFBvfEUP4_q98BA-fbqGF0EX6M9cEMsmeg%3D%3D)

[** DONATE TO ELECT MARK WALKER **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=6a74070876f24c599220d370ada631d2&_e=wPnlp4uuyJlR1aWaky0FVbuuOJTmtPBuGz7O-wokza_ghZCDpLA-NzsXBA5moMxSYwq5KQx42mlAMFr9XwACeKEwzn-KPLIZySBLzqdhvwEn1ZcR6NIMHLjzYisjDnBNj2TZWbD7Qno3Hf_xSoqr7zBdAcPBKLUKsiflsIeCWh7-7ac8iI4rWYlfp2qdPKwEr2I6CmbRtYcNo06CQkqjxr7JIgNqE0WJVZRU98exDJiYOEy3HXQdrMKtW2Pxb2X2X8-gGLRw7FX5b7KZrUpBrHF6c_7AfuxfLDXdG6Yt8Z2o7Vgc7HkM6I2Dbqn3oYA73hXbG5gKnykeOS7of2EBwpYP2uye8tYe00J8rG4vWXtnDULcenI0dX4y42JeoWdoy0JshGQ6G0oCI1tnph3sbg%3D%3D)

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

* * *

clean_body: 30 years ago, I came to North Carolina with my wife Kelly and the prayer for better days. I was blessed to serve my community as a pastor. | | Peter - I need you to hear my story. 30 years ago, I came to North Carolina with my wife Kelly and the prayer for better days. I was blessed to serve my community as a pastor. Then God called me to serve as a congressman for the great state of North Carolina. Now, I see the pain and suffering that the disastrous government policies are having on our community, and I can’t sit on the sidelines anymore. | Meet Mark Walker Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan. In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game. Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children. | | See Mark in Action:** ---|--- | Paid For By Walker4NC

body:
The Left has increased its aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Today, they took it a step too far... | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=08095207035f4a54a86dc4b24e356a28&_e=GPIDbCV6HgAA5Oa84XhxrMV6NN23mUc4dMJCTgeV1gFpM5yefeAIK5ZX7SO7UNjKIN1hGdfxUi0EvHCX2QigBJJh_JpkOinOmX9K_jd0g519Xyc31b8v9uAS7OoHrPKgjsh7Lz9UJ0z9eIGGZweoC60dOPgSq03g_UtybsoJxt_GD9J5DfqUmBAXz9WZh3nOVBoiy3DawPT3bIhuFDGrx8b5RltE9zMGz4Xo3a7B9Z8Oy7cZox1kBF6R4wvzbn8qMedRk8djpckJZy6WNsCloZaMYsuJjsCA9Sx33wUrwpEKPJWLCeBFHRbOfol4nVJuZI9jyIDed2AjJfgdeilTvz41rZepAlwVYn3mdhEejb61uVHNO1W6nP_KJK3zsZVP5d7y_0HBh0aEatJ_cCA6S1cqoVG3O5JI20SmZaIpJyiNvaaiHtfmkBv2BNZoauedFn2sbBo4X9ju5a6eu_sRlw%3D%3D)
Fellow American - this makes me sick.

**The Democrats have taken things too far this time...**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=08095207035f4a54a86dc4b24e356a28&_e=GPIDbCV6HgAA5Oa84XhxrMV6NN23mUc4dMJCTgeV1gFpM5yefeAIK5ZX7SO7UNjKIN1hGdfxUi0EvHCX2QigBJJh_JpkOinOmX9K_jd0g519Xyc31b8v9uAS7OoHrPKgjsh7Lz9UJ0z9eIGGZweoC60dOPgSq03g_UtybsoJxt_GD9J5DfqUmBAXz9WZh3nOVBoiy3DawPT3bIhuFDGrx8b5RltE9zMGz4Xo3a7B9Z8Oy7cZox1kBF6R4wvzbn8qMedRk8djpckJZy6WNsCloZaMYsuJjsCA9Sx33wUrwpEKPJWLCeBFHRbOfol4nVJuwfj3uRevU_BP_Z92RKMEiEfnLqh9P8wxLaXblDvu3BQZCDIjq2vZPazZACKc-18kmfCUgPVnYFWW1UinbDZhSV-4OUb-Bq5_zzfp69M3WsqJ4NN6GqD8uNSxQNX1UzEbDOo1DBlv4kTYlglEPJKXbg%3D%3D)
We have observed an escalation in the Left’s increasingly aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Maintaining civil discourse on issues is regrettably fading away. The party of “Love and Tolerance” always shows their true colors.

**Biden called Republicans an**“extremism that threatens the very foundations of our republic,”**

Hillary Clinton said, **“you can’t be civil with a political party that wants to destroy what you stand for.”**

Rep. Maxine Walters declared ****“You get out and create a crowd. You push back on them. You tell them they are not welcomed anymore or anywhere.”**

Sen. Jon Tester encouraged people to “punch Trump in the face.”****

**Now... the Missouri Democrat Party advocated to burn down a Trump supporter’s home.**

Democrats wish harm and loss on a fellow American just for displaying signs and flags for a political opponent they hate. _There’s absolutely no place for it in Missouri – let alone America._

If we even hope to flip the Senate next year and stop this dangerous rhetoric in its tracks, we can't wait. [**Fellow American, will you support us today and help me make sure we are in the best possible position to win and protect America?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=08095207035f4a54a86dc4b24e356a28&_e=GPIDbCV6HgAA5Oa84XhxrMV6NN23mUc4dMJCTgeV1gFpM5yefeAIK5ZX7SO7UNjKIN1hGdfxUi0EvHCX2QigBJJh_JpkOinOmX9K_jd0g519Xyc31b8v9uAS7OoHrPKgjsh7Lz9UJ0z9eIGGZweoC60dOPgSq03g_UtybsoJxt_GD9J5DfqUmBAXz9WZh3nOVBoiy3DawPT3bIhuFDGrx8b5RltE9zMGz4Xo3a7B9Z8Oy7cZox1kBF6R4wvzbn8qMedRk8djpckJZy6WNsCloZaMYsuJjsCA9Sx33wUrwpEKPJWLCeBFHRbOfol4nVJu97RhN574m070z_v1lKQftXqWkvWTwVNwhHLdEOb12Z_C98E2QBkLnmptem5fjx5012dZDZ4tcnpMIBsz5_krtkH6_9GW69thtQZ_WCzGUYAXGhNtD8Pe8RIlfTXMfLmBFmIaHjBkKR6JxPtjPWwiQw%3D%3D)

clean_body: The Left has increased its aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Today, they took it a step too far... | Fellow American - this makes me sick. The Democrats have taken things too far this time... We have observed an escalation in the Left’s increasingly aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Maintaining civil discourse on issues is regrettably fading away. The party of “Love and Tolerance” always shows their true colors. Biden called Republicans an“extremism that threatens the very foundations of our republic,” Hillary Clinton said, “you can’t be civil with a political party that wants to destroy what you stand for.” Rep. Maxine Walters declared “You get out and create a crowd. You push back on them. You tell them they are not welcomed anymore or anywhere.” Sen. Jon Tester encouraged people to “punch Trump in the face.”** Now... the Missouri Democrat Party advocated to burn down a Trump supporter’s home. Democrats wish harm and loss on a fellow American just for displaying signs and flags for a political opponent they hate. There’s absolutely no place for it in Missouri – let alone America. If we even hope to flip the Senate next year and stop this dangerous rhetoric in its tracks, we can't wait. I refuse to believe that Democrats can campaign AND outraise us with a message that says they want to burn down a Trump supporter’s house.** The Democrat Party today is full of rabid hate for Republicans and anyone who disagrees with them. The hypocrisy isn’t lost in this message either. If this Tweet was from a Republican, there would have been a full investigation for domestic terrorism and legal liability. Next year, it’s all on the line and Democrats threatening to burn the Constitution is already scary enough. Respectfully, Sen. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5d31l8go19admr0t1r9a1c43cesvnnhsuc4n170_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgfsj9mo5tu0u05j9l5odld1p6v08ulm63fqh7a0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaaikg9724ncjclbtsd4khso7ion4mbnthiqn1d0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zohtsug4n5f1c64s8jt6irpugudtk2lrbtpbedog_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv626pmudd17qfgm0el1qcs9gbj7m3hcojpip9fg_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdlce6odrd5b49juppdfngeag2a04s1tsag06kog_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1pvmnoaabcnm7prk9rdneuaa3n743kq3q7f6ut0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9h30qkvbveopof8msejsp4u6abnt97mbmh7g3i8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp8hdosb8v8g5mk1u0qp6aq7f3ikdq907n74dhs0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbhjngc045o9cjbuccdnor211sso3l1omun19sn0_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0pd6nrsij8eo0unkem4krp120etil6fie8jltso_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6o6unfv3uavduhnjpcbhu8aboi4dvp07monqvfo_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9pr1uanqrvp1qjoij7544nrjf6d7kd13evioua8_rp22sh2s8i66p72cpg6eo76cph2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Course correction for Republicans
body:
A podcast I hope you'll listen to | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/podcast-2?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I hope you'll take the time to listen to this [podcast](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2b73e8e0b5&e=9828080a05) I was just on. My last conversation on [The Break Down with Brodkorb and Becky](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2596846c9c&e=9828080a05) got some critical conversations going, and I hope this one does too.

This past election should be a wakeup call for Republicans: how do we win the people we've had a hard time winning? I lost in 2022, and instead of retreating into silence - I'm trying to use my platform to say "here's what went right for us" and "here's what future candidates should do that went wrong for us."

I don't presume to have all the answers, but I hope you'll take the time to click the [play button](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=aa162751e4&e=9828080a05) below and listen:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=0268b14a5a&e=9828080a05)
---
| I care deeply about Minnesota and the success of Republicans here. I still believe our freedom is at stake and the conservative movement must save it. I hope this 2nd [reflective conversation](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f8d610f565&e=9828080a05) provokes thought, dialogue, and course correction for us all.

[We discuss](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9c545c3f1b&e=9828080a05) the abortion issue, messaging strategies and failures, and much, much more. Do not miss this and please do not hesitate to reach out if you have questions about any of it. It's time to start winning again. Part of that future vision of winning must be to analyze what went wrong.

[Please tune in.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=7f17dd1f12&e=9828080a05)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---

subject: Urgent update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| It’s outrageous. The fifth circuit federal appeals court just upheld many of the restrictions a Texas judge made on mifepristone, the leading abortion pill.

The ruling won’t go into effect, however, until the conservative Supreme Court weighs in on its first abortion case since they overturned Roe v. Wade last summer.

**Here’s what’s clear: Reproductive freedoms are under attack yet again and it’s up to us to continue pushing back.**

Anti-choice extremists will stop at nothing to strip us of our freedoms, which is why I’m asking for your help.

**_[Now more than ever, we need to keep leaders in place who will fight against these attacks. The Supreme Court has shown that it’s no ally to our reproductive freedom, which is why it’s so dangerous that they will be deciding mifepristone’s fate. The appeals court decision would eliminate telemedicine and mailing the pill— _which would leave many women in states with abortion bans without essential care._

It’s not just the federal level. Right here in Kansas, the KS GOP are continuing to try to challenge abortion rights, despite Kansas voters making it clear in a vote one year ago that they value reproductive freedom and want it protected.

It’s more important than ever that we have battle-tested leaders who are committed to standing up for our reproductive freedoms in office. **_Are you with me?_**

clean_body: | It’s outrageous. The fifth circuit federal appeals court just upheld many of the restrictions a Texas judge made on mifepristone, the leading abortion pill. The ruling won’t go into effect, however, until the conservative Supreme Court weighs in on its first abortion case since they overturned Roe v. Wade last summer. Here’s what’s clear: Reproductive freedoms are under attack yet again and it’s up to us to continue pushing back. Anti-choice extremists will stop at nothing to strip us of our freedoms, which is why I’m asking for your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = The Supreme Court has shown that it’s no ally to our reproductive freedom, which is why it’s so dangerous that they will be deciding mifepristone’s fate. The appeals court decision would eliminate telemedicine and mailing the pill— which would leave many women in states with abortion bans without essential care. It’s not just the federal level. Right here in Kansas, the KS GOP are continuing to try to challenge abortion rights, despite Kansas voters making it clear in a vote one year ago that they value reproductive freedom and want it protected. It’s more important than ever that we have battle-tested leaders who are committed to standing up for our reproductive freedoms in office. Are you with me? = Thank you for your support, Sharice Davids * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. body:
This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they 're seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

Friend, a Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can't win with standard tactics so they're making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**We must never give up on our crusade for freedom.**

I'm sending out a Hail Mary to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down. Staying on pace with the Democrats is VITAL to protecting our Majority.
