name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: How I’ll Stop Political Corruption
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
Being related to a politician isn’t a real job.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=bd91a92167&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# How I’ll Stop Political Corruption
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Fellow Patriots, Aren’t you sick and tired of the families of the politically connected getting away with everything? Case in point: Hunter Biden, whose lack of any discernible talents or skills somehow didn’t prevent him from using his father’s political office to make himself wealthy. If only all of us were members of Washington’s ruling families! This isn’t how public service is supposed to work. Enough is enough. I’ve got a plan to put a stop to these shenanigans once and for all.As President, I would introduce an executive order that would put an end to the era of “pay to play” politics. My proposal would prevent family members of presidents and vice presidents from making money off the Oval Office, both when their family members are in power and five years after leaving office.This order would also apply to Congress. We sent them to Washington to serve the public and act in our interest. Instead, people like Nancy Pelosi have spent their time in Washington D.C. enriching themselves and members of their family. That ends on my first day in office. The ruling elite aren’t going to like my plan. And that’s OK. I’m not running to serve their interests. I’m running to serve you. [**But, I need your help to secure a spot on the GOP presidential stage to share my message with the American people: it’s time to hold the Biden Crime Family and all corrupt politicians responsible. Your donation of any size brings us closer to that critical goal.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=951de1368c&e=0be619cbaa) It seems like every day there’s another scandal - hundreds of millions of dollars changing hands, shady business dealings in Russia and Ukraine, cover-ups compounded by corruption at the highest levels of government. Both Republicans and Democrats are to blame. But with your help, we can put a stop to this.[**I’m the only GOP candidate who can make this happen because I’m neither a career politician nor a billionaire. I have the courage to ensure real reforms actually take place. Your donation of any size is crucial to making the voice of We the People in the GOP debates.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=9b62de1776&e=0be619cbaa) Our political leadership and the media have turned a blind eye to this for too long. That’s why I’m calling this executive order my [Blind Spot Initiative](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=257a904a1b&e=0be619cbaa). It would be the first step to restoring transparency to government and accountability in Washington - and forcing the kids of politicians to get real jobs, just like the rest of us.[**But I can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m humbly asking: what can you give today? Your contribution to my campaign puts the new Golden Age of America closer within reach.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=d9cf1de785&e=0be619cbaa) Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President
---

name: Sign Your Name (via Left Action)
subject: Trump supporters are threatening grand jury members. Sign to demand protection for them >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Demand protection for jurors in Trump trials >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9433df3-336c-4a04-a894-14f1ecc97498/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taef1b0c1-84e9-47f4-8e8e-94a238724224/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | MAGA Trump supporters, having been encouraged by Trump's endless attacks on social media against the judges and prosecutors leading the investigations against him, are now coming after Trump grand jury members. Names, addresses, and photos of some jury members have been shared on message boards and social media, and Trump's supporters are calling for violence against them. They need protection – immediately. As will jurors in the upcoming trials. These are not ordinary trials, and these jury members are doing their civic duty and working hard to uphold our democracy and deliver justice. They don't deserve this cruel treatment and threats of violence. And we can't afford to have them pressured to rule in Trump's favor out of fear. [**Join us to demand protections for the jury members participating in Trump's cases in Georgia, New York, and Washington DC >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T080bc528-2e0b-4003-b103-22b2ca29395a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | MAGA Trump supporters, having been encouraged by Trump's endless attacks on social media against the judges and prosecutors leading the investigations against him, are now coming after Trump grand jury members. Names, addresses, and photos of some jury members have been shared on message boards and social media, and Trump's supporters are calling for violence against them. They need protection – immediately. As will jurors in the upcoming trials. These are not ordinary trials, and these jury members are doing their civic duty and working hard to uphold our democracy and deliver justice. They don't deserve this cruel treatment and threats of violence. And we can't afford to have them pressured to rule in Trump's favor out of fear. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. name: Josh Hawley
subject: This Democrat message changes everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The Left has increased its aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Today, they took it a step too far... | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=bfaede12b22947b88f4b9780de078fd8&_e=FmO6cM7XS8QVzVbIX4Ia4LSqwyb3xxr9HtyGxQqS0V7BU6nkNJ4iNK6UwCP2t2WXaPboSL6b-DbECLdBHayZCxs7pYf76nd2dfdCAJ88rVrdFAbnqnSVaWruDyxGASvr9WcOmGxCRvUI_LtW4alQVFIr1OSYd9e8wiULguklOyJNGHE7RzEq85zJx_c7MD45g88rTy3hsqRmwjuxz2JJdUvd-TtYHy6D4aSFpuYRvzL2gQfwVMcuIJ3XWGAOkKTcpk2zAZ9aeJuPeBpAs84KQIRuTt_0IHN2ezDElGDyxbTQ9bo6vQvcaR1DRclejXd6kI0kUWvNeJhk3mMLOj6s3RsXoTYLkAXHi2madMgurGItQizUsf5JliflJNJvm3NDTcZUj1PdHHIV5GpNRveSuBfTFfz6Rm4ZgkwnlefgRXJIP_kdmXAAaHsxnATWMBmr)
Fellow American - this makes me sick.

**The Democrats have taken things too far this time...**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=bfaede12b22947b88f4b9780de078fd8&_e=FmO6cM7XS8QVzVbIX4Ia4LSqwyb3xxr9HtyGxQqS0V7BU6nkNJ4iNK6UwCP2t2WXaPboSL6b-DbECLdBHayZCxs7pYf76nd2dfdCAJ88rVrdFAbnqnSVaWruDyxGASvr9WcOmGxCRvUI_LtW4alQVFIr1OSYd9e8wiULguklOyJNGHE7RzEq85zJx_c7MD45g88rTy3hsqRmwjuxz2JJdUvd-TtYHy6D4aSFpuYRvzL2gQfwVMcuIJ3XWGAOkKTcpk2zAZ9aeJuPeBpAs84KQIRuTt_0IHN2ezDElGDyxbTCJ9NxFcVnsD0gLRGDFTkoX12busc2t-pWOVcaWf_ykJW5YMW_ZB6CPZG7OlHmTw2mFuVZmyuRXdBM2GgT_n-n86_n63wFVUVr8rq7XPVJUFRUoQDDzD0EZ9um7l_5SOZ4jBuu-6fzXm2ijDtY5mMz)
We have observed an escalation in the Left’s increasingly aggressive rhetoric over the past few years. Maintaining civil discourse on issues is regrettably fading away. The party of “Love and Tolerance” always shows their true colors.

**Biden called Republicans an**“extremism that threatens the very foundations of our republic,”**

Hillary Clinton said, **“you can’t be civil with a political party that wants to destroy what you stand for.”**

Rep. Maxine Walters declared ****“You get out and create a crowd. You push back on them. You tell them they are not welcomed anymore or anywhere.”**

Sen. Jon Tester encouraged people to “punch Trump in the face.”****

**Now... the Missouri Democrat Party advocated to burn down a Trump supporter’s home.**

Democrats wish harm and loss on a fellow American just for displaying signs and flags for a political opponent they hate. _There’s absolutely no place for it in Missouri – let alone America._

If we even hope to flip the Senate next year and stop this dangerous rhetoric in its tracks, we can't wait. [**Fellow American, will you support us today and help me make sure we are in the best possible position to win and protect America?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=bfaede12b22947b88f4b9780de078fd8&_e=FmO6cM7XS8QVzVbIX4Ia4LSqwyb3xxr9HtyGxQqS0V7BU6nkNJ4iNK6UwCP2t2WXaPboSL6b-DbECLdBHayZCxs7pYf76nd2dfdCAJ88rVrdFAbnqnSVaWruDyxGASvr9WcOmGxCRvUI_LtW4alQVFIr1OSYd9e8wiULguklOyJNGHE7RzEq85zJx_c7MD45g88rTy3hsqRmwjuxz2JJdUvd-TtYHy6D4aSFpuYRvzL2gQfwVMcuIJ3XWGAOkKTcpk2zAZ9aeJuPeBpAs84KQIRuTt_0IHN2ezDElGDyxbRzVtnCm31-gEnHS1Uz1jjqHoB15YGaAwRgDHhV86eVwYXhidSpGNVh93tBX6zq0ZtHJucm6enA8WIn5PF9Oybl0_TuGNjyEoqAPlMgDZdwpfnzNmQjvE28eicvwBXS_MQon3L8MzfQ3cHAm4MNJZLu)

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. | | Peter,

clean_body: | | Peter, We have the chance to make history – Dr. Williams will be the first trauma surgeon ever elected to Congress and the first Black doctor with voting privileges ever to serve there. He will bring his years of experience advocating for patients and safer communities with him. But he can’t get there on his own. = Dr. Williams has the experience and dedication it takes to be an effective leader for us in Congress. He’s ready to promote gun safety, protect reproductive freedoms, and push to make health care more affordable and accessible. Having him in Congress will mean there is someone at the table who is always pushing to save lives. We are asking for your support to help Dr. Williams share his message with people across our district to make sure they know that he is the best candidate to represent them. | | Friend,

---
Over the past 24 hours, I’ve watched as some disloyal Republicans – or RINOs, as I call them – have defended the corrupt Atlanta prosecutor’s witch hunt against me.

---
**One went so far as to CHEER ON the left-wing prosecutor and see our persecution as an opportunity to destroy our historic America First movement.**
---
_Other RINOs have chosen to remain silent – but at a time when our country is on the verge of falling to tyranny, to be silent_ __is__ _to be complicit._

---
As I’ve said before, during a crisis, you learn who your true allies are._
_
---
It’s easy to be loyal and brave when everything is sunshine and roses. _But when the storm hits, you quickly find out who retreats and who truly has your back.__
_
---
And if these RINOs would stab me in the back, you can be sure they’d sell voters like YOU out in a snap of the finger._
_
---
I have to remind you that these same RINOs are working on a very sinister $370 MILLION plot to try and rob us of the Republican nomination and install their own puppet candidate who will do the Deep State’s bidding._
_
---
**But fortunately for us, our movement is packed with over 74 MILLION patriots who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny.**_
_
---
_Even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow peaceful patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs and end the month STRONG!__
_

clean_body: Stabbed in the back. . . | | | | | Friend, Over the past 24 hours, I’ve watched as some disloyal Republicans – or RINOs, as I call them – have defended the corrupt Atlanta prosecutor’s witch hunt against me. One went so far as to CHEER ON the left-wing prosecutor and see our persecution as an opportunity to destroy our historic America First movement. Other RINOs have chosen to remain silent – but at a time when our country is on the verge of falling to tyranny, to be silent is to be complicit. As I’ve said before, during a crisis, you learn who your true allies are. It’s easy to be loyal and brave when everything is sunshine and roses. But when the storm hits, you quickly find out who retreats and who truly has your back. And if these RINOs would stab me in the back, you can be sure they’d sell voters like YOU out in a snap of the finger. I have to remind you that these same RINOs are working on a very sinister $370 MILLION plot to try and rob us of the Republican nomination and install their own puppet candidate who will do the Deep State’s bidding. But fortunately for us, our movement is packed with over 74 MILLION patriots who refuse to surrender our nation to tyranny. Even a contribution of just $1 alongside your fellow peaceful patriots is enough to OUTRAISE these RINOs and end the month STRONG! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley is lying to us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Long ago, Hawley put a plan into motion to ban abortion nationwide, without exceptions. But today he said...
#
Peter,
Earlier this year, Josh Hawley, his wife, and the corrupt federal judge who donated to Hawley’s 2018 Senate campaign, Matthew Kacsmaryk, worked together to ban the most commonly used abortion medication in all 50 states, without exception.
**They set their plan to ban abortion into motion long ago.** But now that Hawley is facing the pressure of re-election, he’s lying about where he stands — and he thinks all of us are going to let him get away with it:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35663?refcode=em20230817-3574&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3574%2E614464%2EJSpHKS)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35663?refcode=em20230817-3574&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3574%2E614464%2EJSpHKS)**
**IN 2017:** Matthew Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court. His confirmation stalled for years.
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made a donation to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**IN 2019:** Once he got to the Senate, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge. He confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
**IN 2022:** A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.
**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35663?refcode=em20230817-3574&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3574%2E614464%2EJSpHKS)
**APRIL 7, 2023:** Hawley’s DONOR judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s WIFE, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.
**AND NOW:** After the Supreme Court overturned Kacsmaryk’s ruling and a major win for reproductive freedom advocates in Ohio, Hawley knows his own extreme views on abortion are a serious liability for his re-election campaign — so he’s lying to us.
**Josh Hawley is a fraud and a coward — and we can’t afford another six years of him representing Missouri in the U.S. Senate.[So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and elect a real warrior for working people, please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35663?refcode=em20230817-3574&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3574%2E614464%2EJSpHKS)**

clean_body: Long ago, Hawley put a plan into motion to ban abortion nationwide, without exceptions. But today he said... Peter, Earlier this year, Josh Hawley, his wife, and the corrupt federal judge who donated to Hawley’s 2018 Senate campaign, Matthew Kacsmaryk, worked together to ban the most commonly used abortion medication in all 50 states, without exception. They set their plan to ban abortion into motion long ago. But now that Hawley is facing the pressure of re-election, he’s lying about where he stands — and he thinks all of us are going to let him get away with it: IN 2017: Matthew Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court. His confirmation stalled for years. IN 2018: While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made a donation to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs. IN 2019: Once he got to the Senate, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge. He confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms. IN 2022: A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions. Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge. APRIL 7, 2023: Hawley’s DONOR judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s WIFE, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states. AND NOW: After the Supreme Court overturned Kacsmaryk’s ruling and a major win for reproductive freedom advocates in Ohio, Hawley knows his own extreme views on abortion are a serious liability for his re-election campaign — so he’s lying to us. Josh Hawley is a fraud and a coward — and we can’t afford another six years of him representing Missouri in the U.S. Senate. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will actually stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve. Thanks for standing with me, Peter. Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Social Security is one of the most critical parts of the social safety net in the United States.
For 88 years (as of this Monday!), it's made sure that seniors can retire with dignity and peace of mind. It's lifted millions out of poverty. Nearly one of every five Arizona residents receives Social Security.
So why, when we should be protecting this program for generations to come, are Republicans trying to sabotage it?
https://www.gvnews.com/opinion/gops-social-security-plan-cuts-deep/article_d20b7caa-3bb1-11ee-9695-97cc255c35c4.html [https://www.gvnews.com/opinion/gops-social-security-plan-cuts-deep/article_d20b7caa-3bb1-11ee-9695-97cc255c35c4.html]
Kirsten wrote an op-ed all about the importance of Social Security — and why the GOP's plan to slash it is so problematic. You can read what she has to say here. [https://www.gvnews.com/opinion/gops-social-security-plan-cuts-deep/article_d20b7caa-3bb1-11ee-9695-97cc255c35c4.html]
One of the Republicans leading the push to disassemble and defund Social Security is Kirsten's opponent, Juan Ciscomani.
Almost half of Arizona's seniors rely on Social Security for the majority of their income. Gutting the program would be devastating for them. But once again, Juan Ciscomani is choosing his political agenda over the needs of his constituents.
Unlike Ciscomani, Kirsten actually has a plan that will protect and expand Social Security.
We need Kirsten fighting for us in Congress. Will you make sure she can win this ultra-competitive race by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080723_OpEd_act]

name: Conor O'Callaghan
subject: My plan to end the wage gap:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Conor for AZ
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68249950/422427152/993309821?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZiNTA3MmEtMmUzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W742JNY2qXudThLSxkmfXriqKawL5KazGA69N6lu8pc=&emci=f047b5ad-8b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ffb5072a-2e3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491)
---

| | As of last year, working women earned on average just 82 percent of men's wages. In 2002, this number was 80 percent — meaning that across two decades we've barely made a dent in the gender pay gap. When we see disheartening trends like this, we need to demand more from our leaders. We need folks in office willing to fight for sweeping changes that will finally achieve pay equity and ensure that women are not relegated to second-class status. **[Yesterday, on the 50th anniversary of H.J. Res. 52 (which declared that August 26 would be recognized as Women's Equality Day), I announced my plan to eliminate the gender pay gap. The time has come for us to stand up for women and our working mothers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68249951/422427153/581323550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZiNTA3MmEtMmUzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W742JNY2qXudThLSxkmfXriqKawL5KazGA69N6lu8pc=&emci=f047b5ad-8b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ffb5072a-2e3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491)** [THE PLAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68249952/422427154/581323550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZiNTA3MmEtMmUzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W742JNY2qXudThLSxkmfXriqKawL5KazGA69N6lu8pc=&emci=f047b5ad-8b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ffb5072a-2e3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491) I would not be who I am today without the amazing influence of my mother. She was a dedicated stay-at-home mom and taught me so many of my core values. My wife decided to temporarily set aside her career to help raise our children – an act of selflessness that profoundly shaped our boys. **In our current economy, women like my mother or my wife are too often penalized for their choices. So many mothers face unequal pay when they attempt to return to the workforce, and far too few states provide adequate paid family leave.** That's why a national comprehensive paid family and medical leave program is _non-negotiable_ to me and is the first major component of my plan. Secondly, we desperately need to improve pay transparency. Numerous companies think they can cheat employees out of wages owed because they currently can avoid scrutiny. **I propose a federal law to mandate pay scales for job postings in all 50 states — this will send a message that pay fairness is not just a right, but a collective responsibility.** **Finally, I want to better incentivize companies to fund employees' childcare.** Folks deserve a break when balancing careers and family responsibilities, and our government has a responsibility to make affordable childcare programs more accessible. If we expand the 45F tax credit, businesses will see their tax liability decrease by $150,000 annually and be able to do a lot more for their employees. **Families across AZ-01 face an uncertain future, and they deserve a Congressman who will put them first. I'm determined to advance the conversation in this election by putting out clear and comprehensive policies _early_.** So I hope you'll take some time this week to read my [_**full plan**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68249953/422427155/581323550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZiNTA3MmEtMmUzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W742JNY2qXudThLSxkmfXriqKawL5KazGA69N6lu8pc=&emci=f047b5ad-8b3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ffb5072a-2e3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7520491) for gender pay equity. **[And if possible, please chip in $3 so we can spread the word and fight for this urgently-needed policy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68249954/422427156/-475151067?refcode=2023-08-16-equality&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ffb5072a-2e3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZiNTA3MmEtMmUzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W742JNY2qXudThLSxkmfXriqKawL5KazGA69N6lu8pc=)** Thank you so much, _Conor_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | As of last year, working women earned on average just 82 percent of men's wages. In 2002, this number was 80 percent — meaning that across two decades we've barely made a dent in the gender pay gap. When we see disheartening trends like this, we need to demand more from our leaders. We need folks in office willing to fight for sweeping changes that will finally achieve pay equity and ensure that women are not relegated to second-class status. I would not be who I am today without the amazing influence of my mother. She was a dedicated stay-at-home mom and taught me so many of my core values. My wife decided to temporarily set aside her career to help raise our children – an act of selflessness that profoundly shaped our boys. In our current economy, women like my mother or my wife are too often penalized for their choices. So many mothers face unequal pay when they attempt to return to the workforce, and far too few states provide adequate paid family leave. That's why a national comprehensive paid family and medical leave program is non-negotiable to me and is the first major component of my plan. Secondly, we desperately need to improve pay transparency. Numerous companies think they can cheat employees out of wages owed because they currently can avoid scrutiny. I propose a federal law to mandate pay scales for job postings in all 50 states — this will send a message that pay fairness is not just a right, but a collective responsibility. Finally, I want to better incentivize companies to fund employees' childcare. Folks deserve a break when balancing careers and family responsibilities, and our government has a responsibility to make affordable childcare programs more accessible. If we expand the 45F tax credit, businesses will see their tax liability decrease by $150,000 annually and be able to do a lot more for their employees. Families across AZ-01 face an uncertain future, and they deserve a Congressman who will put them first. I'm determined to advance the conversation in this election by putting out clear and comprehensive policies early. So I hope you'll take some time this week to read my for gender pay equity. = Thank you so much, Conor | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Conor for AZ. |

clean_body: These extremists tried to destroy our democracy. = Peter, It’s official: Donald Trump and 18 associates have been indicted by a grand jury in Georgia for engaging in a “criminal enterprise” to overturn the 2020 election results. These extremists tried to destroy the foundation of our democracy: the right of the people to choose our President. We can never let Trump or his allies near the White House ever again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This is Trump’s 4th indictment. No former President has ever been indicted once, let alone four times - but that’s how serious the allegations against Trump are. We must allow this process to play out, but no one is above the law and if a jury finds Trump guilty, he should be held accountable just like any other person in America. = Together, we’ll protect our democracy for the future! \- Future Forum PAC Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

body:
Promises made, promises NOT kept. | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=cab668e3bf044b1790ec5417f4458465&_e=-JcI2LY37BM51y5i5nYzEiTyK1o7RQOSkLBKdAnIIef2v9nbKj6cOV-HtCdmUoXUwOVlIKpkC1R_Z28U1bXpBEBNIzlk4WyhG2VMwC81rpoW5Td5yGgBqYSbaiIn8ng117DT1PGhaOfWk0Jl_9wSzRaDUW5zcFtwgUTHLvfg-lK5kw7HDQbi-cmO1N-HUEuZjAiRkl3rS6TFDYshYrebXEMLLyEU0MlNzAMSwe6b1t57yFfVrS3GxA8JEGsfR-UaSjjIUtxxFT-FEh6ahFJ30VLhLZrR8jUlsOSejdSijhg%3D)

| | My philosophy is tell it like it is, folks, tell the Truth. Tell the Truth, always.

That's how you earn voters' trust.

I’m sick and tired of seeing Trump lie and make excuses for his failure to deliver on the promises he made.

Recently, a Newsmax host trotted out every reason imaginable why Trump couldn't build the wall.

**Here is the truth: In four years Trump only built 52 miles of new wall. And we paid millions for it and Mexico paid nothing. Not one dang peso.**
---

Let me give it to you straight.

I'm going to build the wall, secure our border, stop the criminals, prosecute human traffickers, and put an end to the cartels who are taking advantage of our leaders - that's the truth.

Unlike Trump, I will keep my promises.

**[Will you help my campaign with a donation today?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe31785746a74a91a29688c558f8e5b5&_m=cab668e3bf044b1790ec5417f4458465&_e=-JcI2LY37BM51y5i5nYzEiTyK1o7RQOSkLBKdAnIIef2v9nbKj6cOV-HtCdmUoXUwOVlIKpkC1R_Z28U1bXpBEBNIzlk4WyhG2VMwC81rpoW5Td5yGgBqYSbaiIn8ng1V6116PvxLh8w_tO3LVTZR1q4xuE84oknbH-k7nTL6KRYMY0hmcEDfMn1VxdA11I1OofUOrNmLDNJgNNs4_yAaAPg8s1lo1dU_G-FrSnE7RQ1ovKXhh5jBU2PZ2nj7vvZhLy6TRJbxlV0sZXLRakU9wSNx-41z5eq8c4xEZkZyUI%3D)**

clean_body: Promises made, promises NOT kept. | | | | | My philosophy is tell it like it is, folks, tell the Truth. Tell the Truth, always. That's how you earn voters' trust. I’m sick and tired of seeing Trump lie and make excuses for his failure to deliver on the promises he made. Recently, a Newsmax host trotted out every reason imaginable why Trump couldn't build the wall. Here is the truth: In four years Trump only built 52 miles of new wall. And we paid millions for it and Mexico paid nothing. Not one dang peso. Let me give it to you straight. I'm going to build the wall, secure our border, stop the criminals, prosecute human traffickers, and put an end to the cartels who are taking advantage of our leaders - that's the truth. Unlike Trump, I will keep my promises. Thank you, Chris Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

Continue reading below to find out why it's so critical that this doesn't happen.

Did you know that in 2022, there were more than **105,000** deaths from opioid overdoses? Perhaps you did.

But I bet that you didn’t know Mexican drug cartels, which are almost entirely responsible for importing deadly opioids, like synthetic fentanyl, **made more than $13 BILLION from distributing illegal drugs into our communities**.

**President Biden and his Border Czar have failed me, you, and everyone you know by refusing to lockdown the border and to take the fight to the cartels in Mexico.**

** If we don’t begin using lethal force against Mexican drug traffickers, or the cartel bosses who make billions off drug-addicted Americans, we’re never going to be safe again.**

**Not only do I want you to know that I’m running for the United States Senate to fix the mess Biden and Harris have created, but I also want the Mexican drug lords and the cartels they run to know it too - that’s why my campaign website is in Spanish. **

**Unfortunately for me and my campaign, there is a strong possibility that I may have to take down the Spanish language version of the website in the next few days if I’m not able to pay the developer who designed it for me.**

I need to raise $5,500 by Friday, or the drug kingpins in Mexico will have no idea that an American Sheriff named Mark Lamb is about to be their worst nightmare. **[[chip in anything right now.]](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1e757f1a1d1a40fda0f731f5074c8364&_e=DefTKf-YvouOKtFa5VgBEXqVGiHefUtGfcXtBUe40Xz6dVJS865jdJKIX9hFPRTW5NTl2ok5V5snYIlx7jEA31ZhM-o74gh8ipddSC02gyDW5azpH6mS4zQw8Yp6Hv0ADG33K-gaK9WRndQIcwJraOSEbpjUvK7jNQ5Q5n3DqFS7gqed5NqDe603tbOgVQzTxg6HtNKh-BsQZPbxh5Z5u_kt10oV3ighZcn1NF-bDnSv_bH0cfKrdQT5z-apQk2beloBbh35zonvK8V6hiQw92oDnZ-twHGFpMuV3ztLFpe7e445YcGegf4-Fxy4ODo5XYacBHsJzQlJs-AqaYxkDOY_OafwKlG1GzCXubFpCVkMB70eH_xEKDKtEYwieSRIY9ZoJvtRQDmHo4Enk4em-g%3D%3D)**

As the Sheriff of Arizona’s third largest county, **I’ve done everything in my power to bring these drug bosses to heel.** Unfortunately, I don’t have the authority to pursue those responsible for the drug/human trafficking crisis accountable. That’s why I’m running to be Arizona’s next United States senator.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

name: Bennet HQ
subject: One year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
For decades, the status quo has allowed the rich to get ahead. “Trickle-down” policies worked for those at the top, but left everyone else behind.
One year ago, we started to change this when President Biden signed the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) into law.
The IRA lowered health care costs for working families, invested billions into clean energy projects and conservation efforts, and made sure the biggest corporations paid their fair share. You can read more about its accomplishments in the email we forwarded below.
Michael wrote part of this law — and fought hard to make sure it passed despite Republican obstruction.
Michael made sure the bill capped the out-of-pocket cost of insulin for seniors at $35/month, that it included funding for wildfire prevention, and that it would help create tens of thousands of new clean energy jobs.
We need leaders like Michael fighting for our working families in Congress. Will you chip in now to make sure Michael can help elect and re-elect Democrats around the country so we can continue to build on this progress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
We can’t hold the Senate or take back the House without fighting for these critical seats — and you can help Michael do exactly that right now.
Thank you!
— Team Bennet
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com>
Date: Wed, Aug 9, 2023 at 10:32 AM
Subject: Shaking up the status quo
Friend –
This month marks an exciting milestone: it’s officially been one year since the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) became law.
The IRA replaced forty years of failed, trickle-down economics with policies that actually help working families. It was a loss for corporate special interests and a victory for folks in Colorado and across the country.
Michael fought hard to make sure that the IRA passed through the Senate — despite efforts from Mitch McConnell and the Republican party to block it.
By chipping in now, you can help Michael elect Democrats across the country to keep fighting for us and pushing back against Republican obstruction. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
A year later, we’re already seeing the benefits of the Inflation Reduction Act. Here’s how the IRA has been helping Colorado families: [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_072123_freedomtovoteact]
Lowering prescription drug and healthcare costs: Americans are often forced to choose between affording life-saving medication and putting food on the table — like Julia from Denver, whose dad was forced to spend $72,000 a year on medication for his heart condition. The IRA helped lower prescription drug costs. Under this law, Medicare is required to negotiate lower drug costs, and prescription drug costs are capped for seniors at $2,000 a year.
Making the economy work for everyone: The IRA ensures that the biggest corporations making over $1 billion in profit a year pay their fair share. Michael helped write this part of the law — because Colorado teachers, firefighters, and law enforcement officials shouldn’t be paying more in taxes than billion-dollar corporations.
Investing in climate action and clean energy: The IRA set aside billions of dollars to help confront climate change and invest in clean energy. It will help address the 1,200 year drought we face in the West, restore the health of our forests, and prevent wildfires from threatening our communities. We're already seeing clean energy companies expand their operations and create thousands of jobs in our state. Altogether, this historic law has put the United States on track to reduce emissions by 40% by 2030.
For too long, the status quo in the United States has allowed giant corporations and special interests to get ahead, while our communities are left behind. The Inflation Reduction Act is helping change that.
Michael’s hard work ensured that the IRA became law and it's now bringing home huge investments for Colorado’s working families.
It was a major victory — but this work isn’t done yet.
The Inflation Reduction Act was only possible because we had the votes to overcome Republican obstruction in Congress. That’s why Michael is working so hard to ensure we can protect and expand our majorities in Congress.
Michael is fighting for working people. It’s why he doesn’t accept a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists — but it makes your grassroots support even more important. Will you donate now so he can keep up this vital work and elect Democrats who will work on the issues that really matter? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_081723_IRAfwd_act]
Thank you!
More to come,
Team Bennet

Team, did you know that only 13 states guarantee paid sick leave for workers?
In our opinion, that’s 37 states too few where parents have to choose between paying bills or coming into work sick.
It’s exactly why we’ve worked alongside voters across the country to enact the paid medical leave policies they needed _directly at the ballot box._
Fairness Project has helped win ballot measure campaigns that delivered paid family and medical leave to workers in Arizona, Colorado, Michigan, and Washington. We’re so proud of the work we’ve done to help change the lives of workers in these states, _**but with the majority of states having no guaranteed support for workers, we know there’s still so much work to be done.**_
**So what do you think, team: Should paid sick leave be a universal right across all 50 states?**
[YES →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68251310/422432098/798583493?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDM4M2VmNS0zMDNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CcPN5SEtdo5gi2DMfqhKf3suaAdxgllZy8k7CmeO0bo=&emci=019a1aa4-053d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=1d383ef5-303d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=561582)

name: Patty Murray
subject: A little bit about me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Hey, Peter – it's Patty. I'd like to tell you a little bit more about my journey to becoming one of the highest-ranking female Senators. It's a longer email, but I hope you'll take the time.
The truth is, I never thought I'd become a politician. Back in the 80s, I was a working mom and had enough on my plate as it was! That changed when local officials wanted to cut my kids' preschool program. I wanted to save it, so I packed up my kids and drove more than one hundred miles to our state capitol. That's when a male legislator told me I couldn't make a difference because I was **"just a mom in tennis shoes."** Well, I laced up those tennis shoes and fought back!
I jumped into action, organizing a coalition of 13,000 parents, and we successfully saved the preschool program. **That's when I realized government can make a meaningful difference if elected officials understand the needs of working moms and their families.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68251675/422433250/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk100-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDliZDVhNy0zMTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_1-RlKF-7T627rbJYR8mIveoqr2U9u_wBTEXNF4Eoc=)
_**A lot has changed since that legislator told me I'm "just a mom in tennis shoes," but one thing is the same: I'm still fighting for working families.**_
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68251676/422433251/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk100-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDliZDVhNy0zMTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_1-RlKF-7T627rbJYR8mIveoqr2U9u_wBTEXNF4Eoc=)
---
After I helped save that preschool program, I served on the Shoreline School Board and was elected to the Washington State Senate in 1988. That's when I got another big push to run for higher office. **Watching how Anita Hill was treated during the Clarence Thomas hearings, I felt like no one in those hearings was representing my voice and asking the questions that I would have.**
So that year, I announced my campaign for the U.S. Senate and was elected alongside three other women. Back then it was such a huge step forward for women in politics that they called 1992 **"The Year of the Woman." **
During my time in the Senate, I've been able to make so much progress for working families – even in an increasingly divided government. I've learned that you can find common ground with just about anyone – if you start negotiations from a place where you are willing to listen to one another, you can get results. That's how I was able to negotiate a budget to save our country from economic disaster when no one thought we could, and make progress on everything from protections for pregnant workers, to passing a bipartisan mental health package.
**None of this work would be possible without you, and your neighbors and friends who have championed my campaigns over the years. I can't thank you enough for always having my back.**
**[If you would like to support my work today, please make a $5 donation now. It's the best way to help Democrats keep our Senate majority, take back the House, and continue fighting for everything from affordable child care to abortion access and voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68251677/422433252/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk100-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDliZDVhNy0zMTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_1-RlKF-7T627rbJYR8mIveoqr2U9u_wBTEXNF4Eoc=)**
Thanks for reading,

Patty Murray
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=B8%2FIgcWnXDjhrA4suuz5k6Fyq9ws2UuXLqUQ9N3hBqeAdbnn3%2Bpoi%2BIDbxVOV%2BgIXXnMGwWeMQPpten0QFycP3Gvo0L76J6yBcRO64zPxG0DugVht7z0UzfqM8AvPzFjKSYCwfjre642CmJJ0DB9hC4d6eUq8%2Fbqlzou1EvWWhkE%2BNOMHeahsxlGPlGrLlG4I1Q4cLMrn%2FO8dPms%2FCi5Mj71kjd7lnpGUfsu%2BXfm68byd1Hi90KtpSx%2FG8FvIBhxP6Z66iez3KGLjCytKEfUGqjhsKxcPqm9zW51wy1c2%2F6RXG%2FO3%2F6%2BMbKMHJmYJpnzAyUZs2lYFn1oI3SoF7%2F2oaDxSyccKjk8Y7QS9rdo%2Bqv7d%2FuwwGPRUkX7ZcTzq2DWHGf0ZOv3k1DEbrY1KzJiyo1l4A6mRBkeSVeV0Hm0hZq97I39Y6MOXo8pKNIWG4VI) People for Patty Murray

clean_body: | | | Hey, Peter – it's Patty. I'd like to tell you a little bit more about my journey to becoming one of the highest-ranking female Senators. It's a longer email, but I hope you'll take the time. The truth is, I never thought I'd become a politician. Back in the 80s, I was a working mom and had enough on my plate as it was! That changed when local officials wanted to cut my kids' preschool program. I wanted to save it, so I packed up my kids and drove more than one hundred miles to our state capitol. That's when a male legislator told me I couldn't make a difference because I was "just a mom in tennis shoes." Well, I laced up those tennis shoes and fought back! I jumped into action, organizing a coalition of 13,000 parents, and we successfully saved the preschool program. That's when I realized government can make a meaningful difference if elected officials understand the needs of working moms and their families. = A lot has changed since that legislator told me I'm "just a mom in tennis shoes," but one thing is the same: I'm still fighting for working families. | | = After I helped save that preschool program, I served on the Shoreline School Board and was elected to the Washington State Senate in 1988. That's when I got another big push to run for higher office. Watching how Anita Hill was treated during the Clarence Thomas hearings, I felt like no one in those hearings was representing my voice and asking the questions that I would have. So that year, I announced my campaign for the U.S. Senate and was elected alongside three other women. Back then it was such a huge step forward for women in politics that they called 1992 "The Year of the Woman." During my time in the Senate, I've been able to make so much progress for working families – even in an increasingly divided government. I've learned that you can find common ground with just about anyone – if you start negotiations from a place where you are willing to listen to one another, you can get results. That's how I was able to negotiate a budget to save our country from economic disaster when no one thought we could, and make progress on everything from protections for pregnant workers, to passing a bipartisan mental health package. None of this work would be possible without you, and your neighbors and friends who have championed my campaigns over the years. I can't thank you enough for always having my back. = Thanks for reading, Patty Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: This is what we do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

The media is buzzing over Trump’s latest indictment, delivered right here in Georgia by Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis. There are nineteen alleged co-conspirators in all, a number that sadly includes the former chair of the Georgia GOP and a sitting GOP State Senator.

But like our Leader James Beverly said, "We are Georgia, and we are resilient. We are proud of our state, and we will continue to protect and uphold the values that define us. The indictment of Donald J. Trump is a step in the right direction, but we are prepared to keep marching forward in defense of our democracy."

As the Georgia House Democrats, we expect lawmakers to uphold their oaths and to represent their constituents - not to play games with elections in an effort to maintain power at all costs. Which is why we work hard to recruit and support Democratic candidates who believe in our platform, and who pledge every day to make honoring the rights of all Georgians a reality.

The time to strike is NOW, and you can help us. The radical GOP is being exposed for who they are, and this is our chance to open the doors to candidates who can help us earn a Democratic Majority in the House.

Your donation of any amount helps us expand our reach. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=081723_WhatWeDo_link]

Help us recruit candidates who share our values and show the radical GOP that respecting the law and standing up for the rights of all Georgians is how we can honor our state and the free and fair elections that are fundamental to our democracy.

Give $25 Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=081723_WhatWeDo_button1]

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=081723_WhatWeDo_button2]

Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC

Georgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A right-wing plan to target blue states:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68252828/422437679/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2IzNjBhMy0zODNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bljX-if8BcuSLO0XdcZWMe9LbH5hi--9TyFVvBH31UE=)
You may have missed this, Peter: Kevin McCarthy’s Super PAC, the Congressional Leadership Fund (CLF), recently launched a formal effort to win districts in traditionally blue states – like California, New York, and yes, _Illinois._ They’re calling it the “Blue States Project”. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68252829/422437684/2043242937?refcode=em-8.17.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2IzNjBhMy0zODNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bljX-if8BcuSLO0XdcZWMe9LbH5hi--9TyFVvBH31UE=) Let me explain why this matters for us: IL-17 is going to be the _most_ competitive district in our state, and this news means the GOP will be pouring in lots of money to try and unseat me.** ** **While I’m confident I have the trust of the people of this district, there’s no doubt I’ll need some help on the fundraising side to weather the storm of attacks coming our way.** [**There’s never been a better time to make your first grassroots contribution to our campaign, Peter. Will you chip in just $5 to help us ensure the GOP strategy to target blue states fails?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68252830/422437685/2043242937?refcode=em-8.17.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2IzNjBhMy0zODNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bljX-if8BcuSLO0XdcZWMe9LbH5hi--9TyFVvBH31UE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68252831/422437690/2043242937?refcode=em-8.17.23-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2IzNjBhMy0zODNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bljX-if8BcuSLO0XdcZWMe9LbH5hi--9TyFVvBH31UE=)**

He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. clean_body: | = You may have missed this, Peter: Kevin McCarthy’s Super PAC, the Congressional Leadership Fund (CLF), recently launched a formal effort to win districts in traditionally blue states – like California, New York, and yes, Illinois. They’re calling it the “Blue States Project”. = Let me explain why this matters for us: IL-17 is going to be the most competitive district in our state, and this news means the GOP will be pouring in lots of money to try and unseat me. While I’m confident I have the trust of the people of this district, there’s no doubt I’ll need some help on the fundraising side to weather the storm of attacks coming our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support powers this campaign. Thank you. Eric ** | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Fellow Conservative,

It’s Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy writing to you from Montana this afternoon.

Recently I came across an email from my opponent in my inbox in which he wrote to his supporters that he is “ _**one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators**_ ,” and that political experts are saying that his “ _**[Senate] seat is one of the most likely to flip red unless folks like you help**_ ...”

**He’s right** – he is vulnerable to defeat, and for good reason. Jon Tester represents a state in the United States Senate that Donald Trump won in 2020 by SIXTEEN POINTS.

Meanwhile, **Tester is in the United States Senate voting with Joe Biden 91% of the time.** I have a message for Jon: We’re running to represent Montana, NOT MASSACHUSETTS. _**

I know Jon Tester is vulnerable**_

_**Jon Tester knows he is vulnerable**_

****But unless you’re aware that this Senate race is one of Republicans' best chances to defeat a Democrat incumbent and flip the Senate, none of it is going to matter.****

Races are won by campaigns who can reach their target audience more efficiently and with greater regularity.

Right now, we’re losing the money game. ****[{link to donate}](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd5902bf853143ec91a8c0b5c92fca12&_e=rxoyZId4YrBznSWduPUSM3kzx3ryYgA4-qC5Cwl97IlOkBh8p9ZaqDB2k3P-B9boWlPPdOQe6YAIqZ8UJqmC9wFFcboNLy2Y3Tbr7NNDtYX_zV7e_CULbE9ZDlQfwFvaq9ZTRiDiwmRdxV0oAwhAZYCNYBeeycIlNX06ZZ8t1eZo_vYZBw4QGvzL2fAqfm_mRQysV3wZhrpCGFl15NK6EegjPdZNgO2082nNc3ldUC3aMXmtEaV1piPITfO77zqaNIMvrhNNXjkGp3qeREMO2fSgdkw_yWY_-4_WjV6dFUQJamZv11ng00ruqjNRWQcGrh9qznxMzjhKw82YD3Ip2qhgeEiiqly43sJjU2bnZhKlWYzoQ9Jb9B3KVZaDDsMkhCDgvfq8Vj_c7xt8ZDE7Xy6yzPLlYnpTlBsmYfRVVuw%3D)**** Sen. Tester has raised more than $10 million this year from small-dollar donors like you. We’ve raised a fraction of that. We really need the help. Your donation really might make all the difference.

[**LINK TO DONATE** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd5902bf853143ec91a8c0b5c92fca12&_e=rxoyZId4YrBznSWduPUSM3kzx3ryYgA4-qC5Cwl97IlOkBh8p9ZaqDB2k3P-B9boWlPPdOQe6YAIqZ8UJqmC9wFFcboNLy2Y3Tbr7NNDtYX_zV7e_CULbE9ZDlQfwFvaq9ZTRiDiwmRdxV0oAwhAZYCNYBeeycIlNX06ZZ8t1eZo_vYZBw4QGvzL2fAqfm_mRQysV3wZhrpCGFl15NK6EegjPdZNgO2082nNc3ldUC3aMXmtEaV1piPITfO77zqac8T7mz_OFlZ9_6bARNe43nl0EHBfIQaBc-m7eag9yGu1eRJrA3U60pj29RWiN1OuHTXPM9FEjBh9gUmZtsOkbgtFsgKiAKWl3MSO0xI37cWlTIiAreVkBgxFUJhmJkXWfq20Tzy7oNvvO5LFR5d7RKsSapeJpYMUGnryyMVUjiw%3D)

**Please let me hear from you now or in the very near future.**

I cannot win this race without support from conservatives around the country.

**Not only will this be the toughest undertaking of my life, but it’ll also be ugly, too.**

You may or may not know who Jon Tester is but let me tell you this right now: _**you need to know his name**_. You’re going to be hearing it a lot over the coming 15 months.

[**I'D BE GRATEFUL IF YOU DONATED TODAY** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd5902bf853143ec91a8c0b5c92fca12&_e=rxoyZId4YrBznSWduPUSM3kzx3ryYgA4-qC5Cwl97IlOkBh8p9ZaqDB2k3P-B9boWlPPdOQe6YAIqZ8UJqmC9wFFcboNLy2Y3Tbr7NNDtYX_zV7e_CULbE9ZDlQfwFvaq9ZTRiDiwmRdxV0oAwhAZYCNYBeeycIlNX06ZZ8t1eZo_vYZBw4QGvzL2fAqfm_mRQysV3wZhrpCGFl15NK6EegjPdZNgO2082nNc3ldUC3aMXmtEaV1piPITfO77zqa1GPF3oS6TBRWI-cHLFXMtfH0V_pW7dB9wsFnAsivArw2JXlo--hRhvHEP2hJ_A_rEtV-LwmQK044o0vQkLeY9L2wqwyh424YQcTwr6HJDwtusgMcAWXdTHus4X3TBqFPNkA-lfQjdUezTidH16trh5mdljKwVOvCUFc2_6Z0p0w%3D)

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

body:
|
#
---
Ahead of the 2024 presidential election, GOP leaders in Georgia are moving to remove _**nearly TWO HUNDRED THOUSAND voters from the voter rolls.**_ This move comes right as groups across Georgia are suing the state government for diluting the Black vote, just as the GOP did in Alabama and Louisiana. Not only that, but it was reported that GOP activists in Georgia challenged the rights of nearly 100,000 voters. **[Team, we’re up against rampant GOP voter suppression in Georgia, and we need your support. subject: Why our early campaign is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
While we're in some of the hardest months for fundraising right now, our deadline to fundraise hits in early December, and we must make up for lost time.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253026/422438338/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230817-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDJiNDRkYmItMzgzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OHcVw8T2EGACUQ7Gm1yeqGtlp633e8gTXCBQJhMNhNo=)

| Peter,

Do you know why it's so critical we make high fundraising marks early on?

As commissioner of public lands, Hilary Franz has a duty to the people of Washington and our state first and foremost. That means all campaign fundraising must come to a halt just before and during the legislative session.

While we're in some of the hardest months for fundraising right now, our deadline to fundraise hits in early December, _**and we must make up for lost time.**_

[_**So, Peter,will you join Hilary on her journey to create a brighter Washington for us all by contributing $10 today? Your support now will help prepare our campaign for the fundraising freeze ahead.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253027/422438339/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230817-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDJiNDRkYmItMzgzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OHcVw8T2EGACUQ7Gm1yeqGtlp633e8gTXCBQJhMNhNo=)

subject: Who's NEXT?
body:
Michigan, the deadline is approaching! | | | | | Can't see images? [Browser View](https://mailchi.mp/c20d959e31b3/whos-next?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| |
# Party of the Constitution
---

Michigan, the deadline is approaching!
The Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference is just over five weeks away and we have an outstanding lineup of speakers. This includes renowned keynote speakers such as **JIM CAVIEZEL** , **KARI LAKE** , **DINESH D’SOUZA** , **ZUBY** , and many others.
Any predictions on who the next major speaker will be? Also, who are you hoping to see announced for the conference?
**NEW MIGOP** In February 2023, Michigan's constitutional patriots cast their votes to redirect the Michigan Republican Party (MIGOP) from its political and morally left-leaning path toward the 'uni-party.' Michigan has a dedicated group of citizens who are resolute in their efforts to revitalize our political party.
Our objective is to ensure that MIGOP is fully aligned with the principles of the Constitution. We must sacrifice to ensure our children and grandchildren inherit usable God-given unalienable rights.
The era of moral relativism that tested the justice of our one true God who controls nations has passed.
The new leaders of MIGOP who support the Constitution are implementing it as the standard for accountability, electability, and governance within the party.
**PATRIOT ALERT!!!** SEPTEMBER 22-24, 20234Join the ranks of renowned patriot speakers JIM CAVIEZEL, KARI LAKE, DINESH D’SOUZA, ZUBY, and many other inspiring patriots who will be revealed soon.
This event aims to reinforce the party's foundation by anchoring it on constitutional and moral principles. The restoration of the party is crucial to secure the future of our children and grandchildren, ensuring that they inherit liberty instead of tyranny. We must strive to provide them with the freedom and opportunities to pursue their American Dream.
Come and join us at the Mackinac Island conference to be a part of the movement restoring Michigan. Together, we can unite as populists and patriots to change the direction of the state from ruin to prosperity.
**MIGOP IS THE PARTY OF THE CONSTITUTION!**
| [PURCHASE HOTEL & CONFERENCE TICKETS NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=85ce2b846a&e=a2af77507c)
---
### PRESERVE, PROTECT and DEFEND the Constitution of the United States,
### SO HELP ME GOD.
| [DONATE NOW](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=fd44595b82&e=a2af77507c)

We’re likely to face another competitive primary next year, and conservative interest groups could come out of the woodwork to spend against us. The Balint Organizing Corps will continue on after the summer ends, and we hope to open a field office soon.

clean_body: Here’s what that means for us | | Dear Peter, It’s August 17, which means the month is officially more than halfway over! We just crunched the numbers this morning, and we have some bad news: We’ve only raised about 30% of our goal for online fundraising this month. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = You may be wondering: It’s the off-year! Why does Becca need to raise money? It’s a fair question! But the thing is, when you run for Congress every two years, campaigning never really stops. We’re likely to face another competitive primary next year, and conservative interest groups could come out of the woodwork to spend against us. The Balint Organizing Corps will continue on after the summer ends, and we hope to open a field office soon. We can’t take a single thing for granted, and we can’t afford to let our campaign operations lapse.= Thanks, Team Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

| | Peter,

This week, Americans celebrate the anniversary of the Inflation Reduction Act, landmark legislation that brought critical relief to Californians and made historic investments in climate action, healthcare, and more.

[I want to hear your thoughts about the IRA. Can you take 60 seconds to answer a few questions?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253918/422441465/638082775?refcode=JK_EM_SV_WL_230816_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwOGY0OTEtM2IzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bHbp8EXpRiCWdGEdq2wVDiaSk-1BGyC15aicVe-qeB8=&emci=9d249dbb-803c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9608f491-3b3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8978519) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253919/422441466/638082775?refcode=JK_EM_SV_WL_230816_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwOGY0OTEtM2IzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bHbp8EXpRiCWdGEdq2wVDiaSk-1BGyC15aicVe-qeB8=&emci=9d249dbb-803c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9608f491-3b3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8978519)**

The Inflation Reduction Act capped the ever-growing price of insulin at $35 out-of-pocket, expanded healthcare for low-income Americans, created clean-energy jobs, invested in low-carbon infrastructure, and more.

I believe that Congress’ role is to do what’s best for their constituents, and the Inflation Reduction Act is best for California.

I am committed to protecting the critical progress of the IRA and I will always put Californians first.

[Will you let me know what you think about the Inflation Reduction Act by sharing your thoughts in my IRA survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253920/422441467/638082775?refcode=JK_EM_SV_WL_230816_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwOGY0OTEtM2IzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bHbp8EXpRiCWdGEdq2wVDiaSk-1BGyC15aicVe-qeB8=&emci=9d249dbb-803c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9608f491-3b3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8978519) | **[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253921/422441468/638082775?refcode=JK_EM_SV_WL_230816_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTYwOGY0OTEtM2IzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bHbp8EXpRiCWdGEdq2wVDiaSk-1BGyC15aicVe-qeB8=&emci=9d249dbb-803c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9608f491-3b3d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8978519)**

name: Tamie
subject: Sending Anthony off to college—
body:
Here’s what I’m thinking of at this moment...| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253988/422441597/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDEwNDJkYTUtM2IzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w7Sc-e8rJd3eu8hr4nriZ-kzbfiKvrMJbtzudx96oSc=)
---
Friend, I am packing the family car today and helping my son move on out to college over the weekend. It’s a bittersweet moment for me and for parents of college-age children who are leaving home for college, apprenticeships, or other post-high school activities. I’m so proud of my son Anthony and the person that he is, all he has done already in his life, and everything I know he will accomplish in the future. Anthony is a student athlete and I'm excited to see him compete at the collegiate level.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253989/422441598/1649708063?refcode=collegeNGP_picture&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDEwNDJkYTUtM2IzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w7Sc-e8rJd3eu8hr4nriZ-kzbfiKvrMJbtzudx96oSc=)
---
One thing that stands out more than just about anything when I think about Anthony by himself at college and entrusted to the educators, coaches, and support staff at the school: safety. I worry about gun violence and campus security, like I did during most of his time in high school. It’s hard not to feel vulnerable as our kids head off to new places without us, though I am confident about where he will be. I also think about the pressures that student athletes in particular are exposed to. We’ve seen story after story come out about doctors, coaches, and trainers who abuse the trust placed in them, as these young athletes strive to perform and compete to their fullest potential. This resonates deeply with me, not just as a mother but as a woman running for Congress against Jim Jordan. **While Jordan was a wrestling coach at OSU, a team doctor sexually abused hundreds of athletes** —some of them wrestlers who reported abuse to Jim Jordan. Jordan swept those reports under the rug and discouraged the students brave enough to come forward from pursuing it any further. **Perpetrators of abuse often are only able to get away with their crimes due to enablers, like Jim Jordan, who cover for them.** As my son heads off to college to learn, grow, and compete as an athlete, I take some solace knowing that social awareness around abuse and exploitation has come a long way. But justice is often slow—and in some cases, doesn’t come at all. In Jim Jordan’s case, things are starting to turn against him, finally. **From his central role planning Trump’s attempted coup, to his involvement in the OSU sex abuse scandal, the walls are closing in on Jordan.** As I prepare to send Anthony off to college, I am even more determined and passionate about ensuring that Jim Jordan gets what he deserves politically: a resounding rejection by the voters. **[If you can help me make sure this happens, I need you on my side in this fight. Jim Jordan is corrupt, but he and his cronies fight dirty and we are going to need everyone invested in defeating him to join this movement:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68253990/422441599/1649708063?refcode=collegeNGP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDEwNDJkYTUtM2IzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w7Sc-e8rJd3eu8hr4nriZ-kzbfiKvrMJbtzudx96oSc=)**

name: Working Families Power
subject: To Stop Cop City, we need 10k more signatures by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Billion-dollar businesses and elected officials in Atlanta have been trying to build Cop City for two years — despite enormous public backlash. We know that we have the people on our side, and that we can win a referendum to make sure that Cop City — a $90 million mock city where police forces can test weapons and explosives, helicopter landings, and further militarize law enforcement against communities — will never get built. In order to trigger a referendum and let voters decide, our coalition needs 70,000 valid signatures. **We’re excited to announce that so far, we’ve collected 90,000 signatures from Atlanta voters!** But during the validation process, it is inevitable that some petition signatures will be marked invalid as the city government fights tooth and nail to stop this movement. **So before we turn in our signatures this Monday, August 21, we need to collect 10,000 more to be certain that we have everything we need to make the ballot. And it’s not too late to get involved.** **[Join a Stop Cop City phone bank TONIGHT at 7 PM ET to reach Atlanta voters who have not yet signed the petition and make sure they have the chance to make their voices heard.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGE7MhEImCy2jH4PhQMOOGTDRxer5mkndcZzc4-wpMf9yQE4u2pJyxQOeStyO_-Mp38musApSyoiWIBJ_w_r8lchfq7XJgPlUH-l9lNmuG72OEQWDSwbI7hNKGxrMAGIaKeyqs9dSU3FxLuLLTO0z1uzfY3fHYPwMSyHIhmQqP5T_qI9peddquV9BSH7b1tE77ObagS50fzjS8N06gGwHvvhHAD51qoukiFJvVsKKkIn6rnevMcSozkZqYLII2Os99fKxvsYZpxAIqASEIEcg1q1CJlklJE1_L0n7QwcWF6dhGm3JiGkuOL4shOHb17XQA/3yt/nZVNPzAuSz2x23JXG2Sc3A/h0/X3JB271YhUiE9nvPpEeI33Q9hQvCuHMlddQ-f6yOsd4)** **[Join a Stop Cop City phone bank](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGE7MhEImCy2jH4PhQMOOGTDRxer5mkndcZzc4-wpMf9yQE4u2pJyxQOeStyO_-Mp38musApSyoiWIBJ_w_r8leYN8gb-w7bZtc4QSqzY4G0LLkmG5CAa3q9KwUYkXmSsdQ8HqVSvqe_VKNhLpMKTkwVNp1FiKLrD-YJSEIyeCE1NjgKydmdur5oy9d2jZs35Q5-FWKmpGUY5zDR53sZcspPQw-bJlS3p0LgbDGFcGky5GURa7JBn7yL9CWltuzACiCvKf4hfUuJrda-qBxeZ80zZzfevpxFKzzWrHRNBL_O6eXy2cEOLvYHvDbdri5s8Q/3yt/nZVNPzAuSz2x23JXG2Sc3A/h1/3Wal3N5jnSI2AKeXq1k38pXszWF6n9ML4Sl7jlpxPMU)** **[Can’t make the phone bank?
