name: Replace Sinema
subject: Kyrsten Sinema & Donald Trump
body:
How Sinema bolstered Trump’s radical agenda | | | Peter – If you haven’t heard yet, former twice-impeached President Donald Trump was *finally* indicted for his role in the January 6th attack on the Capitol and for trying to steal the election. Seems like as good a time as any to remind you of all the times Kyrsten Sinema sided with and empowered Donald Trump during his four years in office:
* Sinema voted in favor of Trump Tax Scam 2.0 which created big tax cuts for the wealthy;
* Sinema voted to confirm 95 Trump-appointed judges, including some with extreme records against abortion rights and LGBT equality;
* Sinema voted TWICE to fund Trump’s border wall.

Then, after Trump was out of office, Sinema had the chance to undo some of his damage. Instead, she **BLOCKED** **voting rights legislation even as MAGA Trump allies were pushing anti-democracy bills in Arizona and states across the country, and she REFUSED to codify abortion rights even after Trump’s installed Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade.** Simply put, Sinema empowered Trump when he was in office, and then did nothing to undo the damage he caused when he left. **[Help us hold Kyrsten Sinema accountable and make sure she never wins election again>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wFfFGKwvZZ8k6r0PUsOFI1MClzRbyCiOI97RlUwMPNirRXhhWEjpXMukwxRt9IhaaUWFvvTg59fGqiY4KS3KQ6Vb2gX8oFSOkoWM0DLxyHqI2no-24RA1i-BvjO7qhehZEGD9h0_x6mw4A2ThlV2nm3Djh-1u7fecn4_SetGxyupuDelAhBRmDgW-Vs4bgieSMtDF0mnIDDc385wTrJAQkb9sStJzKxw-TjuunT1TkW-7KuECSZ26lE9MLndFNV8yZmm0-aY6FhqFfxLPjGGquOwD4aGwb2uUUXfO8Q28Ekg/3yt/xs8d1fxnQxKHMoTUJP_KZQ/h0/wHnepQBC-TrIWSCTw-YF7HWkjgllQ-FM0jRFdafBFGI)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wFfFGKwvZZ8k6r0PUsOFI19Tvn1ZJ_kmBz-Tcj9PvopOw8rqsloEAPOSivRTBEQUjdgrCMTlsf8NWn9bwGMh-Oq3mAIoUT0ExH8muf8w-XWl25XEpdHdR0leEvocrIE-OAAAQex15y2_cFT1O2ZXK-ryMi1WYIxuA7UGdjRwUWSaAnH8sP-p41PyDdq0GBTK8nrrdk0J0_yM_Um6HCM6sIdxYntCaf2RdNTdT4_nsFw55ITU6tRka4zppSpkvNs7MloyXQWh_3XOkHEOONbC0mkF7qXzjEYZ8AjHYLnyFwi8rD_NP8TwE_muP_ndKhBYeQW3fBT1wq87u1mtTTOfW1/3yt/xs8d1fxnQxKHMoTUJP_KZQ/h1/T6xsiaQSw5feiODxeOu93Ubmo1SFACdui9eGJpNFk7E)

clean_body: How Sinema bolstered Trump’s radical agenda | | | Peter – If you haven’t heard yet, former twice-impeached President Donald Trump was finally indicted for his role in the January 6th attack on the Capitol and for trying to steal the election. Seems like as good a time as any to remind you of all the times Kyrsten Sinema sided with and empowered Donald Trump during his four years in office: Sinema voted in favor of Trump Tax Scam 2.0 which created big tax cuts for the wealthy; Sinema voted to confirm 95 Trump-appointed judges, including some with extreme records against abortion rights and LGBT equality; Sinema voted TWICE to fund Trump’s border wall. Then, after Trump was out of office, Sinema had the chance to undo some of his damage. Instead, she BLOCKED voting rights legislation even as MAGA Trump allies were pushing anti-democracy bills in Arizona and states across the country, and she REFUSED to codify abortion rights even after Trump’s installed Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Simply put, Sinema empowered Trump when he was in office, and then did nothing to undo the damage he caused when he left. Friend, _“Being one of 14 children during back to school season was very difficult for my immigrant parents. We would definitely use our backpacks for multiple years and share clothes, but there was always a need for new supplies like folders, paper, and notebooks, that helped us start the school year successfully. I still remember, as the eldest, asking my parents for the calculator I needed for algebra and geometry. They couldn't afford one so I borrowed one from a classmate until a teacher got me one._ _It is so important that we come together as a loving community to help families who may be struggling to ensure their child has everything they need this school year. Please check out how you can help below.”_ _\- Rashida_ **What can you do to help families in our community?** It can cost up to $1,000 per household for school supplies. With most families living paycheck to paycheck, those expenses are out of reach. **We are raising funds to support the many local school-supply drives.** Michigan schools start on August 28th, and different organizations are collecting various school supplies and essential items like food for families in need. We are continuing to receive requests for support, and we have just a few weeks to get students prepared and ready to thrive. [**Can you donate to our school supplies fund today to support families in need?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yIJa8wYjziNGzGo_bOaWl2xxgMwPGQUl4iXjhBGoJTgRxCYzoBQM5QRB6KEL2xXD-aNurbE9NqSeEVrl8CgO1mBJ2X_3FH__AGxF0iD2TWi21_KdcdOu03eo1TZS7SQk0BbnMZuG6GZ8NoOalBltDwNGMHfT6qnxFYraCR1PHFKF4-DjotQPJHgyIXbB4daa-LMa34Vnz30CwQ0bobOKTeNUxlwWqJn0qhSchGpmeqwWrm-kr8syIH4h14IG_h6P00uabeX-IrVF6lkBpSyvxQf1wkYg55m1Cts_nQHfQh-7i-3wVCqKeRyc9Y0bYNY3H5otAMGFxx5TG2gsJBDKrPKZf4ShWA-xlUBeBdMER6DA/3yt/OfOMj2jxRTuaZHLWDycaxg/h1/4ZLGG1vcYMdQNzB-wOY6SFzCIoCRu_s8_l7Ij7SGc4c)**(** All donations to this fund will go to school-supply drives for students in Michigan’s 12th congressional district.) | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yIJa8wYjziNGzGo_bOaWl2xxgMwPGQUl4iXjhBGoJTgaWuL2Gje6t32w8uVxZxdsUcylxOjr_uY-IqA2LVQO6aMiak679Yx2svxYZUR5tGj1PxhkbD8fr7_E6pg-Nb0vcmPonoIA56tpwLilBBZzcJBuJFqRiLs67SaBsLL45rUhUn7luZ1b5IztQAxjq9R8ILenuaTIAN_2_rzfVIdMJwZwkIwSjfHf6Zp-XGsbUVohtdouLWyTye_fw2SFspuIpgBHaGAwOZimBC7YTrifor6gVFosExVBuhfzfhuT5CNcf0hhYh-aTCew8qnFr8DZKDx8r8PBgJuV4ZXGebK5YD9I3r26WFHaKksIos1_ZnLw/3yt/OfOMj2jxRTuaZHLWDycaxg/h2/9ge9NZyKRjR-tGAdQRB_0owd7FId7583KqkzuKBfUKQ)

clean_body: Rashida is a public servant who’s rooted in her community. | | | Friend, “Being one of 14 children during back to school season was very difficult for my immigrant parents. We would definitely use our backpacks for multiple years and share clothes, but there was always a need for new supplies like folders, paper, and notebooks, that helped us start the school year successfully. I still remember, as the eldest, asking my parents for the calculator I needed for algebra and geometry. They couldn't afford one so I borrowed one from a classmate until a teacher got me one. It is so important that we come together as a loving community to help families who may be struggling to ensure their child has everything they need this school year. Please check out how you can help below.” \- Rashida What can you do to help families in our community? It can cost up to $1,000 per household for school supplies. With most families living paycheck to paycheck, those expenses are out of reach. We are raising funds to support the many local school-supply drives. Michigan schools start on August 28th, and different organizations are collecting various school supplies and essential items like food for families in need. We are continuing to receive requests for support, and we have just a few weeks to get students prepared and ready to thrive. ( All donations to this fund will go to school-supply drives for students in Michigan’s 12th congressional district.) | We’re supporting backpack giveaways like we do every year. We are donating your contributions to various organizations helping purchase school supplies. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for helping to build communities and a society where everyone can thrive. In solidarity, Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | | **_Breaking News:_ Trump is indicted for the fourth time, related to Georgia election meddling in the 2020 Election**

Peter,

Earlier this week, Trump was indicted for the fourth time – this time related to his attempt to overthrow the results of the 2020 Election.

I don’t forget how he tried to fight the results in Pennsylvania, too.

**Remember the Four Seasons Total Landscaping press conference?** _Now, who could forget that?!_

I don’t forget how he tried to fight the results in Pennsylvania, too. Remember the Four Seasons Total Landscaping press conference? Now, who could forget that?! But seriously, I’m up against MAGA Republicans in this must-win House race, and election security and voting rights have never been more important. The House plays a big role in certifying the results of the presidential election, so we can’t afford to lose in 2024. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Martin, Team Harder
subject: Negative ads cost how much?
body:
Look how nasty it got. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68254772/422444175/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU2NDQxYTMtNDAzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8TjC8wclfhfRvQhp7R3hpi4gra2W4dTOu-SMdcvkfgI=) | Hey Peter, As Kevin McCarthy’s #1 target, the attacks against Josh are coming nonstop. In the past, they’ve spent _millions_ against us - and look how nasty it got: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68254773/422444176/1156059191?&refcode=E3781-20230817-TVAds-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU2NDQxYTMtNDAzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8TjC8wclfhfRvQhp7R3hpi4gra2W4dTOu-SMdcvkfgI=) So today I’m going to explain our TV strategy and if you can chip in anything you can to help us prepare to fight back with our first ad, I’ll leave a link [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68254775/422444178/1156059191?&refcode=E3781-20230817-TVAds-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU2NDQxYTMtNDAzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8TjC8wclfhfRvQhp7R3hpi4gra2W4dTOu-SMdcvkfgI=). **Here’s why TV ads are so important:** As annoying as TV ads can be, the data shows they are one of the most effective tools we have for communicating with persuadable voters. Even with more people turning to streaming platforms, traditional TV is still king. Interestingly, this is especially true for the all-important swing voters. But TV ads can also be tricky. First, you have to have the right message. You only have 30 seconds to make an impact on the voters - it has to be memorable and strike just the right tone on the right issue. We go through hundreds of ideas before we land on the perfect script. FWIW that’s why you see such insane negative ads, they only have 30 seconds to grab your attention and scare you into voting. Once you have the script, then you need to hire an entire film crew to shoot, edit and produce the ad. It’s a ton of work. On top of it all, TV ads are incredibly expensive, especially for us here in the Valley. We’re in the Sacramento media market which is _one of the most expensive media markets in the country._ **Now let’s do some math:** In order for an ad to be memorable it needs to be viewed consistently. If you only see an ad once, you probably won’t remember it. The metric we use for this is “points”. It normally takes about 1000 points for a person to see an ad enough to remember it. In our district, it costs $565 for 1 pt of television or $565,000 for 1,000 pts. Yep that’s right, it costs _half a million dollars_ to run an effective ad here. **Josh doesn’t have Super PACs or special interests to accomplish all of this. He only has real supporters like you, Peter. That’s why we’re counting on your support.** **[Can you please rush in a donation right now so we can fight back with new ads and everything we’ve got to keep this seat blue? We can’t lose to the MAGA extremists.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68254777/422444180/1156059191?&refcode=E3781-20230817-TVAds-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU2NDQxYTMtNDAzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8TjC8wclfhfRvQhp7R3hpi4gra2W4dTOu-SMdcvkfgI=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68254779/422444182/1156059191?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3781-20230817-TVAds-EG-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU2NDQxYTMtNDAzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8TjC8wclfhfRvQhp7R3hpi4gra2W4dTOu-SMdcvkfgI=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68254781/422444184/1156059191?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3781-20230817-TVAds-EG-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTU2NDQxYTMtNDAzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8TjC8wclfhfRvQhp7R3hpi4gra2W4dTOu-SMdcvkfgI=)

Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans have shown just how out-of-step their agenda is with the needs and priorities of Americans nationwide, but their mega-donor supporters are happy to fund far-right candidates in competitive areas like the Philadelphia suburbs. Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans have shown just how out-of-step their agenda is with the needs and priorities of Americans nationwide, but their mega-donor supporters are happy to fund far-right candidates in competitive areas like the Philadelphia suburbs.

Tonight is the end of our 48-hour deadline to recruit 48 grassroots donors, and we need just 5 more donations to reach that goal.

Only if you’re able, I hope you might consider chipping in— here’s a link our team created just for you: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/md_augustmm#Team-Dean](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68254993/422445219/227784799?amount=25&refcode=08172023_md_midmonth_fr_3&refcode2=3de13a08-413d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGUxM2EwOC00MTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fi3dC2kuCSOc9100mHcOgoBcMruSkY9Q3roheNml48Q=)**

With gratitude,

_Madeleine_

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. ---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team Pramila
subject: We can and MUST do better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Let's be clear: These tragic outcomes of our current broken immigration system are a conscious policy choice
#
Peter,
Everyone knows that our current immigration system is deeply flawed, cruel and broken. **And we can and MUST do better.**
Pramila's citizenship story is all too familiar to the millions of families who have endured our current immigration system. As the first South Asian woman elected to the House, and one of only two dozen naturalized citizens to be elected to Congress, Pramila spent 17 years fighting for her citizenship due to an out-of-date and difficult-to-navigate immigration system.
**It's long past time for comprehensive immigration reform that guarantees a HUMANE system for ALL.** That's why Pramila is working tirelessly to bring transformative legislation to support immigrants and encourage safe and effective pathways to citizenship.**[If you stand with our movement, please consider supporting Pramila and her work in Congress by making a contribution to our collective movement today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44475?refcode=em20230817-2824&t=1&akid=2824%2E420207%2EOrXgTX)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44475?refcode=em20230817-2824&t=20&akid=2824%2E420207%2EOrXgTX)**
**Immigrants deserve to be treated with dignity and respect.** Yet Texas Gov. Greg Abbott has tirelessly spearheaded efforts to unnecessarily threaten the lives of immigrants who are fighting to cross the river in search of asylum. It's beyond cruel.
Let's be clear, Peter: These tragic outcomes of our current broken immigration system are a conscious policy choice. **Any humane country and state would do everything to protect the lives of immigrants.**
**But instead, the Texas government decided to string millions of razor sharp coils along the riverbank and install a wall of sharp buoys — deliberately making it deadly to seek asylum. Not only is this dangerous, it's blatantly evil. **
**Together, we can and must fight for real reform that modernizes our immigration systems and ensures that no person is forced to wait extraordinary times to become a citizen, or even risk their lives and the lives of their families to search for safety. There's so much work that needs to be done both in and out of Congress, but together we can fight for what's truly right.**
**Now more than ever, we need the entirety of our collective voice to step up and show up for immigrants.[Please chip in today to support Pramila and our collective movement as we fight for transformative immigration reform. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44475?refcode=em20230817-2824&t=21&akid=2824%2E420207%2EOrXgTX)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230817-2824-footer&t=22&refcode2=2824_420207_OrXgTX&akid=2824%2E420207%2EOrXgTX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2824%2E420207%2EOrXgTX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2824%2E420207%2EOrXgTX)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: National Honeybee Day is Saturday
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1934492?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **National Honey Bee Day is this Saturday, Friend! Celebrate bees and other pollinators by telling the EPA to BAN bee-killing pesticides before it’s too late! ** _Can you bee-lieve that honeybees could face another 15 years of toxic neonics if the EPA doesn’t step up?_ Hard-working bees are the backbone of our food system. They contribute to **1 in 3 bites of food** that we eat, along with other pollinators. That includes some of the most delicious and nutritious fruits, veggies and nuts, like strawberries, melons, tomatoes— _even almonds!_ Imagine what our grocery shelves would look like without bees. Beekeepers have lost 40% of their hives on average in recent years. And honeybees aren’t the only ones in danger. Over the past two decades, the American Bumblebee population **dropped by 89%.** The beloved Western Bumblebee population **dropped by 93%** and the Rusty-Patched Bumblebee population **by 87%**. If the EPA approves another 15 YEARS of neonics, we could risk driving many wild bee species closer to __**EXTINCTION.**__ NEONICS are **POISONING** the nectar that bees need to survive and contaminating the environments they live in. Neonics attack bees’ nervous system and can **harm their ability to navigate, find food, fight pests and diseases, and even reproduce. ** [**Ahead of National Honey Bee Day, show bees some appreciation by taking action! Friend, we need 213 signatures from your area to hit our goal and help SAVE BEES. Act now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1934493?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1934494?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Neonics don’t hurt just bees, Friend. These pesticides are found on many of the foods that you eat and _CANNOT BE WASHED OFF_. Neonics have been linked to **birth defects of the heart and brain, hormone disruption, and autism. Children are the most vulnerable to exposure!**
The EPA itself has acknowledged how harmful neonics are for pollinators and hundreds of threatened and endangered species – but it is under tremendous pressure from Big Ag to perpetuate the rampant use of these _bee-killing pesticides for another 15 years._[**Please take less than 60 seconds to help us SAVE pollinators, PROTECT our health and our ecosystems by signing your name immediately!!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1934495?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1934494?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: James Carville
subject: Wisconsin will be the tipping point state in next year’s elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68255449/422446758/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNiNWZiOC00MTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l2d49ZyYA8h3mrP8McwerpWWbRhRSXgHXeX1lhm3wGo=&emci=5ee5f396-323d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=7b3b5fb8-413d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hey Peter — James Carville here. Let me tell you about the race that’s brewing in Wisconsin.

I don’t say this lightly when I tell you Wisconsin will be the tipping point state in next year’s elections. **Defending our Senate majority and the White House depends on reelecting Tammy Baldwin and keeping Wisconsin blue.**

And trust me when I tell you: Wisconsin’s elections are decided by razor-thin margins. Less than 1 percentage point decided the last two presidential elections, and Republican Ron Johnson won Wisconsin’s other Senate seat by just 1 point last year.

Republicans poured $77 MILLION into Wisconsin to squeak out that narrow victory, and God knows what they have in store to flip Tammy’s seat and deliver the Senate majority for Mitch McConnell.

Listen here, Peter: If we don’t pick up the pace now, we’ll be playing catch up to the campaign war chest Republicans are amassing to go after Tammy.

[**_I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t important: Can you split a donation between Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia before their deadline? Georgia and Wisconsin are two of our MOST important states to win in 2024._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68255450/422446759/2063583167?refcode=20230817.2_TB_8AA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjNiNWZiOC00MTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l2d49ZyYA8h3mrP8McwerpWWbRhRSXgHXeX1lhm3wGo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Hey Peter — James Carville here. Let me tell you about the race that’s brewing in Wisconsin. I don’t say this lightly when I tell you Wisconsin will be the tipping point state in next year’s elections. Defending our Senate majority and the White House depends on reelecting Tammy Baldwin and keeping Wisconsin blue. And trust me when I tell you: Wisconsin’s elections are decided by razor-thin margins. Less than 1 percentage point decided the last two presidential elections, and Republican Ron Johnson won Wisconsin’s other Senate seat by just 1 point last year. Republicans poured $77 MILLION into Wisconsin to squeak out that narrow victory, and God knows what they have in store to flip Tammy’s seat and deliver the Senate majority for Mitch McConnell. Listen here, Peter: If we don’t pick up the pace now, we’ll be playing catch up to the campaign war chest Republicans are amassing to go after Tammy. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I know Tammy and this team have what it takes to defend this seat. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Can I tell you a story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68255636/422447208/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230817-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4YjE1MDI2LTQyM2QtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FrV1hdX3x_YnwLF4xx0wKPfaEeUkYGrbS5R1G2NjKHM=)
---
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, Peter?

While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism is at the very _core_ of my work in the Senate today.**

**In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**

Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**

**Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me _2 points down_ in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**

clean_body: I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country | = Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, Peter? While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – because my Judaism is at the very core of my work in the Senate today. In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it. Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. But I need your help. Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me 2 points down in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking: = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Jacky * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. "The Biden Administration’s proposed plea deal to 9/11 perpetrators is a slap in the face to the thousands of victims of that horrific attack and their families. The possibility that Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who conceived the very idea of the September 11 attacks and pitched it to Bin Laden, might not face justice is appalling. These terrorists deserve the death penalty."
-Congressman Mike Lawler

clean_body: | | | | \- - - -| "The Biden Administration’s proposed plea deal to 9/11 perpetrators is a slap in the face to the thousands of victims of that horrific attack and their families. The possibility that Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who conceived the very idea of the September 11 attacks and pitched it to Bin Laden, might not face justice is appalling. These terrorists deserve the death penalty." -Congressman Mike Lawler | | | | | | Lawler For Congress Press P.O Box 87, South Salem, NY \- =

Ahead of the 2024 presidential election, GA Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is moving to remove **_nearly TWO HUNDRED THOUSAND voters from the voter rolls._** This move comes right as groups across Georgia are suing the state government for diluting the Black vote, just as the GOP did in Alabama and Louisiana. Not only that, but it was reported that GOP activists in Georgia challenged the rights of nearly 100,000 voters. **Team, we’re up against rampant GOP voter suppression in Georgia, and we need your support. Our voter protection team is here to support the hundreds of thousands of Georgians who face an uphill battle to vote thanks to the Georgia GOP, and your support today is critical to powering that team. Thank you for your continued support, GA Dems Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Please know I’m committed to building resilient infrastructure & fighting climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Michigan is a place that will drive the world forward through our grit, our world-class workforce, and stunning natural resources. |
#
---
Friend, As we face unprecedented challenges, I’m committed to reducing the impacts of climate change and protecting this beautiful place we all call home. **[If you support my work to take job-creating, cost-reducing climate action, will you add your name to our list of grassroots supporters today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68255820/422447738/-136077210?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIxOTYxM2EtNDMzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cValB3X6kpoddtfq9Oqk59DMxq80w0w623HnM8I0Mp4=&emci=ed7c6e33-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9219613a-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68255821/422447739/-136077210?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIxOTYxM2EtNDMzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cValB3X6kpoddtfq9Oqk59DMxq80w0w623HnM8I0Mp4=&emci=ed7c6e33-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9219613a-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)
---
In Michigan, we’re serious about protecting our land and our lakes.
We’re home to 21% of the world’s freshwater and millions of acres of forest, lake shores, and farmland.
That’s why we’ve made record investments in conservation and parks.
It’s why we replaced tens of thousands of lead pipes and tackled pollution and PFAS.
It’s why we’re tackling climate action head-on by reducing emissions, lowering energy costs, and improving efficiency.
And guess what? _It’s working._ We’re a top 3 state for battery and electric vehicle manufacturing. The #1 state for energy sector job growth. Nearly 120,000 Michiganders work in clean energy and 167,000 more will join them in the next decade.
I also proposed $1 billion of investments in my budget to lower the cost of electric vehicles, incentivize clean manufacturing, and help people get even more good-paying clean energy jobs. And don’t forget the millions proposed to create resilient infrastructure.
Michigan is a place that will drive the world forward through our grit, our world-class workforce, and stunning natural resources.
**[We’ll keep working together to make a real difference in people’s lives and protect our planet for generations to come. If you’re with me, please join our fight today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68255822/422447740/-136077210?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIxOTYxM2EtNDMzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cValB3X6kpoddtfq9Oqk59DMxq80w0w623HnM8I0Mp4=&emci=ed7c6e33-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9219613a-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68255823/422447741/-136077210?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTIxOTYxM2EtNDMzZC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cValB3X6kpoddtfq9Oqk59DMxq80w0w623HnM8I0Mp4=&emci=ed7c6e33-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9219613a-433d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1028753)

In 2022, with the support of Hillary’s incredible grassroots supporters like you, we flipped a 50-year Republican stronghold from **RED** to **BLUE**. Now, Republicans are doing everything in their power to take it back – _**in fact, they’re already running attack ads against Hillary!**_

We can’t let these attacks go unaddressed. If the GOP is already preparing for next year’s election, we must also be prepping. Fellow Patriot, I hope this email finds you well. Below are some brief summaries of the exciting work that the AFL Team has been engaged in this past week:Yesterday, AFL sued the Governor of Washington, the Attorney General of Washington, and the Secretary of the Washington Department of Children, Youth, and Families, alleging that they are engaged in “state-sanctioned kidnapping.”This comes after Washington Governor Inslee signed Senate Bill 5599 into law earlier this year. This radical law allows shelters to take in children struggling with gender dysphoria and potentially provide them with life-altering “care” (potentially including sterilization) _without parental consent or knowledge_.AFL continues to lead the charge against corporate and institutional discrimination. Yesterday, AFL filed a class-action lawsuit against Progressive Preferred Insurance Company, Progressive Casualty Insurance Company, and Circular Board LLC for engaging in patently illegal racial discrimination. Circular Board, LLC operates an online resource platform called Hello Alice, which conspired with Progressive to engage in discriminatory behavior. Progressive offers $25,000 grants to ten “black-owned, small businesses to use toward the purchase of a commercial vehicle.” Progressive does not allow businesses owned by members of other races to even apply for these grants, and AFL’s client was barred from applying for this grant simply because he is not black. On Tuesday, AFL’s Center for Legal Equality filed a federal civil rights complaint with the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) and sent a cease and desist letter to video game company Activision, demanding they stop using gender and racial preferences in hiring practices and internship programs and to instead focus on creating shareholder value, not promoting this harmful fringe political ideology.Finally, on Wednesday, continuing our investigation into the UK-based pro-censorship organization, the Center for Countering Digital Hate (CCDH), AFL launched a series of state FOIA requests regarding a letter written by twelve state attorneys general, all Democrats, to the CEOs of Twitter and Facebook, seeking to censor the views of American citizens in coordination with CCDH. We appreciate your ongoing support of our efforts to uphold our constitutional rights and fight against discrimination. Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or would like to discuss these matters further.For Freedom,Mary Thomas

| | Friend,

---
Whenever I’m asked how I have the motivation to never give up, my answer is always the same...

---
...Patriots like _**YOU**_ are the source of my courage, hope, and UNBREAKABLE resolve to SAVE AMERICA.

---
**The other evening I read some of the wonderful notes supporters have been sending me. I’ve attached just a few below and took out their names to respect their privacy.**

---
_“Never ever give up. America needs you!”_

---
_***_
---
_“Thank you, Mr. President, you have billions of people praying for you. Thank you for standing up for what's right. Our prayers are with you and your family. Godspeed, Mr. President.”_
---
_***_
---
_“You’re in my daily prayers. May the Lord keep guiding the way, and no weapon formed against you or your family and staff shall prosper.”_
---
_***_
---
_“Keep it up, Mr. President. We all know it's a sham.”_
---
_***_
---
When I tour the country and hear voters tell me they’re struggling and they’re losing hope in our country, there’s not a single ounce of me that can even think about abandoning this mission.

---
2024 truly is our final chance to save America.

---
I know that times are tough right now in Biden’s America, so if you’re doing poorly, then don’t even think about giving right now. Your prayers will guide me through this storm.

---
_But if you can, even $1 is enough to peacefully defend our country from tyranny._

The other evening I read some of the wonderful notes supporters have been sending me. I’ve attached just a few below and took out their names to respect their privacy. “Never ever give up. America needs you!” * “Thank you, Mr. President, you have billions of people praying for you. Thank you for standing up for what's right. Our prayers are with you and your family. Godspeed, Mr. President.” “You’re in my daily prayers. May the Lord keep guiding the way, and no weapon formed against you or your family and staff shall prosper.” “Keep it up, Mr. President. We all know it's a sham.” When I tour the country and hear voters tell me they’re struggling and they’re losing hope in our country, there’s not a single ounce of me that can even think about abandoning this mission. 2024 truly is our final chance to save America. I know that times are tough right now in Biden’s America, so if you’re doing poorly, then don’t even think about giving right now. Your prayers will guide me through this storm. But if you can, even $1 is enough to peacefully defend our country from tyranny. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

PROGRESS will be on the ballot this 2024 election season.

That’s why we launched our 2024 PROGRESSIVE POWER Fund — we must be well organized and well resourced to defeat both corporate Democrats and the radical right wing.

If you haven’t given yet, please take a moment and do so now, so that we can plan and invest in building as much campaign capacity as possible. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230817_FR_progressivepowerfund_0_3MO_financeteamourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024&t=1008&akid=4554%2E5885482%2Eoe4D2W)

We need all hands on deck ahead of next year. From electing more progressives to the House, to making sure Trump never steps foot in the White House again, and ending Kyrsten Sinema’s Senate career — we’ve got our work cut out for us.

And we cannot do it alone. Chip in here to help us chart the path to victory for progressives next year. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230817_FR_progressivepowerfund_0_3MO_financeteamourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024&t=1009&akid=4554%2E5885482%2Eoe4D2W)

In addition to preparing for tough election fights, we’ll also be working hard to make sure that Democrats deliver as much as possible on issues like climate, medical and student debt relief, worker power, and more. We need to give progressives every reason to get out to vote in 2024.

We rely on small donors like you to make a big difference in our world. Invest in the 2024 PROGRESSIVE POWER Fund and keep our political revolution going strong! body:
July will be recorded as the planet’s hottest month ever.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68256329/422449550/-154051583?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230817-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViZWVkNzliLTQ2M2QtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QIsj7ElixJSH9JUl07Cr1Vwx9QZRHi7nXUi6tpug8Ok=)

| Hi team,

July will be recorded as the planet’s hottest month ever. If we don’t address this climate emergency, the heat is here to stay unless we see urgent federal action from the Biden administration.

**We no longer have the luxury of time when it comes to fighting climate change. We are dealing with a climate emergency.** That’s why my team at Food & Water Action is joining Jane Fonda Climate PAC to gear up for the [_**March to End Fossil Fuels this September in New York**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68256330/422449551/-608181480?referrer=jfcp-woa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViZWVkNzliLTQ2M2QtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QIsj7ElixJSH9JUl07Cr1Vwx9QZRHi7nXUi6tpug8Ok=&emci=fc9007ed-143d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=5beed79b-463d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105) to demand urgent climate action.

[_**Join us in this national mobilization by making a gift to Food & Water Action and Jane Fonda Climate PAC today. Together, we’re turning up the heat on Biden to declare a climate emergency and end the era of fossil fuels!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68256331/422449552/-154051583?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230817-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViZWVkNzliLTQ2M2QtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QIsj7ElixJSH9JUl07Cr1Vwx9QZRHi7nXUi6tpug8Ok=)
---
| [CLIMATE ACTION NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68256332/422449553/-154051583?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230817-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViZWVkNzliLTQ2M2QtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QIsj7ElixJSH9JUl07Cr1Vwx9QZRHi7nXUi6tpug8Ok=)
---
President Biden has called the climate crisis a "code red for humanity." But his administration hasn't done nearly enough to stop fracking, pipelines, and offshore drilling. Instead, Biden continues to expand oil and gas drilling.

If he's serious about addressing climate change, **Biden must do everything he can now to end the era of fossil fuels and transition to a 100% renewable energy future — a liveable future for us all.**

[_**You can power our work to fight for urgent federal action on climate by making a gift to Food & Water Action and the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68256333/422449554/-154051583?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230817-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViZWVkNzliLTQ2M2QtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QIsj7ElixJSH9JUl07Cr1Vwx9QZRHi7nXUi6tpug8Ok=)

President Biden won’t take the necessary action unless he hears this message loud and clear: _**The era of fossil fuels is over, and we need urgent climate action now!**_ Your gift will go directly to our on-the-ground efforts to ban fracking and stop fossil fuels, push for more climate leadership in Congress, and mobilize large-scale actions like the March Against Fossil Fuels.
| [CLIMATE ACTION NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68256334/422449555/-154051583?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230817-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViZWVkNzliLTQ2M2QtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QIsj7ElixJSH9JUl07Cr1Vwx9QZRHi7nXUi6tpug8Ok=)

Wenonah Hauter

clean_body: July will be recorded as the planet’s hottest month ever. | = | Hi team, July will be recorded as the planet’s hottest month ever. If we don’t address this climate emergency, the heat is here to stay unless we see urgent federal action from the Biden administration. We no longer have the luxury of time when it comes to fighting climate change. We are dealing with a climate emergency. That’s why my team at Food & Water Action is joining Jane Fonda Climate PAC to gear up for the to demand urgent climate action. = | = President Biden has called the climate crisis a "code red for humanity." But his administration hasn't done nearly enough to stop fracking, pipelines, and offshore drilling. Instead, Biden continues to expand oil and gas drilling. If he's serious about addressing climate change, Biden must do everything he can now to end the era of fossil fuels and transition to a 100% renewable energy future — a liveable future for us all. = President Biden won’t take the necessary action unless he hears this message loud and clear: The era of fossil fuels is over, and we need urgent climate action now! Your gift will go directly to our on-the-ground efforts to ban fracking and stop fossil fuels, push for more climate leadership in Congress, and mobilize large-scale actions like the March Against Fossil Fuels. | = Thank you, Wenonah Hauter Founder and Executive Director Food & Water Action | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. These days, people have a lot to say about our race in Northeast Ohio.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68256491/422450060/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.17_b2_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ2MWMwYS00NzNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_k2bZfbDrcwbB9F6Vkm6MzRHpYi1lYyW8WW-qXzyZuA=) Hi Peter, it’s Emilia here. I know you’ve heard a lot from my team lately, but [**before we reach tonight’s deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68256492/422450061/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.17_b2_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ2MWMwYS00NzNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_k2bZfbDrcwbB9F6Vkm6MzRHpYi1lYyW8WW-qXzyZuA=) I wanted you to hear directly from me.

These days, people have a lot to say about our race in Northeast Ohio. From calling us one of the most competitive races in the country, to predicting our race will be a pure toss-up – _it’s clear that the political experts don’t know what to make of our people-powered campaign._

But this isn’t the first time they’ve counted us out, Peter. **The morning of Election Day 2022,_FiveThirtyEight_ gave us only a 19% chance of winning. _Yes, you read that right. 19%!_**

**That night, our people-powered team defied the odds.** The pollsters might’ve been shocked – _but I wasn’t._

**I know the power that a grassroots team holds.** Thanks to the support of people like you from across Northeast Ohio, I was able to defeat my extremist opponent. And it’s that same grassroots, people-first energy that is going to help us win again in 2024.

[**But the hard work begins now, Peter. That’s why my team is working so hard to reach every single fundraising goal in 2023. We only need to raise $687 more tonight, so if you’re able, will you chip in before midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68256493/422450062/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.17_b2_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ2MWMwYS00NzNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_k2bZfbDrcwbB9F6Vkm6MzRHpYi1lYyW8WW-qXzyZuA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68256494/422450063/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.17_b2_es_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ2MWMwYS00NzNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_k2bZfbDrcwbB9F6Vkm6MzRHpYi1lYyW8WW-qXzyZuA=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68256495/422450064/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.17_b2_es_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ2MWMwYS00NzNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_k2bZfbDrcwbB9F6Vkm6MzRHpYi1lYyW8WW-qXzyZuA=)

She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: Republicans think they can flip this Senate seat, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Three reasons we're not losing sight of this Nevada Senate race >> |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68256457/422449968/-1667455293?sourceid=1051735&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdiNDhlMS00NjNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_kGaHDfYLBWSBzSbNgOXZqkz0U2c5EPW1_OYgDQFTPA=&emci=d17686d9-463d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fc7b48e1-463d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Republicans are eyeing _any_ potential opportunity to flip a Senate seat and take back the majority this cycle. **Nevada** decided the Senate majority in 2022 — and it could decide it again in 2024. _Here are three reasons you should care about this race:_
1. Nevada is a quintessential **swing state**. In 2022, they reelected a Democratic senator AND a Republican governor. So, at this point, the 2024 Senate race is anyone's game.

2. The latest polls show Sen. Jacky Rosen **neck-and-neck** with potential GOP challengers, and any polling within the margin of error is far too close for comfort.

3. This cycle will help shape the political future of the Silver State: Will it continue trending blue, or will it become a reliable red state for Republicans?

**We can't let Republicans gain an inch this cycle — our Senate majority depends on it. Donate now to help pro-choice champions like Jacky Rosen defeat Republican challengers:**

clean_body: Three reasons we're not losing sight of this Nevada Senate race >> | | | Peter, Republicans are eyeing any potential opportunity to flip a Senate seat and take back the majority this cycle. Nevada decided the Senate majority in 2022 — and it could decide it again in 2024. Here are three reasons you should care about this race: 1. Nevada is a quintessential swing state. In 2022, they reelected a Democratic senator AND a Republican governor. So, at this point, the 2024 Senate race is anyone's game. 2. The latest polls show Sen. Jacky Rosen neck-and-neck with potential GOP challengers, and any polling within the margin of error is far too close for comfort. 3. This cycle will help shape the political future of the Silver State: Will it continue trending blue, or will it become a reliable red state for Republicans? We can't let Republicans gain an inch this cycle — our Senate majority depends on it. Donate now to help pro-choice champions like Jacky Rosen defeat Republican challengers: Thanks, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) Senior Vice President of Campaigns, EMILYs List ** ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Re: Wisconsin Cream Puffs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Now more than ever, we need to stand strong with Tammy as she heads into what may be her toughest and most expensive election yet.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX)
Hey Peter, this is Arizona Senator Mark Kelly. I recently joined my good friend and Senate colleague, Tammy Baldwin, on the campaign trail in Wisconsin. We sat down with veterans to talk about our work to expand VA health care and benefits and stopped by the state fair — where I got to try my first Wisconsin cream puff! [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX) **Now more than ever, we need to stand strong with Tammy as she heads into what will be her most competitive and expensive election yet.** Last year, the GOP threw everything but the sink at me trying to flip my seat. My opponent was as far-right as they come, and he had nearly unlimited resources from Mitch McConnell, wealthy dark-money donors, and national Republicans to run attacks against me. But with your grassroots support, we focused on our mission: delivering results for hard-working people, keeping our Democratic Senate majority, and defeating MAGA extremism at the ballot box. **It’s time to do the same for Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin.** National Republicans are recruiting far-right mega-millionaires to run against Tammy — people who are out-of-touch with the needs of Wisconsinites and have enough resources to write themselves $15 to $20 million campaign checks. Tammy is relying on the support of this incredible grassroots team to help her fight back. That’s why I’m asking: **[Can you pitch in a few bucks to help re-elect Tammy and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Grassroots donations were critical to winning my battleground race in Arizona last year, and I know they’ll make all the difference as we fight to keep Wisconsin blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ePE894&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX)
---

---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-aug23.1j8eqa&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-aug23.gxXXqd&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-aug23.Efq4iZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX)

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=968%2E35263%2EQALdiX)

Thank you,
Mark
P.S. I appreciated the warm welcome I received in Wisconsin. It was great to meet so many of you, even some fellow Arizonans. Looking forward to my next visit already!

subject: Joe is Drowning Us in Red Ink
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-aydqe-trhiujldw-f/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning! It's Thursday.**
**Biden Finally Tells the Truth** The Biden administration is celebrating the one-year anniversary of the deceptively named "Inflation Reduction" Act - IRA - **[by touting the legislation as what it really is: a massive handout to climate change activists](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-y/).** **Biden is Drowning Us in Red Ink** Congressional Budget Office's recent monthly budget review shows **[how much the nation's financial situation has deteriorated](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-j/)** just since February. **Trumps Next Court Date** Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis has**[proposed a commencement trial date of March 4](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-t/) **in the Georgia election case of former President Donald Trump and 18 other defendants. **Another Industry on Strike** One of America's largest unions announced it will be **[voting to authorize a strike next week](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-i/)** in negotiations with top automakers.

**Now We Know** WH Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre's Twitter account**[made a truly revealing error.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-d/)** **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-h/)!**
* If she only **[had a brain](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-k/)**.
* Everyone **[loves them](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-u/)** more.
* Just like **[vegans](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-p/)**.
* The **[strongest force](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aydqe-trhiujldw-x/)** on earth!

One year ago, President Biden signed into law the landmark **Inflation Reduction Act**. This historic law takes us leaps and bounds forward on issues including clean energy, affordable health care prescription drugs, lowering the cost of living, and deficit reduction.

**And Scott Perry voted against it.** That’s not surprising. Perry has repeatedly voted against the interests of PA-10 communities, just to fall in line with his extremist buddies and donors.

**We need a leader who will put people before politics, and build on the progress made by the Inflation Reduction Act.** [I’m ready to do that. clean_body: | One year ago, President Biden signed into law the landmark Inflation Reduction Act. This historic law takes us leaps and bounds forward on issues including clean energy, affordable health care prescription drugs, lowering the cost of living, and deficit reduction. And Scott Perry voted against it. That’s not surprising. Perry has repeatedly voted against the interests of PA-10 communities, just to fall in line with his extremist buddies and donors. We need a leader who will put people before politics, and build on the progress made by the Inflation Reduction Act. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Communities across the country, including right here in Pennsylvania, have already seen real impacts of the Inflation Reduction Act, including tax credits and rebate programs to help families lower their energy costs. It’s estimated that $250 million in IRA funding will create 200,000 clean energy jobs statewide over the next 10 years. And more IRA projects are coming to your community soon – No thanks to Scott Perry. Not only is the IRA the largest-ever federal investment in climate action, but it also empowers Medicare to negotiate drug prices, caps insulin costs for Medicare recipients, creates good-paying jobs in clean energy, and holds big corporations accountable for paying their fair share. Brown Just Another Politician Ignoring The Republican Party

| Dear Peter,

I hate to break it to you, but Senator Sherrod Brown is not for the people. He is only for a SPECIFIC GROUP OF PEOPLE: **THE FAR LEFT.**

He claims day after day that he is for the people of Ohio, but that is not true. He will say whatever he needs to get the vote and then revert to his **one-sided agenda.**

Don't you think it is time for a politician willing to hear ALL Ohioans' concerns? Ohio is not made up of the far left only, and Matt Dolan understands that.

Matt Dolan has the interest of Ohio in mind and does not leave anyone behind. [**Stand with Dolan as he will listen to all voices.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=3161abc0a7f54eae8c966fc7468e4af9&_e=nOonZkk68zkXEgib-_eJlWfiziK4zR1AHU2lyrkLITGjYXt70nT3TGtqEprY6--8mSV1zbDUCNdDU2_92X26rJen8lrPjQsX88beY78nA0FG2AM9tqT9SOBWV_ltOTcQjyN46WTVdjWHUr2rY2zbazGa2ryl6MOQxR_aYJiJLivGmI9O_Jb2qihBEPoQSWXHC4ejFsihE3pcZkUEBJIzvP7LPDRtDL_G0vLmVOYHxEVB_dQaKIUOhLD5_6DW1Jnqhaf883W2kie-0spvVKRGNHJrny7A7scTHBljG_VB5NlINt7tAIjbAkvr9RCe8Gc0)

subject: My priorities

body:
|
#

_As a lawyer for the people of Louisiana, Lindsey Cheek’s entire career has been focused on advocating and fighting for clients, causes and people that she believes in. She has consistently delivered results and big jury verdicts for the hardworking everyday folks of Louisiana. Now, she’s taking up the fight for ALL Louisianans and is running to be the FIRST FEMALE Attorney General of Louisiana. With Cheek at the helm, families will have a tried and true lawyer fighting for THEIR safety and for THEIR future. As an attorney who’s taken massive corporations who hurt everyday Louisianans to court, and won, I’m ready to bring much-needed accountability to the AG’s office. I know the priorities I want to fight for as your next AG. Advocating tirelessly for women and girls. Putting criminals behind bars. Holding big corporations accountable to protect taxpayer and consumer dollars. **But what’s most important to me is building a campaign we _all_ can be proud of.** **[This campaign is built from everyday people, looking to make a difference. That’s why I want to hear from you. clean_body: | As a lawyer for the people of Louisiana, Lindsey Cheek’s entire career has been focused on advocating and fighting for clients, causes and people that she believes in. She has consistently delivered results and big jury verdicts for the hardworking everyday folks of Louisiana. Now, she’s taking up the fight for ALL Louisianans and is running to be the FIRST FEMALE Attorney General of Louisiana. With Cheek at the helm, families will have a tried and true lawyer fighting for THEIR safety and for THEIR future. If you’d rather unsubscribe, you can do so here:. Peter, My name is Lindsey Cheek, and just a few days ago, I announced that I’m running for Louisiana Attorney General on October 14th. As an attorney who’s taken massive corporations who hurt everyday Louisianans to court, and won, I’m ready to bring much-needed accountability to the AG’s office. I know the priorities I want to fight for as your next AG. Advocating tirelessly for women and girls. Putting criminals behind bars. Holding big corporations accountable to protect taxpayer and consumer dollars. But what’s most important to me is building a campaign we all can be proud of. | I’m no stranger to tough fights — and this will be my toughest one yet. But if there’s something you should know about me, it’s that I’ve never taken no for an answer. My team and I are excited to read through all your responses. Thank you. — Lindsey Cheek Lindsey Cheek for Attorney General PO Box 13035 New Orleans, LA 70185 United States | mailto:info@lindseycheekforag.com | Paid for by Lindsey Cheek for AG

Fellow American, Do you know where Joe Biden is?
While gas prices surge and Hawaii burns, No-Show Joe went on ANOTHER vacation, breaking his own record yet again for Most Vacation Days by a US President.
You read that right:
Joe Biden has spent 369 days of his presidency on vacation.
That’s 40% of his term so far!
Don’t get me wrong, I’d be happy to see Joe Biden on vacation... once we retire him!
But until then, Joe Biden has a job to do.
Your tax dollars pay politicians’ salaries, you deserve leaders who work just as hard as you do!

clean_body: | | | | Does Joe know he’s supposed to be at work? Fellow American, Do you know where Joe Biden is? While gas prices surge and Hawaii burns, No-Show Joe went on ANOTHER vacation, breaking his own record yet again for Most Vacation Days by a US President. You read that right: Joe Biden has spent 369 days of his presidency on vacation. That’s 40% of his term so far! Don’t get me wrong, I’d be happy to see Joe Biden on vacation... once we retire him! But until then, Joe Biden has a job to do. Your tax dollars pay politicians’ salaries, you deserve leaders who work just as hard as you do! | | Could you imagine if you spent 40% of your job on vacation? You and I would be FIRED! It’s time for us to hold No-Show Joe to those same standards. | | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: This month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Backpack distributions are in full swing.
#
The back-to-school season is in full swing, and **Team AOC is giving 1,000 backpacks to kids in our community** who don’t have one as they start the school year.**
****
We aren’t a traditional campaign, and we know that’s part of why you’re here.
During the pandemic, we ran a food distribution program that lasted for over a year. We organized a Census outreach program in 2020 that helped New Yorkers keep a congressional seat. We ran a Homework Helpers program that tutored thousands of students in our district who were struggling with the impacts of remote learning. And starting last weekend, we’re giving out thousands of backpacks to support families going back to school.
**We know you can make a donation to a lot of places, but we hope you can see why we hope you’ll make your first contribution to our campaign, even if it’s small.**
[Our average donation is $13.40. Can you chip in $13.40 — or anything you can — today to help keep our campaign going strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230817-2._rTPl5&refcode=em20230817-4830-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4830%2E2526796%2Ey5Rvd5)

With deepest thanks,
Team AOC

name: Juliana, United We Dream Action
subject: 🗳️ Voting should be easier
body:
We need your help to end voter suppression! | | | Hear me out, Peter: Participating in the voting process should be simple and easy to access — not complicated by laws that seek to disproportionately affect communities of color and low-income voters, making it harder for them to exercise their fundamental right to vote. Over the last decade, we’ve seen sweeping attempts to suppress the vote of young progressive voters of color. Right-wing politicians have done this by crying voter fraud and vote tampering — both of which have been widely publicly debunked! **The Freedom To Vote Act was recently introduced in Congress to ensure that every eligible voter, regardless of their background or circumstances, can participate in our democracy.**[Can you add your name today to demand Congress pass the Freedom to Vote Act today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMcInCxhHgxq5SyhVGCe21C-icaO358bWfq6AqoI-XvTW67xbs1pV7fSE1YS61OC_D4dGHG4rAxC3_wQVhfiMenleGSk5IBiyvPoggRHX1wUCwWrzauR-ayhi9D0CYrvgZKfm6o96lwWPhMfYON_JCpU-u3mFHhwl5ORc_Cx9QFh-A0xRkT6I4JF6ltXc435t-DEeePqePfnBe_J5ahQaUK9aXAIugZLpKsGdlaT_yjqYOQds9ngQvWr-6qh4ZNZkVjZBpekkMiYkWc8RnKSPVBXwxNl0MlMI3lMCag4sEXO0/3yt/PpwFfSCFSymRpJQ_JPh-Yg/h0/DIsODmyi3OaNmrUdbD1-Z1XzrZjkHlHvHTO120hWIg4) ✍️](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMcInCxhHgxq5SyhVGCe21C-icaO358bWfq6AqoI-XvTW67xbs1pV7fSE1YS61OC_D4dGHG4rAxC3_wQVhfiMenleGSk5IBiyvPoggRHX1wUCwWrzauR-ayhi9D0CYrvgZFSG5Aep-DV0n-qeEUT0prJ4XjOTS49vz1olxy54mWLbZ65I8Ak1oafCWwEl3NsAJ4Egg4a1Hm6Xapm9nS7s3m1qY6SNn633sYCPKuiWptYonZf54za0PCvKZCoD1Adnr9dma4S2qrS3zEP35nMA7d-9sRZdVQHkU0u9ME0KMJli/3yt/PpwFfSCFSymRpJQ_JPh-Yg/h1/PTOJSD45tSQDpCLwlG_80aKyasmJAxKFlFYF3ykPEyQ)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMcInCxhHgxq5SyhVGCe21C-icaO358bWfq6AqoI-XvTW67xbs1pV7fSE1YS61OC_D4dGHG4rAxC3_wQVhfiMenleGSk5IBiyvPoggRHX1wUCwWrzauR-ayhi9D0CYrvgZFTC-5ZViltdjEhIW7afhtQdWNcGhNCIJjj-Ho9R2bjJ7sD0oFBkYRu059kb8liXvi5DgXAt8WIVfSqd4pQSobKt8WXWAXZdltyOuNs6d1CXRBssqeQtk9NzXKBylGdpnSlHM2PIerioLt2_mMqMRxMjTYyKLwdpIebTGulPPEv0/3yt/PpwFfSCFSymRpJQ_JPh-Yg/h2/JuHkMzqjMhLyDW_XPGIWfbPGbo5XHLRdTChIohBl2D8) It's time for a comprehensive voting rights bill — the Freedom to Vote Act would work to end voter suppression by:
* 📲modernizing our voting systems, making it more accessible and reliable–including measures like automatic voter registration
* 🗓️expanding early voting, and protections against discriminatory voter ID laws
* ✊bringing transparency to our electoral process and reducing the influence of wealthy special interest groups

Whether it’s an election for who’s serving on your local school board or who will be the next President of the U.S, the outcome will have real consequences in our communities. [That’s why Congress must pass the Freedom to Vote Act ASAP!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMcInCxhHgxq5SyhVGCe21C-icaO358bWfq6AqoI-XvTW67xbs1pV7fSE1YS61OC_D4dGHG4rAxC3_wQVhfiMenleGSk5IBiyvPoggRHX1wUCwWrzauR-ayhi9D0CYrvgZL-Aoypi55YRfWw6zKJ0YnuyQJhCWyJrBAHqaboJU-jd1ujarOnflaPo6uNIoiDCzqYfDn2C5Fvhhew6czGtEy_OV7XTvmv3pYUDL22F6z528zd6Aw1wOypk87wG73N-b9TQJwMMpCDf7l9K8EkolROev4I5K30ymWWeYMVvLy-i/3yt/PpwFfSCFSymRpJQ_JPh-Yg/h3/zulV06exCs45sgceRuUFkm1Y9hw7fa0aw0Uamh3zbdA) 🧡Thanks for your support, Juliana and the rest of the UWD Action Team

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Public health > polluter profits
body:
I just reintroduced the Cumulative Impacts Act to put people’s health first.
#
Peter,
Listening to our residents, especially our seniors talk about having some of the worst asthma this year is devastating. We can't let this become our new normal.
With the 12th Congressional District having some of the worst air quality in the world, it's time for us to move with urgency.
We have seen it over and over again where corporate polluters operate in majority Black and brown communities like ours. This has compounding harms for public health—leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more. For example, Metro Detroit has some of the highest asthma rates in the country, and Black Detroiters are over three times more likely to be hospitalized for asthma.
**Something has to change. This is why I reintroduced the _Cumulative Impacts Act._**
The bill would require the EPA to consider the cumulative harms of pollution in an area before granting permits for polluting facilities—and to deny permits for facilities that would endanger public health. This would be a revolutionary, transformative change for our neighbors who just want to breathe clean air.
[**Please sign today to support the _Cumulative Impacts Act_ , which would require environmental regulators to prioritize people’s health over the profits of corporate polluters.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137136?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjdem-20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817-30424&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=30424%2E1203867%2Ep1EB_O)
**[Sign Now](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137136?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjdem-20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817-30424&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=30424%2E1203867%2Ep1EB_O)**
When approving new polluting facilities, the EPA doesn’t currently take into account the cumulative impacts—the public health and environmental effects of past, present, and future pollution releases in the community.
The _Cumulative Impacts Act_ would require the EPA to analyze cumulative impacts in permitting decisions under the _Clean Air Act_ and _Clean Water Act_ , and deny permit applications unless the applicant can demonstrate a reasonable certainty of no harm to the community or vulnerable groups.
**This legislation will protect and empower residents of frontline communities who are living with the devastating effects of climate change and fossil fuel development.** That includes residents of Dearborn’s South End, which is home to an extreme concentration of corporate polluters that sit directly across from schools, homes, and playgrounds.
Samra’a Luqman, a community advocate in the neighborhood, says: _“We refuse to continue being the nation’s dumping ground for industries and corporations in the name of corporate greed. My family and our neighbors deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water as basic human rights, and we need new laws that will put the well-being of impacted communities before the profits of the companies poisoning us.”_
Yes, we all deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water. Where pollution occurs is a policy choice, and we can change the EPA’s permitting process to put people’s health first—particularly in communities already overburdened by air and water pollution.
[**Please sign today to support the _Cumulative Impacts Act_ , to rectify environmental racism and protect our public health from corporate polluters.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137136?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjdem-20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817-30424&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=30424%2E1203867%2Ep1EB_O)
**[Sign the Petition](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137136?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjdem-20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817%3Frefcode%3Dem20230817-30424&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=30424%2E1203867%2Ep1EB_O)**
Thank you for taking action. I will continue to hold corporate polluters accountable for treating communities of color like mine as sacrifice zones. Together, we’ll keep fighting for a world where all of us can thrive.
In solidarity,
Rep. Rashida Tlaib
_Michigan’s 12th Congressional District_

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230817-30424-footer&t=5&refcode2=30424_1203867_p1EB_O&akid=30424%2E1203867%2Ep1EB_O)**
