This would be a revolutionary, transformative change for our neighbors who just want to breathe clean air. When approving new polluting facilities, the EPA doesn’t currently take into account the cumulative impacts—the public health and environmental effects of past, present, and future pollution releases in the community. The Cumulative Impacts Act would require the EPA to analyze cumulative impacts in permitting decisions under the Clean Air Act and Clean Water Act , and deny permit applications unless the applicant can demonstrate a reasonable certainty of no harm to the community or vulnerable groups. This legislation will protect and empower residents of frontline communities who are living with the devastating effects of climate change and fossil fuel development. That includes residents of Dearborn’s South End, which is home to an extreme concentration of corporate polluters that sit directly across from schools, homes, and playgrounds. Samra’a Luqman, a community advocate in the neighborhood, says: “We refuse to continue being the nation’s dumping ground for industries and corporations in the name of corporate greed. My family and our neighbors deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water as basic human rights, and we need new laws that will put the well-being of impacted communities before the profits of the companies poisoning us.” Yes, we all deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water. Where pollution occurs is a policy choice, and we can change the EPA’s permitting process to put people’s health first—particularly in communities already overburdened by air and water pollution. Thank you for taking action. I will continue to hold corporate polluters accountable for treating communities of color like mine as sacrifice zones. Together, we’ll keep fighting for a world where all of us can thrive. In solidarity, Rep. Rashida Tlaib Michigan’s 12th Congressional District Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Over the past few months, we’ve seen draconian abortion bans and anti-choice ballot measures pop up in numerous red states across the country, and there’s no sign of slowing down.

And while last week’s anti-abortion ballot measure in Ohio may have failed, let’s make one thing clear: **Extreme Republicans won’t be satisfied until abortion is illegal in every state – including Oregon. **

_But they’re going to have to go through me first._

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Let’s come together for Maui
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Your support for these two great organizations would be greatly appreciated. And it will make a real difference in the lives of so many.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)
Derek — It is hard to imagine the devastation that wildfires have left behind on Maui.
Our country’s deadliest wildfire in the last 100 years. At least 111 deaths. Over 2,200 buildings destroyed, most of them homes, including virtually the entire town of Lāhainā, Hawaiʻi.
**Fueled by climate change.**
There are no two ways about it — our rapidly changing climate is becoming a life-and-death issue. And it’s only getting worse each year.
**[Right now, these two incredible organizations are on the ground helping — the Maui Food Bank and the Hawaiian Humane Society. If you can spare it, please split a donation to these organizations today:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.DmJ5rx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the Maui Food Bank and the Hawaiian Humane Society will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.4ik-UY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.eWeVol&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.xOJhUk&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.w7IqGM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.9XXGdV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.DmJ5rx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)
---
The wildfires have completely upended access to basic necessities and thousands of homes across the island.
The **Maui Food Bank** is connecting residents in need with food, water, sanitary items, and other critical supplies right now.
And tragically, as residents have lost contact with their pets or have to make the gut-wrenching decision to shelter their families by giving their pets up for adoption, the **Hawaiian Humane Society** is helping to shelter, relocate, and reunite them.
Your support for these two great organizations would be greatly appreciated. And it will make a real difference in the lives of so many.
**[Even $10 split between the Maui Food Bank and the Hawaiian Humane Society will make an impact. Chip in today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.JtyOes&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)**
In the Senate, I will fight like hell to abolish the filibuster and pass massive new investments to fight climate change and transition us to a green energy economy. The scale of this crisis demands it.
But for now, I hope you will join me in adding your support for the Maui community, and keep them in your thoughts, prayers, and well-wishes.
Thank you,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em_maui.DmJ5rx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_FOT_GEN_AC90_20230817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=3437%2E5257348%2EKh38u_)

There is no punishment for committing crimes in California. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ericearly.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_s=d8fea351370e482d98627f58d2f1d687&_t=eUq90p8cp-fEzL9f3Jbi6u7KVZ3KuEYrI8pdWOR4WqLspJdolJPhV1joxDUraQWEBAi9Wp6KE9VKsQhJTzgGW8-atksDDgG5Js8QsxhQMz4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ericearly.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_s=d8fea351370e482d98627f58d2f1d687&_t=eUq90p8cp-fEzL9f3Jbi6u7KVZ3KuEYrI8pdWOR4WqLspJdolJPhV1joxDUraQWEBAi9Wp6KE9VKsQhJTzgGW8-atksDDgG5Js8QsxhQMz4%3D)

[](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=d8fea351370e482d98627f58d2f1d687&_e=-gVnlzpZPzT_m3X-htAJPRO58yGKS5qODidB1LZQrjzjH-sJSN_Mv-c6EXlyUW33dOqdgEiNiTAu_WgyWlhJr21_EIyxuIBVVBVpekAiquA74oiih02JFlto_Hd1faRTg4cf6Lz69IaFxSPlCmmGV6-pYkwyoCrazG1A6lFRgbBJ1O_fuDv-pvrTt37E7rkmxR6BzQswhMs86PYtoIrrKSKUll_HHor1RtEKexYnDOgCMFFuOP0rfmKjL1y8yedRv4rl1uARpW8dTUElQFod5Qqaw4ZIWYhkmbR6NpmFkjRK2JOXOnxofhvld3tJ0RItXOywCm-hubZLO0Q5qazheVdkc6oKq3Efjz4WS8LlOZlSDmkV_0HwQ2h4cFfKHzWG)
---
Peter,

I’m sure you’ve been seeing it all over social media – brazen criminals openly looting retail stores with little to no fear of being stopped, caught, or punished.

That’s because in Adam Schiff’s California – especially in his home of Los Angeles – _they’re not._

Would-be criminals have received the message from Democrat politicians loud and clear: **there is no punishment for committing crimes in California.**

This has led to serial looting across the state, and it’s only getting worse.

Where are my Democrat opponents for Senate - Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee? SILENT.

They’re not concerned. They don’t care. Their pro-criminal policies are the cause of this in the first place.

Now, these radical leftists are trying to get elected to the Senate so they can take California’s failed policies national. **If Schiff, Porter, or Lee become a Senator, they will do everything in their power to make all of America look like California.**

As a Californian myself, _even I don’t want that!_

That’s why, as a principled conservative who is sick and tired of seeing what failed Democrat politicians are doing to my state and country, **I’m running to put a stop to the madness.**

[**I need your help to defeat Schiff, Porter, and Lee in the race for California’s Senate seat, win back a Republican Senate majority, and restore competent conservative leadership in America.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=d8fea351370e482d98627f58d2f1d687&_e=-gVnlzpZPzT_m3X-htAJPRO58yGKS5qODidB1LZQrjzjH-sJSN_Mv-c6EXlyUW33dOqdgEiNiTAu_WgyWlhJr21_EIyxuIBVVBVpekAiquA74oiih02JFlto_Hd1faRTg4cf6Lz69IaFxSPlCmmGV6-pYkwyoCrazG1A6lFRgbBJ1O_fuDv-pvrTt37E7rkmxR6BzQswhMs86PYtoIrrKSKUll_HHor1RtEKexYnDOj-LjuSEXVSXIKgjQptjxzJme-bqD9aBAdA3rb-DldwrqdO3Veib-fJHdFyga9uhXXkL759eqHFqqnRCE5YLlPjAhSYIyY8jUKxmCplLNujMKCRKbcMPCTFQR6RS-8fiW01UNvYSBYd0jcaI7ElrXDu)

Early polling showed me leading this race, and I need your help to maintain our momentum.

[**We can’t have California’s left-wing policies infect the rest of the country. Please support my campaign for Senate and help me defeat Adam Schiff & Company by rushing $10, $25, $50 or more to my campaign right away.**](http://links.ericearly.com/u/click?_t=ad21af4bbba74273abaf5a1183f945ac&_m=d8fea351370e482d98627f58d2f1d687&_e=-gVnlzpZPzT_m3X-htAJPRO58yGKS5qODidB1LZQrjzjH-sJSN_Mv-c6EXlyUW33dOqdgEiNiTAu_WgyWlhJr21_EIyxuIBVVBVpekAiquA74oiih02JFlto_Hd1faRTg4cf6Lz69IaFxSPlCmmGV6-pYkwyoCrazG1A6lFRgbBJ1O_fuDv-pvrTt37E7rkmxR6BzQswhMs86PYtoIrrKSKUll_HHor1RtEKexYnDOi3FBKEG8pJXwuMOpPzcjwBl92R2SpG-4NNQ52o1zStIU31EQi5YyC0QiUcxMHhselB0udtfbhYznnuFBk71XtXoR7yETB2IdCHOGY_hEZLGhOyq_Qwnb_O02r3E0cdAhMuHr_-dV3w1e4-vr3tk10M)

Thanks,

Eric Early
Republican for Senate

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. Early polling showed me leading this race, and I need your help to maintain our momentum. Thanks, Eric Early Republican for Senate | | ABOUT ERIC EARLY Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. Not a career politician. Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. Follow Eric On Social Media P.O. Box 730, Hilmar, CA 95324 | | Paid for by Eric Early for US Senate 2024 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Targeted. Stalked. Assaulted.
body:
The transgender mob doesn't want me to be emailing you today. They would be reeling with anger if they knew I reached out.

| |
---
| | | _The transgender mob doesn 't want me to be emailing you today. They would be reeling with anger if they knew I reached out._

They've targeted me.

They've stalked my events and shouted me down.

They've even held me for ransom.

The mob wants me to be afraid and back down. _**[But here's the thing, when it comes to protecting your daughters and granddaughters, _I will never surrender._](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f504e54fc8fe4390b73fe6373fa0042a&_e=KeEdayAycs2Mz3tPnBqvLAlNNMUGV8rs_GEi5JR8U62Uw9dp2b4iGOi2BQrOpsEom-wvYVf644sfcZM826OFkZN2XHa5Ja_ZwAzvk5t-wJIuBSgV3564nhDiM1IaeY3sn8biheKB9VWf_GoL1rsDtMh-yajOUP8MBav9-ktgLFz1lmYaW_oc75_gDns0T18aRzUmskgpDyI9wcw2bqFk7-WF2gn8jmTNPEZ1EctC9Z3SeiD7UtafK3wHlLZ0mYpRr5GnKcqIFltgfVkN19SwfSIb91oD5J3qLv8klUbW2q81xpVk88_tHdVsIXomiDojB8Zk3Gp1tsV1ClRZwO0AEMoaK4nfEx8P5PXcytAPqcJNgBzGU8EO4vPBp2qZp12DWFB_DoOqFjWDaeDnNytDJd0w1K3546LTudDBs3qTucQmS7ra1xDF0qABE10LlUR0 "But here’s the thing, when it comes to protecting your daughters and granddaughters, I will never surrender.")**_

My name is Riley Gaines.

I'm a 12-time All-American swimmer and a recent college graduate who dreamed of pursuing a dental career. However, my plans changed when I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I experienced firsthand the very thing Democrats and liberal activists want you to believe is an exaggeration. A major accomplishment was ripped from my grasp by a biological man.

Now, Democrats are unleashing woke athletes and violent activists to force me to bow down.

I've gone toe to toe with Megan Rapinoe, Brittney Griner, and Lia Thomas in defense of your daughters and granddaughters. I survived a brutal assault and ambush at my Saving Women's Sports speech at San Francisco State University.

And yet, I continue my mission to protect fair play and competition for biological women.

What's happening in women's athletics is a threat to us all. Their woke agenda won't just stop at sporting competitions. They won't be satisfied until all female opportunities are fundamentally destroyed by including biological males.

I refuse to let this happen on my watch, and I hope you'll join me. If you're willing to proudly protect female opportunities from biological men, _**[please accept my call to action.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f504e54fc8fe4390b73fe6373fa0042a&_e=KeEdayAycs2Mz3tPnBqvLAlNNMUGV8rs_GEi5JR8U62Uw9dp2b4iGOi2BQrOpsEom-wvYVf644sfcZM826OFkZN2XHa5Ja_ZwAzvk5t-wJIuBSgV3564nhDiM1IaeY3sn8biheKB9VWf_GoL1rsDtMh-yajOUP8MBav9-ktgLFz1lmYaW_oc75_gDns0T18aRzUmskgpDyI9wcw2bqFk7-WF2gn8jmTNPEZ1EctC9Z3SeiD7UtafK3wHlLZ0mYpRr5GnKcqIFltgfVkN19SwfSIb91oD5J3qLv8klUbW2q_dahh_cWqbBw1JeRNa0MNitfiwk2f1NcmDzw8xjSwH3b7RTN-7qvMFCetYjJx5OixeXfxgrJLnIK35pIlJstEGI2VB1a5bIHu7Z6xK2ZEc1saN67ZKm82p8O-boIi-gJ8DcgiSudp0OOKQUyrPETFc "please accept my call to action.")**_

Thank you,

Riley

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Something really important happened in Ohio last week.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
And Arizona is next.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230817-2-f&t=1&akid=961%2E734936%2EaD1xQH)
Peter, something really important happened in Ohio last week.
The Ohio GOP tried to make it harder to pass ballot measures — popular votes from the people of Ohio that become law. They did it because they wanted to stop the people of Ohio from voting to protect the right to choose.
And the people of Ohio won.
It’s a huge victory. And Arizona is next.
The people of Arizona want reproductive freedom. I do, too. So I’ll make you three promises today:
1\. I’ll fight like hell in the Senate to defend the right to choose.
2\. I’ll do everything I can to stop legislation that bans abortion.
3\. And if we have a chance to pass legislation that protects abortion, I’ll vote for it — even if it means ending the filibuster.
But first, I have to win.
[**So if you’re with me, can you make your first contribution to my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because we’re trying to build a movement here. When thousands of people come together, big things can happen.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230817-2-f&t=2&akid=961%2E734936%2EaD1xQH)
[MAKE A DONATION](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230817-2-f&t=3&akid=961%2E734936%2EaD1xQH)
This is really important, Peter. To protect the right to choose, it’s going to take all of us.
Glad to have you on board.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=961%2E734936%2EaD1xQH). name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: what TX-32 voters want:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | Our strong launch has made one thing crystal clear: TX-32 voters want leaders in Congress to take action to end the epidemic of gun violence, defend reproductive freedom, and ensure healthcare affordability so our communities can thrive.

**As a trauma surgeon, I've seen the life-threatening impact to my patients due to policies related to all three of these issues. I know what's at stake.**

With the many intersecting crises occurring in our country, I’m answering the call to serve. I will bring my frontline experience to Congress to address the source of preventable suffering and violence harming our communities, and to uplift all who seek a better life. I was inspired by Dr. Andrews’ run for Congress last cycle and am proud of the work she is doing to give kids a voice in Washington, D.C. **_[Can I count on you to stand with me by splitting a gift between my campaign and Their Future PAC?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zwpvoNq9lfhZHcPHbyBUAclra-4j5WKRPoAUnmCc-Y90flW6VfOSxQyjZkpLi6stDdXP7eHp3K37XVriDyZym9NV2JIuVfQrDAm9Cw8FTNpHNeAXf9LzhCuczOH1iWCkQt7K5U3KoMds0oKqr8oK28jsL9ZOPzyhUHPYulrZ5oRIfy9VrlkpMMtlaeUqnd9PkD-1yqjCEAkGmuouH9vtozvojibtM88nsSI3y3UWCXMjgv36UYHG-YLwmpDjcHfU2SEdpOnU4QAPGAuox8-aQMrssHUC9B04Upnd0uJfzub7gGDDrXkrLQ2zckWhHjI3FiCMjO67HTh1NEBjnqsgigoI8kLoLiR9pCRur__dOGkA/3yt/2_pSsGQnQTO2skzc-Mll5g/h0/EHMkSYLR6D8ZavXAAlIPJI6o6aFhYnnMm495OvmUbqQ)_**

clean_body: | | | Our strong launch has made one thing crystal clear: TX-32 voters want leaders in Congress to take action to end the epidemic of gun violence, defend reproductive freedom, and ensure healthcare affordability so our communities can thrive. As a trauma surgeon, I've seen the life-threatening impact to my patients due to policies related to all three of these issues. I know what's at stake. With the many intersecting crises occurring in our country, I’m answering the call to serve. I will bring my frontline experience to Congress to address the source of preventable suffering and violence harming our communities, and to uplift all who seek a better life. I was inspired by Dr. Andrews’ run for Congress last cycle and am proud of the work she is doing to give kids a voice in Washington, D.C. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | My life has been about service, not politics. I decided to run for Congress after realizing I could have a greater impact on my community by repairing systemic issues — not in the OR, but through public policy. As a political appointee in Dallas, and as a policy advisor in Washington, D.C., I learned firsthand that real change is possible when we have leaders bold enough to take courageous action — and as a Veteran, trauma surgeon, and gun safety advocate, that’s exactly what I’ll do in Congress. body:
| | | Peter, I’ll make this quick: I have a deadline at **[midnight tonight](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=636a1de4f3a74a5b939715dcaac1be01&_e=an30T-ehqCf4v_Kq-xt5s1SVnGbRk0xiTHzq-vM8-qu8G3-Lab6z3o2G3RrKu7kMZCIxWHqRr_BFnr-63Y2LYq8NoBK3y91yxaRH9ojtt_CtxrZpMAosF6WksFrJ6wdh1m860H70KJGgIM7ELBN5wyq0oXlVdTcR2ZpH-tGN-xNEE-YP49OaOEpFsIAmMbIuHmUQlZIMHHEhibN_SpqcaEkizxDko7PnYjRkYsgYdHOkCmLeFFQdU_7p27knTyeABnFlFiPUh8B1xLQa0qB3PF9xxy0qA-0yiqk7ok0XXL8Tzw-AOUetia_pFXuxmIC-Wz6N3A0XA_mSauT9pxqMG9CHC4PCnGk-6EwlJ_lai91s9KsGWnZclFUSUX6fHrtX)** , and not enough patriots have stepped up.

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4826?t=1007&amount=25&akid=328%2E52803%2EyiRIeE ]Angela Alsobrooks Logo

There may be no better story happening in Maryland (or the entire world of
sports) than our very own Baltimore Orioles, Peter.

A young, scrappy, start-up team who has defied all odds and expectations.
They have the best record in the entire American League—not because they
have the most money or the highest payroll—but because they’ve built the
strongest team from the ground up.

In many ways, that’s the model our grassroots Senate campaign is trying to
replicate, Peter.

Much like the O’s, we may never have more money than our closest
competitors (looking at you, Yankees 👀), but what we will have is a strong
team, the most passionate base of supporters, and a desire to do whatever
it takes to win for our families, our friends, and our communities.

This is our moment, Peter. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4826?t=1008&amount=10&akid=328%2E52803%2EyiRIeE ]And if you’re a believer like me,
then I hope you’ll chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to support our
Maryland-first Senate campaign as we root on our beloved Baltimore Orioles
and continue to defy the odds while the deck is stacked against us.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

Thanks for your support, and remember: Let’s go O’s!

—Angela

---

clean_body: While the GOP gets to redraw map after map, it's up to us to take the power from these extremists. = Peter, In Alabama, extreme Republicans are defying the Supreme Court as they continue to disenfranchise Black voters. Democracy will not be denied, Peter. Across the country, the GOP has stolen power from the people with discriminatory redistricting, and little to no accountability. While the GOP gets to redraw map after map, simply to try again when they're found to be discriminatory, it's up to us to take the power from these extremists. Shontel Brown and Democrats in Congress are fighting to end partisan gerrymandering and ensure every voter has a voice. But to do it, we need your help taking back Congress and keeping the presidency in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = For justice, Team Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Fellow Americans,

**BREAKING: IT HAPPENED AGAIN ...**

**HOW MANY TIMES HAS PRESIDENT TRUMP BEEN INDICTED?

FOUR TIMES

HOW MANY TIMES HAS HUNTER BIDEN BEEN INDICTED?

ZERO ***
* **_except the sweetheart plea deal he was offered_**
**This is another blatant example of America 's two-tiered justice system. It's clear that there is one standard of justice if your last name is Trump and a completely different one if it is Biden. **

| [**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP -- STOP THE TWO-TIERED JUSTICE SYSTEM** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=57ba68549ecf491c9ab94b82fc72551e&_e=__kj2h1q9NI8B3BWjG4Yn7oDnSOidvkQLl1reIp68O6ct1l3FVEDD6mIQFV8jM-j4eVytO78fVLWBvP_R1SoP_QTMIbpUOotJ-YO-OQITntARg3rzeFLQHmG6QTDtr8XHK2Yst-TwHGmitrcTY3aOg8mXaBRMee6YfxaXMMkuzCJqitahzjd87XMFBwkwD1QWzdL_R_e0eLHVQbJVKHPI_1Y2DxakIewKdQG44uDOfi46WeAk3oZON324Fw0F1j1TK-HpxbftRFZd1_aSAFDKUcxb99T2vl7ZTIkJgWNvf4bU7YZv1swvs9pTaFad8sFbCg66Ivv77sODMHW0L4LmJmaxVxZC7zT-8ppLf22TRorniA62JNjVGQx2bTjd1Nc)

**This indictment is a catastrophe.** _We have to fight back against the politicized justice system -- we can't take this sitting down._

name: John Fetterman
subject: Back in PA for August…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Every moment I spend in PA is a reminder of how lucky I am to represent this state.
#
Hey Derek,
I'm so happy to have spent a lot of August in PA, getting to meet with so many of the amazing folks I'm fighting for in the Senate. **And there's *nothing* like spending time with family, catching up with friends, and even getting to sleep in my own bed** 😴
Every moment I spend in PA is a reminder of how lucky I am to represent this state in the Senate, and how truly grateful I am for your support every step of the way 🙏
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230817-1?refcode=em20230817-1-8510&refcode2=8510_434096_NZW_KL&akid=8510%2E434096%2ENZW_KL)
I met with a ton of PA mayors in Scranton, visited Heller Orchards in Wilkes-Barre (and tried their McIntosh 🍎), and met with agriculture experts to discuss the farm bill, a key part of my work on the Agriculture Committee. It's great to get back to PA and talk to the folks who I work hard to represent in Washington.
So I just wanted to say thank you, thank you, thank you for always having my back. I promise to always have yours, too ❤️
– John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
P.S. – If you'd like to help power our work in the Senate, **[consider making a contribution today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230817-1?refcode=em20230817-1-8510&refcode2=8510_434096_NZW_KL&akid=8510%2E434096%2ENZW_KL)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230817-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230817-8510&refcode2=8510_434096_NZW_KL&akid=8510%2E434096%2ENZW_KL)**

name: Michelle Dorothy
subject: Where do you stand on gun safety?
body:
Hi, Derek, it’s Michelle, Chrissy’s chief political advisor. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be quick:
---
**When it comes to the epidemic of gun violence we’re facing as a nation, we need practical, bipartisan solutions to keep our communities safe.**
For years, Chrissy has been reaching across the aisle to pass commonsense gun safety legislation like the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, which invested in mental health resources and strengthened existing gun ownership restrictions.
But as Chrissy always says: There’s work to be done. So, as she plans her strategy for the rest of the session, she needs to know where your gun safety priorities are.
That’s why I’m personally asking, Derek: **[_Will you take a moment to share your thoughts about gun safety with Chrissy and her team? Our survey closes at midnight, and your input is vital to this work._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68258092/422456146/-282735917?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk868-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjJmMDVjYy01MTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gddn_zDk7FQCWPZKU1IhmByrYiOPyp8cDUwKiRNVtLU=&emci=4ffdee12-3d3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=822f05cc-513d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)**
Thank you,

Michelle Dorothy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Chrissy**
Date: Tue, Aug 08, 2023
Subject: Gun violence is a bipartisan issue
| | |
---
Derek, as a third-generation veteran, former teacher, mother, and proud Pennsylvanian, I know the topic of gun violence brings up a multitude of deeply personal feelings for many people.

Just over halfway through the year, we’ve already seen more than 420 mass shootings in the United States. Like me, I’m sure you’ve felt outraged, heartbroken, or hopeless at the cost of this senseless crisis – and that’s why I’ve been so keen to continue fighting for a solution.

I’ve been an outspoken champion of bipartisan legislation like the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, the first gun violence legislation passed in the House and Senate in nearly 30 years.
**With so many lives at risk, bipartisan compromise is the most effective way to keep our homes, schools, and neighborhoods safe.**
Since the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act went into effect one year ago, we’ve seen significant investments in mental health resources and school safety that have worked to address gun violence at its source. It also strengthened restrictions on those under 21 and those convicted of domestic violence when attempting to purchase a firearm.
I’m honored to be in a position to make a difference – but frustrated by the magnitude of violence still left unaddressed. More than ever, we need commonsense, bipartisan gun safety legislation and increased coordination between federal, state, and local governments.
**Together, we have the power to end this crisis. That’s why I’d like to hear from you today, Derek. Before our live poll closes at midnight, please tell me:**
**Do you support commonsense** **gun safety legislation?**
| | [Yes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68258093/422456147/-282735917?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk868-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjJmMDVjYy01MTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gddn_zDk7FQCWPZKU1IhmByrYiOPyp8cDUwKiRNVtLU=&emci=4ffdee12-3d3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=822f05cc-513d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)
---
| | [No](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68258095/422456148/-282735917?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk868-su-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjJmMDVjYy01MTNkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gddn_zDk7FQCWPZKU1IhmByrYiOPyp8cDUwKiRNVtLU=&emci=4ffdee12-3d3c-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=822f05cc-513d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21278485)
---
Thank you. There’s still work to be done.

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

subject: The 2024 Farce Grows More Empty with Every Passing Day
body:
Listen now (14 mins) | This week's crises expose the inadequacy of our choices
| |
---|---|---

Aug 17
---
[The 2024 Farce Grows More Empty with Every Passing Day](https://substack..qZ2rR0DzDo949jzZM1CcHWNmEQqOHsUvltFsNlOhGE8?)
This week's crises expose the inadequacy of our choices
| | [Listen to preview](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136143162&utm_source=podcast-email&play_audio=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MTQzMTYyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTIzMTM2NDIsImV4cCI6MTY5NDkwNTY0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.faIt_1XGEIewtr6ZgKQZINrw4_z_7LcWvVj204ZEENg&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email#play)|
---|---|---
---
---
[](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | Shahid Buttar| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136143162&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MTQzMTYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY5MjMxMzY0MiwiZXhwIjoxNjk0OTA1NjQyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.UehzUjEzQ8hwC6LX2w4xJEp6SIPShvsSP9ufnYQaN6E&utm_medium=email&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136143162&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MTQzMTYyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTIzMTM2NDIsImV4cCI6MTY5NDkwNTY0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.faIt_1XGEIewtr6ZgKQZINrw4_z_7LcWvVj204ZEENg&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136143162&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MTQzMTYyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTIzMTM2NDIsImV4cCI6MTY5NDkwNTY0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.faIt_1XGEIewtr6ZgKQZINrw4_z_7LcWvVj204ZEENg)
### Beyond a humanitarian and ecological disaster
Last weekend, the [worst wildfire in Hawaii's history](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/307c7eb0-e3a0-45b7-9089-0a4fd651ff72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claimed at least (and likely many more than) 100 lives and destroyed the traditional indigenous capital of Lahaina, yet the President of the United States [chose](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a31eb364-86b2-49a1-beec-e029533560d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to remain on vacation before offering federal relief amounting to a ridiculously meager [$700 per resident](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b18365d1-6659-4e8f-8242-7f1f638c8d6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e88397c6-3a77-42fa-b692-7bf636f89b26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Beyond the loss of life and incalculable suffering in the aftermath of the fire is a further, irreparable harm to history and culture. Having colonized a once indigenous island and wreaked havoc on its culture, America has stood on the fossil fuel climate accelerator for decades, inviting the calamity that just wiped out an irreplaceable cultural treasure and the history it once commemorated.
The loss of Lahaina should not be understood merely as a humanitarian disaster. It is an injury to human civilization that ultimately continues the genocidal project of colonialism.
None of this had to happen. We were warned long ago.
### A presidential election race divorced from reality
The President's chief rival, meanwhile, is under criminal indictment in four different jurisdictions. While Biden has enjoyed a comfortable vacation this week, Trump continued to fuel his campaign with the corresponding outrage of a support base convinced--despite his open attempts to usurp the democratic process, and the Constitution--that his prosecution is political in nature.
Neither Biden nor Trump are willing to participate in a debate.
Even though the major parties' favored voices have each declared their inadequacy and proudly thumbed their noses at voters, journalists [across the political spectrum](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/099bd420-5d84-42d1-b2d2-1b084df25e19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) continue to deride the only available alternatives: an esteemed Black scholar with no peer or equal in either politics or higher education ([Cornel West](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/edbc3fef-7461-4383-8d8a-e738f36dbd92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), an author and ecumenical guide who has inspired millions ([Marianne Williamson](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5db2cc3b-1e84-4209-ba39-440acf1f1c9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), and a figure whose father and uncle were both literally assassinated during previous presidential campaigns ([Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b3bf207e-4eda-4b5a-81da-804a42cd5969?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
Beyond political journalists, non-profit organizations have appeared equally oblivious. Climate justice organizations are [bragging](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/46df09a5-7b37-48f5-85e1-3786becf224c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about half measures, seeking validation from the establishment's concessions rather than emphasizing [how vastly inadequate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3c37fd8a-989b-4c2b-a70b-99f5fb872205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) they remain in the face of the mounting climate catastrophe. Nor is climate the only arena in which the establishment's bipartisan failures have grown offensively obvious.
For instance, this week, NPR documented the findings of government officials who discovered ["barbaric" and "negligent" conditions](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fbbc2242-8123-41df-8b98-6830d1be8dad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when investigating federal immigrant detention facilities. One example involved "a man in [ICE] custody...sent into a jail's general population unit with an open wound from surgery, no bandages and no follow-up medical appointment scheduled, even though he still had surgical drains in place."
Beyond the horrifying conditions revealed in NPR's report is a remarkable reflection of bipartisan opposition to transparency. The NPR story included the following passage:
> For more than three years, the federal government -- under both the Trump and Biden administrations -- fought NPR's efforts to obtain those records. That opposition continued despite a Biden campaign [promise](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fd610621-a0ca-4810-9e29-47e3bc08dda8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to "demand transparency in and independent oversight over ICE."
Not only has the Biden administration continued the Trump-era assault on the rights of migrants once guaranteed under international law, but the assault on their rights also compounds the harms of the climate crisis. Many migrants currently detained en masse were driven to seek new homes by environmental disasters, including a drought across Central America that has grown so severe that the Panama Canal has been forced to [limit shipping traffic](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1f21d9a8-4471-4b70-bc3c-4b459f9da4d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Why are weapons for Ukraine so much more important to Washington than clean water, sustainable housing, and a livable climate for Americans in Hawaii and elsewhere?
Ignoring the bipartisan roots of crises from climate to human rights, Democrats bray about wanting to defend democracy from the likes of an outright fascist, hiding themselves behind a legal process while ducking public debates. They rely on voters failing to notice that both corporate parties support the same policy agenda, embrace the same corruption, and rely on similarly ignorant tribal cults of personality.
Meanwhile, our social crises continue to fester well beyond Hawaii.
Thank you for listening (or reading)! This post is public, so feel free to share it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=136143162&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MTQzMTYyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTIzMTM2NDIsImV4cCI6MTY5NDkwNTY0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.faIt_1XGEIewtr6ZgKQZINrw4_z_7LcWvVj204ZEENg)
### Capital compounds our crises
Home ownership has grown notoriously impossible for first-time buyers, food prices have forced millions to tighten their belts, and the federal government is about to risk [unprecedented debt defaults](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/37d11bb3-d9e3-4796-bfa6-e44c49b0d2a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by forcing millions of Americans to restart payments on student loans that Biden [could have waived](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3638a04d-61a3-441b-96d1-347953d20cec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) were he less committed to Wall Street. Americans are "[drowning in debt](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/068bd467-6af0-4d04-8a81-b0f3ad80d609?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," including over $1 trillion in credit card debt, and nearly $2 trillion in student loan debt.
Across the United States, [suicide rates are rising](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0bdd0d6a-dd7c-4cc5-b051-81fac1b49fc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), alongside [homelessness](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c4869865-2dbc-4e6f-a231-09a924c61021?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and also [food insecurity](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/2f0163e9-f185-4d12-90c5-8284ff469e05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Meanwhile, [life expectancy is dropping](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1f0d6232-c3a5-436d-93bf-0a7d66ff02d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as are the life prospects for hundreds of millions of working Americans struggling to survive while the top 1% continues to hoard the world's resources.
To receive new posts about bipartisan corruption, and creative efforts to combat it, consider becoming a (free or paid) subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..7N8-ApDmwAacSBRWE4GOyqz3lGOD0lrZKTdIOAtBRrc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=136143162)
Ignoring all of these festering crises, Biden has instead sought yet another $25 billion in military aid to Ukraine, revealing once again the bipartisan imperial priority on militarism over the rights or needs of struggling Americans. Why are weapons for Ukraine so much more important to Washington than clean water, sustainable housing, and a livable climate for Americans in Hawaii and elsewhere?
What sense does it make to be wasting more money on weapons & war when we so obviously need more firetrucks & fire fighters?
From wars to pandemics, it's almost as if journalism in America exists in order to mislead readers & viewers, rather than inform them.
The contrast between bipartisan militarism run amok and the ignored concerns of people struggling with the impacts of the mounting global climate catastrophe is not the only example of how our system continues to invite preventable disasters.
### "Believe science," unless it's inconvenient
Having recently recovered from a bout with COVID, I'm struck by how little concerns about the latest surge appear to be registering in national media. Of course, having [abandoned its previous attempts to track & trace](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0cf35853-97a5-4b0f-ae48-e7dd02338f39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) infections, Washington has done everything possible to make sure that the continuing pandemic remains out of the public discussion.
But the resignation of transparency on public health is also outrageously nothing new. Remember how much energy was once poured into labeling the "lab leak" hypothesis of the disease's origins as [official disinformation](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a4a888cf-d76c-456b-837f-e94a7ace8f0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), leading social media platforms and journalists to suppress a growing [body of evidence](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/21b05135-8d71-4e73-8b86-d0b123bb8bfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that continues to face [bizarre hostility](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a50103ea-5fe3-474f-bf8e-5bf892fbec2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from some experts even as others eventually [acknowledged](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3b44e09b-f373-4e77-84ea-9a2e1b4b6720?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it as the most likely explanation?
From wars to pandemics, it's almost as if journalism in America exists in order to mislead readers & viewers, rather than inform them.
None of this had to happen. We were warned long ago. The annihilation of Lahaina was preventable...

clean_body: Listen now (14 mins) | This week's crises expose the inadequacy of our choices | | ---|---|--- | | | ? ? | | Aug 17 ? This week's crises expose the inadequacy of our choices | | | ---|---|--- | | Shahid Buttar| | | | | | Beyond a humanitarian and ecological disaster Last weekend, the claimed at least (and likely many more than) 100 lives and destroyed the traditional indigenous capital of Lahaina, yet the President of the United States to remain on vacation before offering federal relief amounting to a ridiculously meager . | | ---|---|--- Beyond the loss of life and incalculable suffering in the aftermath of the fire is a further, irreparable harm to history and culture. Having colonized a once indigenous island and wreaked havoc on its culture, America has stood on the fossil fuel climate accelerator for decades, inviting the calamity that just wiped out an irreplaceable cultural treasure and the history it once commemorated. The loss of Lahaina should not be understood merely as a humanitarian disaster. It is an injury to human civilization that ultimately continues the genocidal project of colonialism. None of this had to happen. We were warned long ago. A presidential election race divorced from reality The President's chief rival, meanwhile, is under criminal indictment in four different jurisdictions. While Biden has enjoyed a comfortable vacation this week, Trump continued to fuel his campaign with the corresponding outrage of a support base convinced--despite his open attempts to usurp the democratic process, and the Constitution--that his prosecution is political in nature. Neither Biden nor Trump are willing to participate in a debate. Even though the major parties' favored voices have each declared their inadequacy and proudly thumbed their noses at voters, journalists continue to deride the only available alternatives: an esteemed Black scholar with no peer or equal in either politics or higher education (), an author and ecumenical guide who has inspired millions (), and a figure whose father and uncle were both literally assassinated during previous presidential campaigns (). Beyond political journalists, non-profit organizations have appeared equally oblivious. Climate justice organizations are about half measures, seeking validation from the establishment's concessions rather than emphasizing they remain in the face of the mounting climate catastrophe. Nor is climate the only arena in which the establishment's bipartisan failures have grown offensively obvious. For instance, this week, NPR documented the findings of government officials who discovered when investigating federal immigrant detention facilities. One example involved "a man in [ICE] custody...sent into a jail's general population unit with an open wound from surgery, no bandages and no follow-up medical appointment scheduled, even though he still had surgical drains in place." Beyond the horrifying conditions revealed in NPR's report is a remarkable reflection of bipartisan opposition to transparency. The NPR story included the following passage: For more than three years, the federal government -- under both the Trump and Biden administrations -- fought NPR's efforts to obtain those records. That opposition continued despite a Biden campaign to "demand transparency in and independent oversight over ICE." Not only has the Biden administration continued the Trump-era assault on the rights of migrants once guaranteed under international law, but the assault on their rights also compounds the harms of the climate crisis. Many migrants currently detained en masse were driven to seek new homes by environmental disasters, including a drought across Central America that has grown so severe that the Panama Canal has been forced to . Why are weapons for Ukraine so much more important to Washington than clean water, sustainable housing, and a livable climate for Americans in Hawaii and elsewhere? Ignoring the bipartisan roots of crises from climate to human rights, Democrats bray about wanting to defend democracy from the likes of an outright fascist, hiding themselves behind a legal process while ducking public debates. They rely on voters failing to notice that both corporate parties support the same policy agenda, embrace the same corruption, and rely on similarly ignorant tribal cults of personality. Meanwhile, our social crises continue to fester well beyond Hawaii. Thank you for listening (or reading)! This post is public, so feel free to share it. Capital compounds our crises Home ownership has grown notoriously impossible for first-time buyers, food prices have forced millions to tighten their belts, and the federal government is about to risk by forcing millions of Americans to restart payments on student loans that Biden were he less committed to Wall Street. Americans are "," including over $1 trillion in credit card debt, and nearly $2 trillion in student loan debt. Across the United States, , alongside and also . Meanwhile, , as are the life prospects for hundreds of millions of working Americans struggling to survive while the top 1% continues to hoard the world's resources. To receive new posts about bipartisan corruption, and creative efforts to combat it, consider becoming a (free or paid) subscriber. Ignoring all of these festering crises, Biden has instead sought yet another $25 billion in military aid to Ukraine, revealing once again the bipartisan imperial priority on militarism over the rights or needs of struggling Americans. Why are weapons for Ukraine so much more important to Washington than clean water, sustainable housing, and a livable climate for Americans in Hawaii and elsewhere? What sense does it make to be wasting more money on weapons & war when we so obviously need more firetrucks & fire fighters? From wars to pandemics, it's almost as if journalism in America exists in order to mislead readers & viewers, rather than inform them. The contrast between bipartisan militarism run amok and the ignored concerns of people struggling with the impacts of the mounting global climate catastrophe is not the only example of how our system continues to invite preventable disasters. "Believe science," unless it's inconvenient Having recently recovered from a bout with COVID, I'm struck by how little concerns about the latest surge appear to be registering in national media. Of course, having infections, Washington has done everything possible to make sure that the continuing pandemic remains out of the public discussion. But the resignation of transparency on public health is also outrageously nothing new. Remember how much energy was once poured into labeling the "lab leak" hypothesis of the disease's origins as , leading social media platforms and journalists to suppress a growing that continues to face from some experts even as others eventually it as the most likely explanation? From wars to pandemics, it's almost as if journalism in America exists in order to mislead readers & viewers, rather than inform them. None of this had to happen. We were warned long ago. The annihilation of Lahaina was preventable... name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: I Wanted You to Hear An Update from Me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ballots have dropped. Time is running out. But, today, I just wanted to fill you in on my race for Congress. | | | | |
---
|
---

Dear Friend,
Ballots have dropped. Time is running out. I’ve asked you for your help financially and with volunteer support.
But, today, I just wanted to fill you in on my race for Congress.

1. **Ballots, Backpacks, and Becky:** This Tuesday, we were thrilled that the ballots had dropped. In anticipation, we planned NINE events throughout the district to coincide with the big day. From Tooele to Torrey and St. George to Farmington, many of you generously opened your homes to share the message of my campaign. I was honored to visit five of those events throughout the district. It was a busy day, and I was honored to participate.
2. **Fundraising Update:** You’ve received many emails asking for a donation, so here’s an update: you are continuing to deliver for this campaign! My team has shared that we consistently outperform our weekly email fundraising goals. So, there is no fundraising ask for today: just thank you for your generosity!
3. **St. George and Stansbury Park This Weekend:** I care deeply about every corner of CD2 and have loved having dozens of events in the most rural and southern parts of the district. I’m excited to have events throughout the day in St. George tomorrow–and I invite you to keep an eye on our social media for events near you.

You are what keeps me going in these final days. From the bottom of my heart, thank you!
Becky
|
---

They _know_ that we demand to have our voices heard. Peter, I will veto this anti-voter legislation, but the GOP’s one-vote supermajority is going to try to push it through anyway in an attempt to give themselves an advantage in the critical 2024 elections. **[My team and I set a goal of raising $5,000 in the next 5 hours to take on the GOP’s anti-voter agenda and DEFEAT them at the polls in 2024. GOP legislators have made it clear that they care about nothing so much as holding onto their own power. They’ll do whatever it takes — even change the rules to secure victory in elections they fear they otherwise couldn’t win.
Here’s what this troubling legislation will do:
* Give themselves the authority to decide contested elections
* Limit the timeframe when absentee ballots can be delivered to count
* Toughen same-day registration rules
* Limit options for how elections boards and county officials can fund elections administration

**Peter, Republicans are using Trump’s Big Lie of election fraud to cover for passing bills — making it harder for Democrats to vote and rigging elections. That’s the real fraud!**
Republicans have worked for years to disenfranchise voters and rig elections with illegal electoral maps. Now, they are attempting to seize control of election administration to inject chaos and partisan influence over decisions at the ballot box.
**We’ve defeated their anti-democratic efforts before, and by breaking the supermajorities next year, we will do so again.**

clean_body: What a disgrace. | Peter, The GOP-controlled legislature just achieved what they’ve aimed to do for years — make it harder to vote for people they think will likely vote Democratic. Republicans passed this bill late last night because they know that their sinister plot to disenfranchise our people is targeted at Democrats and fully anti-democratic for our state. They know that we demand to have our voices heard. Peter, I will veto this anti-voter legislation, but the GOP’s one-vote supermajority is going to try to push it through anyway in an attempt to give themselves an advantage in the critical 2024 elections. = | = GOP legislators have made it clear that they care about nothing so much as holding onto their own power. They’ll do whatever it takes — even change the rules to secure victory in elections they fear they otherwise couldn’t win. Here’s what this troubling legislation will do: Give themselves the authority to decide contested elections Limit the timeframe when absentee ballots can be delivered to count Toughen same-day registration rules Limit options for how elections boards and county officials can fund elections administration Peter, Republicans are using Trump’s Big Lie of election fraud to cover for passing bills — making it harder for Democrats to vote and rigging elections. That’s the real fraud! Republicans have worked for years to disenfranchise voters and rig elections with illegal electoral maps. Now, they are attempting to seize control of election administration to inject chaos and partisan influence over decisions at the ballot box. We’ve defeated their anti-democratic efforts before, and by breaking the supermajorities next year, we will do so again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Roy Cooper = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. **CONTEST ENDS TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT**
[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=5dee78722ff246e591ffb6137163faad&_e=evABMQYCy60LV5NGvvlhRA9FmT0kRLv-YgSvQwV16YWPRvszMcn8GrDQ5ltzFQtnV8uwKLEJhnpOprfZwBTsV1Wh9Yy5hLrKLErsrlOvM675nh6nemLWFDyq-nD4WAhdQIDRfBuAKhD9CHMV6l9WJy19WmEawGfw9fsi-0osRPomseL9S8_k6N22VeFOElUyiiWL7loIvQnO5_pz3dU4pyATrHFHCwuZi2j00x5glKvryJ6ywAUYCx3IxQMp6jVDsWPQb4r_BFk-J7Ev4CI4RpWBUgH52Zd2fq6aOxuXV4oksx87c3apnuONeX5T1w43RJ6-p40HBDMb2So7KsDCwV1sM64saDsQUzpHIsRpZZPd6SoZ45iIY71BFh1VhIwPOrl90A0AxTv6zFzubfcjG54E2bwssy3QsDUTBBE_8Q3_k5Xcb2P2lpQuuv1MaNPB)
Fellow American, today is the _**FINAL DAY**_ to enter our contest and join me at the first presidential debate in Milwaukee.

This is a milestone for my campaign. It's thanks to loyal supporters like you, Fellow American, that I qualified for the debate. Now I want to share my thanks and have you join me at my first debate as a GOP candidate!

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Cinde Warmington
subject: Setting the stage for another showdown on abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| There’s some major news I need you to see:

The Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals ruling to limit access to mifepristone and force women to get their prescriptions in person is outrageous. Make no mistake, if upheld, it would leave countless women without essential care, including many in the Granite State.

**And now, the stage is set for the conservative justices on the Supreme Court to make another ruling on reproductive healthcare.**

**Let me be clear: Government officials have no place interfering with the personal health care decisions of women._As your governor, I would fight to ensure they never would._**

**[With federal courts taking action against our abortion freedoms, it’s never been more important to ensure New Hampshire elects a governor who will stand up for reproductive freedom. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. Make no mistake, if upheld, it would leave countless women without essential care, including many in the Granite State. And now, the stage is set for the conservative justices on the Supreme Court to make another ruling on reproductive healthcare. Let me be clear: Government officials have no place interfering with the personal health care decisions of women.As your governor, I would fight to ensure they never would. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Despite my call for New Hampshire to address this serious threat to women’s health, our state has failed to do so. With over a dozen special elections left on the books this year, and Democrats falling dangerously behind on our goal – we’re pushing grassroots supporters to chip in right now.
